| | NEGOP Unicameral Update Friday, January 6, 2023
The Unicameral is in the full swing of bill introductions! Republicans were inaugurated in force – Public Service Commissioners, Regents, Attorney General, Secretary of State, State Treasurer, Lieutenant Governor and Governor were all inducted after taking their oath of office. The NEGOP was there supporting ALL of our elected Republican representatives and are excited to support them as they move our Republican values forward!
Newly elected senators were also sworn in as the first item of business on Wednesday, Jan. 4. The speaker and committee chairs were then elected by their peers. To see a list of each legislative committee, please click [here](https://www.ne.gop/so/c4OMA1h9A/c?w=Hh3r1fkTNU1GAmOOZ9KWSX5ESK-olXqBO65zNlDgF1k.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9uZWJyYXNrYWxlZ2lzbGF0dXJlLmdvdi9wZGYvY29tbWl0dGVlcy9yb3N0ZXIucGRmIiwiciI6IjY5YzViNzZhLTg0OTItNDI1Yy05Njk1LTEyZWU5ZGRhNWQzNCIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjQxOGMxNzYxLWVkZDMtNGMxYS1iMDY0LWMwYmFjOWQwMjY0ZiJ9). These are the newly elected Republican committee chairs and legislative officers: Speaker of the Legislature – Sen. John Arch, OmahaAgriculture – Sen. Steve Halloran, HastingsAppropriations – Sen. Robert Clements, ElmwoodBanking, Commerce and Insurance – Sen. Julie Slama, PeruBusiness and Labor – Sen. Merv Riepe, RalstonEducation – Sen. Dave Murman, GlenvilGeneral Affairs – Sen. John Lowe, KearneyGovernment, Military and Veterans Affairs – Sen. Tom Brewer, GordonHealth and Human Services – Sen. Ben Hansen, BlairNatural Resources – Sen. Bruce Bostelman, BrainardRevenue – Sen. Lou Ann Linehan, ElkhornTransportation and Telecommunications – Sen. Suzanne Geist, LincolnExec Bd of the Legislative – Sen. Tom Briese (Chair), AlbionExec Bd of the Legislative – Sen. Raymond Aguilar (Vice Chair), Grand Island All legislation is introduced during the first 10 days of the session, or by Wednesday, Jan. 18. Each bill will be referred to a committee and scheduled for a public hearing. To date, 98 bills were introduced on Jan, 5, and 61 bills on Jan. 6. We encourage you to monitor bill introductions each day. For a comprehensive list of bills, click [here](https://www.ne.gop/so/c4OMA1h9A/c?w=3-bbq-P9raEuXLeGRezLk_9Vb7EEtBcSiNMOnl-x7lE.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9uZWJyYXNrYWxlZ2lzbGF0dXJlLmdvdi9iaWxscy9zZWFyY2hfYnlfZGF0ZS5waHA_U2Vzc2lvbkRheT0yMDIzIiwiciI6IjY5YzViNzZhLTg0OTItNDI1Yy05Njk1LTEyZWU5ZGRhNWQzNCIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjQxOGMxNzYxLWVkZDMtNGMxYS1iMDY0LWMwYmFjOWQwMjY0ZiJ9).
A few key bills (not comprehensive) introduced in the past few days are:
[LB15](https://www.ne.gop/so/c4OMA1h9A/c?w=qTtILzKVX1Y17um5fmn06DVTqlttMhBGX5LKtCi5SsQ.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9uZWJyYXNrYWxlZ2lzbGF0dXJlLmdvdi9iaWxscy92aWV3X2JpbGwucGhwP0RvY3VtZW50SUQ9NDk4ODUiLCJyIjoiNjljNWI3NmEtODQ5Mi00MjVjLTk2OTUtMTJlZTlkZGE1ZDM0IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiNDE4YzE3NjEtZWRkMy00YzFhLWIwNjQtYzBiYWM5ZDAyNjRmIn0) \- A training wage was introduced by Senator Briese. We support wages that work for employers to help train our youth to work in a less burdensome way for employers.
[LB77](https://www.ne.gop/so/c4OMA1h9A/c?w=JqQh3TYQSbAV7eqPiX2kOapx2_K5BE_nZ80k3m77GfA.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9uZWJyYXNrYWxlZ2lzbGF0dXJlLmdvdi9iaWxscy92aWV3X2JpbGwucGhwP0RvY3VtZW50SUQ9NDk3MTAiLCJyIjoiNjljNWI3NmEtODQ5Mi00MjVjLTk2OTUtMTJlZTlkZGE1ZDM0IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiNDE4YzE3NjEtZWRkMy00YzFhLWIwNjQtYzBiYWM5ZDAyNjRmIn0) \- Constitutional Carry is back and has been reintroduced. We are excited that 26 Republicans have signed on to this important bill. Please call your state senator to support and sign on to this legislation.
[LB71](https://www.ne.gop/so/c4OMA1h9A/c?w=--Ge-uBW9X5T7MiMBwXgr4izzbbElQNret_P09b4omI.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9uZWJyYXNrYWxlZ2lzbGF0dXJlLmdvdi9iaWxscy92aWV3X2JpbGwucGhwP0RvY3VtZW50SUQ9NDk2NTkiLCJyIjoiNjljNWI3NmEtODQ5Mi00MjVjLTk2OTUtMTJlZTlkZGE1ZDM0IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiNDE4YzE3NjEtZWRkMy00YzFhLWIwNjQtYzBiYWM5ZDAyNjRmIn0) \- Change provisions relating to parental involvement in and access to learning materials in schools. The NEGOP is committed to more parental involvement in education. Thank you Senator Sanders for introducing this important bill.
Cutting Taxes The Nebraska Republican Party believes less government is preferred. Government should make a dedicated effort to responsibly spend tax revenue. Public participation in every aspect of the budget process should be strongly encouraged and facilitated. We believe in returning money to the taxpayers and lowering tax rates on the Sales, Property, and Income tiers to make our economy more competitive. Our Central Committee supports a plan to “Provide a fair and regionally competitive personal and corporate tax rate.” Senator Linehan intends to propose legislation to accelerate the schedule of tax cuts that were already passed as well as lowering our published income tax rates. This is in alignment with the party platform goals. We encourage you to call senators to accelerate the tax cuts as discussed and support a reduction in income tax rates. Click [here](https://www.ne.gop/so/c4OMA1h9A/c?w=NKnJdmGEjnBcmE7fR85l549-_20Uix7Z8l8RyMabE_g.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9uZWJyYXNrYWV4YW1pbmVyLmNvbS8yMDIzLzAxLzA0L3RoaW5ncy10by13YXRjaC1mb3ItYXMtbmVicmFza2EtbGVnaXNsYXR1cmUtb3BlbnMtOTAtZGF5LXNlc3Npb24tb24td2VkbmVzZGF5LyIsInIiOiI2OWM1Yjc2YS04NDkyLTQyNWMtOTY5NS0xMmVlOWRkYTVkMzQiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI0MThjMTc2MS1lZGQzLTRjMWEtYjA2NC1jMGJhYzlkMDI2NGYifQ).Second, the Governor has discussed changing the school aid formula and ultimately this will have an effect on property taxes. If the outcome reduces the burden on property taxes (which we believe it will) this proposal will support our legislative goal of “Reducing the burden of property taxes” as voted on by our Central Committee.
Third, a petition was announced by several Republican senators to take the consumption tax to the people. Click [here](https://www.ne.gop/so/c4OMA1h9A/c?w=mId5ATYypCssOVepnQUvQTXbbIZlPUVChZr1ycNCZBM.). The big changes to the proposal announced was the elimination of the prebate, the elimination of the tax on groceries, and a move to under 8% on all new personal consumption (business consumption is exempt). In addition, the goals of the petition were offered in legislative form for LR6CA and LR7CA. The Central Committee has taken no position on the Consumption tax to date, but a few Central Committee members have expressed an interest in supporting this plan and may offer a formal resolution for support. Last but not least, conversations are being held to eliminate the Inheritance tax. Nothing formal has been introduced but we think there is a strong likelihood this will happen. Education There are plenty of bills in the works on the education committee. The NEGOP is very excited about the current committee structure and leadership. Until the bills are formally introduced, we will not comment at this time on the legislation being considered. We encourage you to remain patient. We agree with our Governor that the future of our kids is very important. We believe some SIGNIFICANT progress will be made to further the advancement of our children.
Senator Murman has sought assistance from the NEGOP to identify legal and research help on this committee. If you or anyone you know has an interest in this position and can commit SIGNIFICANT TIME AT THE UNICAMERAL, please let us or Senator Murman know. We have passed on influential and educated names to aid in their effort. Legal backgrounds are HIGHLY desired.
Second, the State Board of Education has started. Republicans have risen to 3 members on the board but the Democrats still have a majority with 5 members. Despite this difference, there are contentious discussions being had on the future of our kids. We encourage you to engage in the discussion. Some of the Democrats have agreed with our Republican board members on certain principles while others remain committed to a more radical “woke” ideology. We appreciate the bipartisan support on key principles from those on the other side of the aisle and we encourage our followers to examine what each board member is putting on the record as opposed to painting each member with a broad brush. Progress for our children may happen sooner with cooperation on where we agree on principles! Two years are too important to waste on the future of our kids.
Economy and Agriculture
The topic of ESG continues to grow at the Unicameral. “ESG” are actions in our economy aimed at new narratives that will hurt numerous industries...especially Agriculture. Unlike other states, the Nebraska State Treasurer DOES NOT have authority over the investment funds the state taxes. Treasurer Murante as well as the former Attorney General took significant stances on ESG policy. The discussion is moving into the legislative arena.
Bottomline, we are highly concerned that the Nebraska Investment Council has large sums invested with entities having stated policies against important industries like ranching due to the release of methane and other emissions this creates. The state needs to quickly look at the entities they invest in and their policies. Investing with entities against the economic interests of our state does not make sense. Make your voice heard with the Nebraska Investment Council to support our ranchers and other business leaders being negatively affected by ESG policies.
Protecting the Unborn
We have received several calls expressing a frustration on LIFE after the Judiciary committee went 4-4. We would encourage you in our understanding that Life legislation will be handled differently in 2023. The Judiciary committee is not the only committee that has jurisdiction over life issues. Stay tuned. Furthermore, it is important you encourage the Republican senators to continue discussions and find common sense solutions. We agree with the Governor that saving the most babies possible should be the goal! We are on the record that a vote on the issue needs to happen.
Election Integrity
Voter ID is being worked on by Senator Slama as well as Senator Erdman. It is mission critical as a party and state that we get this legislation right. While variations are being debated by the senators, we believe it is important that a ballot is turned in WITH the ID (not an ID to obtain a ballot). Senator Brewer will head up the government committee and it is important you communicate your concerns to the members of the Government, Military, and Veterans Affairs committee. Brewer, Conrad, Halloran, Holdcroft, Hunt, Lowe, Raybould, and Sanders will be considering election bills in committee.
In addition, there have been several bills on elections crafted and being carried by Republican senators (we will announce when they are introduced). Calls to co-sponsor key legislation should be made. This is one issue where senators need to hear from the people outside the walls of the Unicameral. Many in the body do not hear the groundswell of opinion on this issue as we do at the Party.
Modernizing Legislative Rules
We were disappointed but not dismayed over a lack of transparency on committee chair votes. Frankly, the results would have likely been the same on who headed the committees. However, the principle of following the Constitution and transparency is very important to Republican membership. The platform (in existence and unchanged for many years) calls for “Increased Transparency, Efficiency, and Accountability.” Furthermore, we support our State Constitution and Viva Voce (see clause below)! We encourage a call to Rules Committee members to ensure the principles of transparency/ accountability are addressed in the next 10 days on a PERMANENT basis and adherence to the State Constitution is restored.
This vote has nothing to do with the competency of the chair or partisanship. This vote has everything to do with transparency and following the Constitution. The fear is that if you are willing to violate one article of the Constitution, then you are willing to violate any part of the Constitution. A party of law and order needs to follow Constitutional law regardless of popularity. Any one member can call for a vote and that did not happen. A changing of the rules on a permanent basis would be an excellent win for the body and a reinforcement of the Constitution. Senator Erdman, Arch, Bostar, DeBoer, Hansen, and Ibach need to hear from you on the rules to pass out of committee. Furthermore, your Senators need to hear from you in support of the new rules (requiring voting transparency be restored) be adopted by the body. Click [here](https://www.ne.gop/so/c4OMA1h9A/c?w=a2BIfw0q23EVgoG7Az7VLjy_-t7lVD-JLYAtrpKTcgo.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9uZWJyYXNrYWxlZ2lzbGF0dXJlLmdvdi9sYXdzL2FydGljbGVzLnBocD9hcnRpY2xlPUlJSS0xMSIsInIiOiI2OWM1Yjc2YS04NDkyLTQyNWMtOTY5NS0xMmVlOWRkYTVkMzQiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI0MThjMTc2MS1lZGQzLTRjMWEtYjA2NC1jMGJhYzlkMDI2NGYifQ).
Finally, Senator Erdman introduced a bill to create a bicameral legislature. Our platform (that has been in place for many years and unchanged) supports this move. “In order to balance rural, urban and suburban interests in our state legislature, we support the return to a bicameral legislature whereby the upper house has fewer members but larger territorial areas to include a more diverse set of interests in the legislative process.” The NEGOP supports this Constitutional amendment on platform grounds. Encourage your senator to support this amendment to balance the interests of all Nebraskans in our state.
We know there are numerous bills covering many interests within the party. If you have questions, comments, or observations, you can email me at political@ne.gop. In the meantime please keep praying for our senators. The 108th Session can create significant and positive change. They need our support.
Hearings Starting January 23 Committee hearings on newly introduced bills are scheduled to begin on Monday, January 23. Afternoon bill hearings will be held that week, with full day hearings scheduled for the weeks of both January 30 and February 7. Hearings will be live streamed via NET and can be accessed online by clicking[ here.](https://www.ne.gop/so/c4OMA1h9A/c?w=jXXgs80jRCzULD-y3IXM6Yq1iLCJGRZelf_PRXCJeQI.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cDovL3d3dy5uZXRuZWJyYXNrYS5vcmcvYmFzaWMtcGFnZS90ZWxldmlzaW9uL2xpdmUtZGVtYW5kLXN0YXRlLWdvdmVybm1lbnQiLCJyIjoiNjljNWI3NmEtODQ5Mi00MjVjLTk2OTUtMTJlZTlkZGE1ZDM0IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiNDE4YzE3NjEtZWRkMy00YzFhLWIwNjQtYzBiYWM5ZDAyNjRmIn0)

The big changes to the proposal announced was the elimination of the prebate, the elimination of the tax on groceries, and a move to under 8% on all new personal consumption (business consumption is exempt). In addition, the goals of the petition were offered in legislative form for LR6CA and LR7CA. The Central Committee has taken no position on the Consumption tax to date, but a few Central Committee members have expressed an interest in supporting this plan and may offer a formal resolution for support. Last but not least, conversations are being held to eliminate the Inheritance tax. Nothing formal has been introduced but we think there is a strong likelihood this will happen. Education There are plenty of bills in the works on the education committee. The NEGOP is very excited about the current committee structure and leadership. Until the bills are formally introduced, we will not comment at this time on the legislation being considered. We encourage you to remain patient. We agree with our Governor that the future of our kids is very important. We believe some SIGNIFICANT progress will be made to further the advancement of our children. Senator Murman has sought assistance from the NEGOP to identify legal and research help on this committee. If you or anyone you know has an interest in this position and can commit SIGNIFICANT TIME AT THE UNICAMERAL, please let us or Senator Murman know. We have passed on influential and educated names to aid in their effort. Legal backgrounds are HIGHLY desired. Second, the State Board of Education has started. Republicans have risen to 3 members on the board but the Democrats still have a majority with 5 members. Despite this difference, there are contentious discussions being had on the future of our kids. We encourage you to engage in the discussion. Some of the Democrats have agreed with our Republican board members on certain principles while others remain committed to a more radical “woke” ideology. We appreciate the bipartisan support on key principles from those on the other side of the aisle and we encourage our followers to examine what each board member is putting on the record as opposed to painting each member with a broad brush. Progress for our children may happen sooner with cooperation on where we agree on principles! Two years are too important to waste on the future of our kids. Economy and Agriculture The topic of ESG continues to grow at the Unicameral. “ESG” are actions in our economy aimed at new narratives that will hurt numerous industries...especially Agriculture. Unlike other states, the Nebraska State Treasurer DOES NOT have authority over the investment funds the state taxes. Treasurer Murante as well as the former Attorney General took significant stances on ESG policy. The discussion is moving into the legislative arena. Bottomline, we are highly concerned that the Nebraska Investment Council has large sums invested with entities having stated policies against important industries like ranching due to the release of methane and other emissions this creates. The state needs to quickly look at the entities they invest in and their policies. Investing with entities against the economic interests of our state does not make sense. Make your voice heard with the Nebraska Investment Council to support our ranchers and other business leaders being negatively affected by ESG policies. Protecting the Unborn We have received several calls expressing a frustration on LIFE after the Judiciary committee went 4-4. We would encourage you in our understanding that Life legislation will be handled differently in 2023. The Judiciary committee is not the only committee that has jurisdiction over life issues. Stay tuned. Furthermore, it is important you encourage the Republican senators to continue discussions and find common sense solutions. We agree with the Governor that saving the most babies possible should be the goal! We are on the record that a vote on the issue needs to happen. Election Integrity Voter ID is being worked on by Senator Slama as well as Senator Erdman. It is mission critical as a party and state that we get this legislation right. While variations are being debated by the senators, we believe it is important that a ballot is turned in WITH the ID (not an ID to obtain a ballot). Senator Brewer will head up the government committee and it is important you communicate your concerns to the members of the Government, Military, and Veterans Affairs committee. Brewer, Conrad, Halloran, Holdcroft, Hunt, Lowe, Raybould, and Sanders will be considering election bills in committee. In addition, there have been several bills on elections crafted and being carried by Republican senators (we will announce when they are introduced). Calls to co-sponsor key legislation should be made. This is one issue where senators need to hear from the people outside the walls of the Unicameral. Many in the body do not hear the groundswell of opinion on this issue as we do at the Party. Modernizing Legislative Rules We were disappointed but not dismayed over a lack of transparency on committee chair votes. Frankly, the results would have likely been the same on who headed the committees. However, the principle of following the Constitution and transparency is very important to Republican membership. The platform (in existence and unchanged for many years) calls for “Increased Transparency, Efficiency, and Accountability.” Furthermore, we support our State Constitution and Viva Voce (see clause below)! We encourage a call to Rules Committee members to ensure the principles of transparency/ accountability are addressed in the next 10 days on a PERMANENT basis and adherence to the State Constitution is restored. This vote has nothing to do with the competency of the chair or partisanship. This vote has everything to do with transparency and following the Constitution. The fear is that if you are willing to violate one article of the Constitution, then you are willing to violate any part of the Constitution. A party of law and order needs to follow Constitutional law regardless of popularity. Any one member can call for a vote and that did not happen. A changing of the rules on a permanent basis would be an excellent win for the body and a reinforcement of the Constitution. Senator Erdman, Arch, Bostar, DeBoer, Hansen, and Ibach need to hear from you on the rules to pass out of committee. Furthermore, your Senators need to hear from you in support of the new rules (requiring voting transparency be restored) be adopted by the body. Click . Finally, Senator Erdman introduced a bill to create a bicameral legislature. Our platform (that has been in place for many years and unchanged) supports this move. “In order to balance rural, urban and suburban interests in our state legislature, we support the return to a bicameral legislature whereby the upper house has fewer members but larger territorial areas to include a more diverse set of interests in the legislative process.” The NEGOP supports this Constitutional amendment on platform grounds. Encourage your senator to support this amendment to balance the interests of all Nebraskans in our state. We know there are numerous bills covering many interests within the party. If you have questions, comments, or observations, you can email me at political@ne.gop. In the meantime please keep praying for our senators. The 108th Session can create significant and positive change. They need our support. Hearings Starting January 23 Committee hearings on newly introduced bills are scheduled to begin on Monday, January 23. Afternoon bill hearings will be held that week, with full day hearings scheduled for the weeks of both January 30 and February 7. Hearings will be live streamed via NET and can be accessed online by clicking | | | | PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTYThis email was sent by: Nebraska Republican Party1610 N Street, Lincoln, NE, 68508 | | | | | You've received this email because you are a subscriber of . name: Derrick Van Orden
subject: A quick note, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Orden for Congress
body:
| |
---
| | | | Peter,

Over the last few months I'm sure you've received plenty of political emails saying that you "failed", "didn't do enough", or "haven't responded". This isn't one of them.

I just wanted to say a quick thank you for all that you've done for me and my campaign. As I stand here in Washington, D.C., all I can think about is the _**tremendous**_ amount of support it took from people like you to get here.

_My team and I couldn 't have done it without you._

I hope that you'll continue to be a part of Team Van Orden as I begin my new role as Congressman of Wisconsin's 3rd District.

This journey is just beginning, and your support means the world to me.

_**If you 're able to chip in $25, $50, or even $100 today to help kickstart my new mission to restore conservative values in our nation's capital, it would be greatly appreciated.**_
---
| | [KICKSTART THE MISSION](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62170989:6ek63vGWN:m:1:3334294963:31BBE57260D9A6E23C87EDDD8502635F:r)
---

If you're not, your support means just as much, and I would appreciate it if you would _sign your name as an official member of the team._

---
| | [BECOME AN OFFICIAL MEMBER](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62170989:6ek63vGWN:m:1:3334294963:31BBE57260D9A6E23C87EDDD8502635F:r)
---

Thank you again for all that you've done,

Derrick

---
| | | | | _**A note from Derrick:**_

We're just getting started, Peter.

We flipped my seat **RED** and claimed back the House majority, but the fight isn't over.

As a Navy SEAL, I've never backed down from a fight, and I'm not about to start. We need to work harder than ever to bring America back to greatness, but it will only happen with help from GOP supporters like you.

If we have your support, we WILL succeed. **[So, Peter, will you chip in just a few bucks today so we can get America back on track?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62170990:6ek63vGWN:m:1:3334294963:31BBE57260D9A6E23C87EDDD8502635F:r "data-amp-placeholder-3-amp-end, will you chip in just a few bucks today so we can get America back on track? name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: The most personal email I’ve ever sent you
body:
This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the
[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zk7bh3rpvopegp39hojf38ff3v3gtkv6qv3akc8g_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1ge9oj4cth2bs)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zggk0dss3akuhg9220i54gf3ot8gt5urmkqnuag8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1ge9oj4cth2bs)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I've dealt with racism... _**I 've even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2ztjr5k9qr47tphu68d2v8fkr4j1h5d12gsp9v04o_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1ge9oj4cth2bs)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I 'm not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2ztq76kpca2708sucnlbuo911mj0cme0sf75tv4h0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1ge9oj4cth2bs)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zk0764c9vmefc6ju47v9tt0cvj9qqbcccubhanlg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1ge9oj4cth2bs)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zssh0oj0o6jiql67ljiejeeg2l7jhimearhe01dg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1ge9oj4cth2bs)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zs9ahjipgksgc8muvcso5rhpp0uj1obndhd6t2mg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1ge9oj4cth2bs)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT 's events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zkk3qi4ubkhappsbk9ot76p46j017mb02kn6lkro_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1ge9oj4cth2bs)

What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z5dlv3r30fa4tfog55s4gf5a0kbb51pah74v7suo_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1ge9oj4cth2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z19masg00lmc9mqlfech0elofn61j63hn6s4uvj0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1ge9oj4cth2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z02urucsufcdp21q7a7ngl2iace4g2tv7iv3e4g0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1ge9oj4cth2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zm5t75p95p8419uhnbnc8k09iev6d25dh5erc3g8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1ge9oj4cth2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zs5aebai1vano0ih72jhtraq0hbutl0akfetvi10_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1ge9oj4cth2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zfhhgm6am2iv2hkea0q4hskao1s7p8p5esgs31mg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1ge9oj4cth2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2znce9tllcklg52ngib3h6uoieai3th0laolailbo_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1ge9oj4cth2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2ztdher0r80njt684gs4lmsgbetka7bfushjabu9o_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1ge9oj4cth2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zp7dah3ntel1r3l4mlr84vae03ahsk5ktk1m9gfg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1ge9oj4cth2bs)

This is my last message to you before you close this email.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment.

My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause.

[_**Please consider making the most generous donation you can today by clicking here.**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zk52r0fstibklbcvq6c4m5fqn3k35vehku56n240_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1ge9oj4cth2bs)

Thank you, Friend.

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Deroy Murdock, [please use this preferences page](http://e.deroymurdock.com/prefs/9z2ziqo3gt25mhhlolom42ea42o4831lljnokfc1tq0).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zdrenqsm3sgecbuuffdsmhipfr8htdhjdeff3ps0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1ge9oj4cth238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

I am breaking the rules. It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... I 'm not doing that. You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country. So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss). When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing. Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for: School Choice: Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools. The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. Criminal Justice Reform: The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities. Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message. Entrepreneurship: I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire. BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. Teaching History: Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore. The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor. This is personal to me. I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today: This is my last message to you before you close this email. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment. My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause. Thank you, Friend. Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Deroy Murdock, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: 4Patriots
subject: The Food Crisis of 2023
body:
There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with food insecurity.
# The Food Crisis of 2023
We live in uncertain times. There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with food insecurity. As inflation and supply chain disruptions continue to push food costs higher and higher, families are feeling the weight of financial distress as they struggle to make ends meet. John Boyd Jr., a fourth-generation farmer, warns that food shortages are coming. "For so long, we've enjoyed lots of food in this country, so we've never ever faced a food shortage. The worst is yet to come." **Leading industry sources are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point".** As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore... Obviously, waiting on the government for a handout in a disaster just isn't an option. And we were completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zfj5321smnj9lf3ukjqhejvcpg0f1s74otraarmg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1ge9oj4cjh2bs). Currently the 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food **is designed to last for 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve.
* **Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food."** And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.
* **You get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan with no interest!**

And that's not all, because... [**You also get $318 worth of FREE gifts!**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z20hmpsb3akupg6ut87joa5128qrbjhdrqos0he8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1ge9oj4cjh2bs) **FREE Bonus #1:** because they are so popular and a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you _**2**_ of their popular 72-Hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through a short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of the top-rated items on our website. And you get... **FREE Bonus #2:** You'll get a **Victory Garden Survival Seed Vault** with thousands of non-GMO heirloom seeds inside, designed to stay fresh for years. You can harvest and replant them over and over again. **FREE Bonus #3:** You also get their **Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater.** With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. **FREE Bonus #4:** You'll also get an **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books, you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these digital books are valued at $20, but they're yours free as a thank you for your order. But that's not all because you also get... **FREE Bonus #5:** You also get their **Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide**. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids, and you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. **FREE Bonus #6:** You also get **Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee.** Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure Arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. **FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa.** Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done, because you also get... **FREE Bonus #8:** You also get **$25 OFF your next purchase.** This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan... best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... **FREE Bonus #9:** **You get FREE Shipping and Handling on your entire order!** It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you. [**Get Your 4Patriots Survival Food Kits Rushed To You Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpf3e8s7h2muhi1mj7tpr046h3cqnepph25dfjp8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1ge9oj4cjh2bs) Isn't that great? The best part is... You'll have the peace of mind and security that comes from having your very own survival food stockpile. On great-tasting, survival food protection without the sticker shock. **Look, this food tastes homemade.** It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z79q4u2375eg2uji621n59joctrvecj8ukbdv0cg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1ge9oj4cjh2bs) You need to get 'er done today. Why? Because if you don't [**take action**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zfmjadee0emq6htv4s97q4l9h0i5hk17fqej5rbo_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1ge9oj4cjh2bs) to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry, and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just [**imagine how much better you'll feel right away**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z95ccqre9g4murtloa1rh76cuvirdnodn2oqkqkg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1ge9oj4cjh2bs). When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit. **As it stands today, it's every man for himself.** In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. That's why I want you to have the same peace of mind that I do. [**Get Your 4Patriots Survival Food Kits Rushed To You Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zg634apj85rg6bmg960knomtdcl4om9nh8j3ov7o_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1ge9oj4cjh2bs) To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters **More Raving Reviews From Customers!** | | **Rory H.** I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things.
---|---
| **Billy H.** Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup.
---|---
| **Kevin S.** The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start.
---|---
| **Carol B.** I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings.
---|---
| **Ken K.** I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal.
---|---
| **Justin A.** My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great.
---|---
| **Gary M.** I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed.
---|---
| **John H.** We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when."
---|---
[**Get Your 4Patriots Survival Food Kits Rushed To You Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6f4v45drfttbeu2mounrfhvv4416v8bhnqqderg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1ge9oj4cjh2bs)

Real reviews from real customers. Sometimes customers receive a free product to test or as a thank you for submitting honest feedback. For more information see [Terms & Conditions](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zkiiiftbp8ukbvmkic0uuupqd20k2a53mr67kuao_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1ge9oj4cjh2bs).

name: 4Patriots
subject: The Food Crisis of 2023
body:
There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with food insecurity.
# The Food Crisis of 2023
We live in uncertain times. There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with food insecurity. As inflation and supply chain disruptions continue to push food costs higher and higher, families are feeling the weight of financial distress as they struggle to make ends meet. John Boyd Jr., a fourth-generation farmer, warns that food shortages are coming. "For so long, we've enjoyed lots of food in this country, so we've never ever faced a food shortage. The worst is yet to come." **Leading industry sources are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point".** As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore... Obviously, waiting on the government for a handout in a disaster just isn't an option. And we were completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zvatpmpmsk4uv40gols57j6sq6q8beqeb72nkkb8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1ge9oj4cth2bs). Currently the 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food **is designed to last for 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve.
* **Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food."** And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.
* **You get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan with no interest!**

And that's not all, because... [**You also get $318 worth of FREE gifts!**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2za7d32n655er68b07tbiu479nhr6hvdmte2pmeag_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1ge9oj4cth2bs) **FREE Bonus #1:** because they are so popular and a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you _**2**_ of their popular 72-Hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through a short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of the top-rated items on our website. And you get... **FREE Bonus #2:** You'll get a **Victory Garden Survival Seed Vault** with thousands of non-GMO heirloom seeds inside, designed to stay fresh for years. You can harvest and replant them over and over again. **FREE Bonus #3:** You also get their **Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater.** With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. **FREE Bonus #4:** You'll also get an **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books, you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these digital books are valued at $20, but they're yours free as a thank you for your order. But that's not all because you also get... **FREE Bonus #5:** You also get their **Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide**. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids, and you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. **FREE Bonus #6:** You also get **Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee.** Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure Arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. **FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa.** Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done, because you also get... **FREE Bonus #8:** You also get **$25 OFF your next purchase.** This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan... best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... **FREE Bonus #9:** **You get FREE Shipping and Handling on your entire order!** It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you. [**Get Your 4Patriots Survival Food Kits Rushed To You Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zmvs72qaj93ppb25sktiu5ve2fs37krrk2fk9nho_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1ge9oj4cth2bs) Isn't that great? The best part is... You'll have the peace of mind and security that comes from having your very own survival food stockpile. On great-tasting, survival food protection without the sticker shock. **Look, this food tastes homemade.** It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zqkfuothh8570catgdkcs1702ge0v3okmofq1tog_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1ge9oj4cth2bs) You need to get 'er done today. Why? Because if you don't [**take action**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z17mc9d3tho1aqnslmefse178ckoe4ldgdvpv15o_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1ge9oj4cth2bs) to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry, and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just [**imagine how much better you'll feel right away**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z8bqimcsh6nt976hv7091k5jhspusegm4f5d4fkg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1ge9oj4cth2bs). When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit. **As it stands today, it's every man for himself.** In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. That's why I want you to have the same peace of mind that I do. [**Get Your 4Patriots Survival Food Kits Rushed To You Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zjvjovjv1r7l5gnpngpvprooa1jml1tfrpkk4ro0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1ge9oj4cth2bs) To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters **More Raving Reviews From Customers!** | | **Rory H.** I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things.
---|---
| **Billy H.** Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup.
---|---
| **Kevin S.** The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start.
---|---
| **Carol B.** I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings.
---|---
| **Ken K.** I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal.
---|---
| **Justin A.** My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great.
---|---
| **Gary M.** I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed.
---|---
| **John H.** We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when."
---|---

I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal. ---|--- | Justin A. My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great. ---|--- | Gary M. I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed. ---|--- | John H. We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. name: 4Patriots
subject: The Food Crisis of 2023
body:
There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with food insecurity.
# The Food Crisis of 2023
We live in uncertain times. There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with food insecurity. As inflation and supply chain disruptions continue to push food costs higher and higher, families are feeling the weight of financial distress as they struggle to make ends meet. John Boyd Jr., a fourth-generation farmer, warns that food shortages are coming. "For so long, we've enjoyed lots of food in this country, so we've never ever faced a food shortage. The worst is yet to come." **Leading industry sources are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point".** As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore... Obviously, waiting on the government for a handout in a disaster just isn't an option. And we were completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z44gv6hp75ueamauj4l728v6ppp2fbni2tev9u2o_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1ge9oj4c3h2bs). Currently the 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food **is designed to last for 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve.
* **Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food."** And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.
* **You get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan with no interest!**

And that's not all, because... [**You also get $318 worth of FREE gifts!**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhsk0ike3rg4i4f8hdgugk2q4tuv20skv7qt9c98_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1ge9oj4c3h2bs) **FREE Bonus #1:** because they are so popular and a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you _**2**_ of their popular 72-Hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through a short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of the top-rated items on our website. And you get... **FREE Bonus #2:** You'll get a **Victory Garden Survival Seed Vault** with thousands of non-GMO heirloom seeds inside, designed to stay fresh for years. You can harvest and replant them over and over again. **FREE Bonus #3:** You also get their **Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater.** With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. **FREE Bonus #4:** You'll also get an **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books, you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these digital books are valued at $20, but they're yours free as a thank you for your order. But that's not all because you also get... **FREE Bonus #5:** You also get their **Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide**. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids, and you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. **FREE Bonus #6:** You also get **Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee.** Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure Arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. **FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa.** Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done, because you also get... **FREE Bonus #8:** You also get **$25 OFF your next purchase.** This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan... best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... **FREE Bonus #9:** **You get FREE Shipping and Handling on your entire order!** It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you. [**Get Your 4Patriots Survival Food Kits Rushed To You Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zj41nv6nlg8nvgr1qc1eri7urd9igct2uo704qi0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1ge9oj4c3h2bs) Isn't that great? The best part is... You'll have the peace of mind and security that comes from having your very own survival food stockpile. On great-tasting, survival food protection without the sticker shock. **Look, this food tastes homemade.** It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z025pjuad05c5r501vnilo4fhks4m7ar4eetntqg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1ge9oj4c3h2bs) You need to get 'er done today. Why? Because if you don't [**take action**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zktrks3ifg6ao0qsfelaaj3v8580rasb01pa57d8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1ge9oj4c3h2bs) to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry, and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just [**imagine how much better you'll feel right away**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zc5p4tf74apbjttt6gdh7h0mrv9e871o5uktmjq0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1ge9oj4c3h2bs). When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit. **As it stands today, it's every man for himself.** In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. That's why I want you to have the same peace of mind that I do. [**Get Your 4Patriots Survival Food Kits Rushed To You Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zefegjm8fdooq09ci809u5j2j9bc4osklpvf8ma0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1ge9oj4c3h2bs) To your survival,

Frank Bates

name: Connor Boyack
subject: Get the truth about these 40 political myths
body:
There’s this notion nowadays that just because an idea is popular, it must be true.

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z79dq121h6gpv8t7krl3bndb0vrudagdfrl52fjg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1ie8o32c1h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, There's this notion nowadays that just because an idea is popular, it must be true.

It's a narrative that you'll often see pushed by a dysfunctional media or toxic culture. And as long as the idea is considered "correct" by the "right" people like TV talking heads, celebrities, or the masses on social media, the general public believes it.

That's why the Libertas Institute published this eBook in our Tuttle Twins series: [_The Tuttle Rebuttals: 40 Responses to Popular Political and Economic Myths._](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z97hm619lcr2fhv9ninr7t6mhdh8caq7772soq88_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1ie8o32c1h2bs)
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdlq34p6173uohaf55te8ja8k15n6vovbbs9t7sg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1ie8o32c1h2bs)
---
| | And today, we want to send a copy to your inbox for FREE.

Inside this important eBook, you'll get a clear analysis of some of the biggest political and economic myths infecting our world today like:
* Overpopulation is destroying the world
* Global climate change can be reversed by law
* Capitalism creates winners and losers
* Socialism helps the poor

You can get your free copy using this secure link:

[https://act.libertas.org/tt-the-tuttle-rebuttals](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1qmm2s5cib2bci4hq355skkmbriaufkqg9o2p60_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1ie8o32c1h2bs)

I'd also love for you to share this book with at least 5 people you know--especially any children in your family. My hope is that they will enjoy the same benefits you do when you read this book. And then, we can crush these myths once and for all.

Please use this link to get instant access to your free copy of _[The Tuttle Rebuttals: 40 Responses to Popular Political and Economic Myths](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9qhqftt3bf9r7htv5kfq63575j3gvoh7ni01dko_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1ie8o32c1h2bs)_ today!
Thank you,

Connor Boyack
Author, Tuttle Twins
Founder, Libertas Institute

name: Kari Lake
subject: MAKE YOUR IMPACT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Save Arizona Fund Inc
body:
| [ ](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c90382%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CDEs4umP%2bNXf04rdPLlX0w&sysid=1)

---
Hey -- it’s Kari Lake.

There is no explanation for Election Day other than intentional sabotage.

body:

| | | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zd3pc8ql9ess5ma6hluinb9r6mmj769m6bmv7umg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1ge9oj4c3h2bs) Dear Fellow American, [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zht93q8ia5ld40sdbgeqdbqkd28vadlp2kqffmh0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1ge9oj4c3h2bs) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9se2i88rvu63foila5hp8bu4gpn87lj0m9libj0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1ge9oj4c3h2bs) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844

### _Friday, January 6, 2023_
Today on The Doug Collins Podcast, I take a look at the first week of the year. From Chaos on Capital Hill, to taking a stand for what is right, I take a blunt look at this week and tell you what it could mean for you for the rest of the year. ### _Wednesday, January 4, 2023_
Today on The Doug Collins Podcast, I look at the chaos that was the US House of Representatives yesterday. We still do not have members sworn in and the work of the House is yet to begin. Why? Because the Republicans cant come together to elect a Speaker. If this is where we are starting this could be a long 2 years. ### _Monday, January 2, 2023_
Today on The Doug Collins Podcast, I am joined by Aaron Withe, The CEO of Freedom Foundation to discuss the latest out of the teacher union conventions.
