name: 4Patriots
subject: The Food Crisis of 2023
body:
We live in uncertain times. There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with food insecurity. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7536%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=VuIxu4bDxhT9YljEpgKlXw&sysid=1)
# The Food Crisis of 2023
We live in uncertain times. There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with food insecurity. As inflation and supply chain disruptions continue to push food costs higher and higher, families are feeling the weight of financial distress as they struggle to make ends meet. John Boyd Jr., a fourth-generation farmer, warns that food shortages are coming. "For so long, we've enjoyed lots of food in this country, so we've never ever faced a food shortage. The worst is yet to come." **Leading industry sources are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point".** As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore... Obviously, waiting on the government for a handout in a disaster just isn't an option. And we were completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78536%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=f9ID7Ac6yXi%2bQMZdB%2fB%2fBQ&sysid=1). Currently the 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food **is designed to last for 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve.
* **Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food."** And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.
* **You get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan with no interest!**

And that's not all, because... [**You also get $318 worth of FREE gifts!**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78537%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KDDZm%2bdpR4LqCZoK%2bSsa3g&sysid=1) **FREE Bonus #1:** because they are so popular and a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you _**2**_ of their popular 72-Hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through a short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of the top-rated items on our website. And you get... **FREE Bonus #2:** You'll get a **Victory Garden Survival Seed Vault** with thousands of non-GMO heirloom seeds inside, designed to stay fresh for years. You can harvest and replant them over and over again. **FREE Bonus #3:** You also get their **Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater.** With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. **FREE Bonus #4:** You'll also get an **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books, you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these digital books are valued at $20, but they're yours free as a thank you for your order. But that's not all because you also get... **FREE Bonus #5:** You also get their **Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide**. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids, and you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. **FREE Bonus #6:** You also get **Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee.** Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure Arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. **FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa.** Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done, because you also get... **FREE Bonus #8:** You also get **$25 OFF your next purchase.** This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan... best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... **FREE Bonus #9:** **You get FREE Shipping and Handling on your entire order!** It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you. [**Get Your 4Patriots Survival Food Kits Rushed To You Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78538%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HTuaUME9EwgTKK8PvH2b3Q&sysid=1) Isn't that great? The best part is... You'll have the peace of mind and security that comes from having your very own survival food stockpile. On great-tasting, survival food protection without the sticker shock. **Look, this food tastes homemade.** It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78539%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fzWoshvLsbdGXIXscTW1nw&sysid=1) You need to get 'er done today. Why? Because if you don't [**take action**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78530%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VwZTw9bf9s9F%2bEonAH5M4w&sysid=1) to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry, and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just [**imagine how much better you'll feel right away**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78531%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=e1I%2bveL9sFBpHUTRdI5j9Q&sysid=1). When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit. **As it stands today, it's every man for himself.** In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. That's why I want you to have the same peace of mind that I do. [**Get Your 4Patriots Survival Food Kits Rushed To You Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78538%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HTuaUME9EwgTKK8PvH2b3Q&sysid=1) To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters **More Raving Reviews From Customers!** | | **Rory H.** I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things.
---|---
| **Billy H.** Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup.
---|---
| **Kevin S.** The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start.
---|---
| **Carol B.** I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings.
---|---
| **Ken K.** I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal.
---|---
| **Justin A.** My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great.
---|---
| **Gary M.** I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. body:
We live in uncertain times. There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with fo
# The Food Crisis of 2023
We live in uncertain times. There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with food insecurity. As inflation and supply chain disruptions continue to push food costs higher and higher, families are feeling the weight of financial distress as they struggle to make ends meet. John Boyd Jr., a fourth-generation farmer, warns that food shortages are coming. "For so long, we've enjoyed lots of food in this country, so we've never ever faced a food shortage. The worst is yet to come." **Leading industry sources are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point".** As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore... Obviously, waiting on the government for a handout in a disaster just isn't an option. And we were completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvbo5hqbmss4hla0m5sfa4ng9slf5vl3jtkr7ji8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1ie2or2c5h2bs). Currently the 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food **is designed to last for 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve.
* **Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food."** And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.
* **You get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan with no interest!**

And that's not all, because... [**You also get $318 worth of FREE gifts!**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zne4h4mpo12t4c4v84gf6afavbq8006frv8k5u78_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1ie2or2c5h2bs) **FREE Bonus #1:** because they are so popular and a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you _**2**_ of their popular 72-Hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through a short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of the top-rated items on our website. And you get... **FREE Bonus #2:** You'll get a **Victory Garden Survival Seed Vault** with thousands of non-GMO heirloom seeds inside, designed to stay fresh for years. You can harvest and replant them over and over again. **FREE Bonus #3:** You also get their **Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater.** With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. **FREE Bonus #4:** You'll also get an **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books, you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these digital books are valued at $20, but they're yours free as a thank you for your order. But that's not all because you also get... **FREE Bonus #5:** You also get their **Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide**. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids, and you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. **FREE Bonus #6:** You also get **Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee.** Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure Arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. **FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa.** Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done, because you also get... **FREE Bonus #8:** You also get **$25 OFF your next purchase.** This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan... best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... **FREE Bonus #9:** **You get FREE Shipping and Handling on your entire order!** It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: It's time to boycott Disney
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
| | Fellow American, Across the nation, Real Americans are fed up with Disney aiming their radical, "not-so-secret gay agenda" squarely at our kids. **Producers within the company have publicly admitted their desire to expose children to radical gender theory concepts as early as possible. The company itself has advocated for the _grooming of children_ in public elementary school classrooms!**
---
| [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-Y0Ffopoe5fzQ)
---
| | How much longer will we continue giving our business to this massive "woke" corporation while it actively works to rob children of their innocence, indoctrinate them in radical gender ideology, alienate them from biblical truth, and undermine the American family? **Disney has run out of time. I'm boycotting Disney -- and I want _YOU_ to join me and THOUSANDS of grassroots patriots.**
---
[**Please take a moment to sign the National Boycott Disney Petition right now, and urge all of your concerned friends and family members to do the same.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._fdIjlyd_7i5A)
---
[**Boycott Disney**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-R22zMATp9g)
---
It's no secret that the radical Left has its sights set on America's children. **Radical Leftist activists are hard at work in America's largest corporations, in classrooms across the country, and in the media our children consume -- trying to groom a generation of American children and indoctrinate them into their Woke beliefs.** And grooming isn't just a pastime for them; it's central to their strategy, and they're ready to fight for it. As a matter of fact, as TPUSA contributor Drew Hernandez recently documented at the gates of Disneyland, the Leftists will _VICIOUSLY_ attack parents and concerned Americans who dare defend their right to protect children from harmful Left-wing ideology. That's why it is CRITICAL that Real Americans like you and me fight back by boycotting the companies who are trying to sexualize and indoctrinate our children! TPUSA Faith is on the front lines in the fight against these destructive forces -- chief among them Disney -- and we need you in the fight as well! [**Please join the growing movement of faithful patriots who refuse to bow to radical ideology and Boycott Disney.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-rQ)
---
[**Boycott Disney**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
Make no mistake, Fellow American -- Disney is actively working to break the generational cycle of liberty that has kept America free. _They're undermining not only the innocence of precious children, but the very fabric of American society._ We **_CANNOT_** let them continue unopposed! [**_Together, we can show Disney and their far-Left corporate allies that we refuse to relinquish our children to their Woke Agenda!_**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.--jlcYbd1RbfLbE_6X9w) No other group in America has impacted as many young people as Turning Point USA. Our 3,000+ student chapters and 500,000+ student activists are a testament to our influence among America's youth. But Disney has spent nearly a century infiltrating the minds of children, and it's going to take every single one of us to unwind that insidious work -- and it all starts with this nationwide boycott of their Woke products. **Your support in this fight will provide the pressure needed to show that Real Americans are willing to take a stand for our children, for our values, and for the future of our nation! ** [**Join thousands of parents who have decided that they will no longer submit to efforts to groom their children under their very noses.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._eQ)
---
[**Boycott Disney**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
Disney has gone too far, and has become Too woke. It's time they realized that if they go woke, then they go broke! Thank you for your support -- **[and please, add your name to this petition now.](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)**
---
For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEOTurning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
P.O. name: American Briefing
subject: Restoring hope in our country
body:
You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities, and its increasing influence in K-12 educatio
This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z1ojtu9rscud41hhd87o4qrpenir938dd3mkmu6g_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1ie6ob2cph2bs) Fellow American, [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z6eqri68bfq0pcc79fn5m4j6pg8tdeh31v8qckro_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1ie6ob2cph2bs) You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities, and its increasing influence in K-12 education. But we must not lose hope. Instead, we must fight back with the truth. Hillsdale College has been engaging the Left on the battlefield of education from the beginning. That’s why we’ve turned our course, [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zcsoihqcllvl9cb31biq9fj9s4etj5e3evm086h0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1ie6ob2cph2bs) into a DVD set, and I’d like you to have a copy. Taught by historian Wilfred McClay and based on his recently published history of America, **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** presents a full, unbiased account of America’s past. Hillsdale’s goal in producing this course is to **restore the kind of intelligent patriotism—especially among our young people—that is essential to preserving free government.** **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** is a powerful counterweight to _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project,” which is injecting the idea that America is an essentially unjust nation into the curricula of America’s K-12 schools. Please consider getting [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z737be9gru1kg00ll7urip3cgki324i9smga1hd8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1ie6ob2cph2bs) as a DVD set for your home library or to give as a gift. Presenting real American history is the surest means of preserving liberty. Quantities are limited, so reserve your copy today. [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z0a4a4al77ggggchj0kkhjm4q3j9ptbseka09b9g_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c1ie6ob2cph2bs) Thank you for your partnership with Hillsdale College and your support of its mission on behalf of liberty. Sincerely, Bill Gray Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

Katie Hobbs thought she was such a great cheater that there was no chance she’d ever get caught.

She was wrong. In a short, two-day trial, my team uncovered a treasure trove of evidence proving that the November election was blatantly influenced and disenfranchised Republican voters to help Katie Hobbs win.

Every day that we keep fighting the morally corrupt and unAmerican shadow cabal pulling the strings in Arizona are shaking in their boots.

[_**Peter, I was just officially sworn in as House Democratic Leader, after 14 failed, dysfunctional attempts by Republicans to convene our Congress. Now, I’m asking you to help me lead Democrats in a historic fundraising day – 1,000 gifts in my first 24 hours – to show we stand ready to fight extreme MAGA Republicans and win back the House Majority for Democrats. I can’t tell you how much it would mean to see your donation >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57011870/386611672/1662333042?refcode=20230107_em_fr_b1_jeffries_30_cl_v2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGE5OGY4Zi05MzhlLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=02cqJB1BBcwo7CGGK22n5TSRhVRPThELF1amC-mNTAQ=)

name: Brandon Tatum
subject: BLM vs Blexit
body:
I am a Black man, and I’m telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of A
[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z7s8mucn9k0m0paduebjcna8p1uvrf553e4c5k6g_rp22sh2s8i66pr6chg60o35cjh2bs)

Friend,

**I am a Black man, and I 'm telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America - _Black Lives Matter_.**

Now, I know what you're thinking... _What about the KKK, or what about neo-nazis?_

I ask, "what about them is influential?!"

This is 2022. Does the KKK have institutional power like BLM does? Is the KKK receiving millions of dollars from corporations and Hollywood celebrities?

No. They aren't, but BLM is.

BLM claims to speak for Black communities. But all I ever hear from BLM is how much they hate America. They only focus on victimhood to divide us as the greatest nation on Earth. BLM cries out for action, but the only action they do is burn down Black neighborhoods and cozy up to corporations.

I saw the hypocrisy long ago. **That 's why I started the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens. **

**BLEXIT** is a non-profit bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

_Our message to America 's black and minority communities is that you are NOT a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture_.

I believe God has put me on this mission to reach Black communities. I'll tell you the full story of how I cofounded BLEXIT with Candace, but first, I must ask for your immediate support.

[_**Can you please support BLEXIT by sending a gift of $5, $10, $20.22, $100, or any amount you can afford today? Click here to donate >>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zokuuta52rakqpvbcr630euimv1t53kch9gv4lto_rp22sh2s8i66pr6chg60o35cjh2bs)

**How I Started BLEXIT**

I was an All-American high school football player in Fort Worth, Texas. I accepted a full athletic scholarship from the University of Arizona in 2005. I played at Arizona for five years and entered the NFL Draft in 2010; however, God had other plans.

With my entire family around, I was not drafted. I was so angry. I ripped my shirt off. But, God had other plans for me.

This led me to join the Tucson police force, and it changed my life forever.

I learned what it meant to put my life on the line to save others. I woke up every morning to thank Jesus that I got to live another day to serve. This experience taught me a lot, but it was foundational to learning about the lies of BLM.

Learning that BLM is lying to Black communities and teaching them to hate the police forever changed my opinion on the "Black Lives Matter" organization. But more importantly, I learned not to be a victim. Not getting drafted into the NFL taught me life lessons I wouldn't have learned otherwise. I learned to serve others.

Now, I'm giving back to the Black community to make sure they don't become bought into this toxic victimhood mentality that BLM pushes.

[_**Can you help me reach Black neighborhoods with a message of individualism, freedom, and entrepreneurship? Click here to donate any amount >>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4sof77m8pcijuqfpq080qmjsav9upcsgdgc3890_rp22sh2s8i66pr6chg60o35cjh2bs)

BLM incites lawlessness. BLEXIT stands for the rule of law.

BLM destroys communities. BLEXIT empowers them.

BLM only sees the color of your skin. BLEXIT sees character.

BLM wants to disrupt families. BLEXT values the nuclear family.

_Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with 42 grassroots chapter programs in 42 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters._

**Here 's how you can help:**

_I am looking to raise $83,000 online to support BLEXIT during this critical year. We must expand our chapters, build new leaders, and reach people within Black communities_.

This is a long game we are playing. If this were a football game, we would only be in the 1st quarter.

BLM thinks they speak for Black communities, but we are taking over quickly and providing real opportunities for our members.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztob3aordc8kc2lbda8354522cctp0ju28m9a188_rp22sh2s8i66pr6chg60o35cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zck840oen5ivdpojg2i4csi6c2gfe5netbmm3qig_rp22sh2s8i66pr6chg60o35cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zc7h4ienj1i5so84hc9dgoi8hrksa4nfs3ifnj1g_rp22sh2s8i66pr6chg60o35cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zka1rb1bocqtcjpkdsun5vpoa8fh8qrco09f684g_rp22sh2s8i66pr6chg60o35cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zgjugdqnbrib01fa08ftmp8dlrdqck9c7df0qn2o_rp22sh2s8i66pr6chg60o35cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zfh6g6uat8l74lvrsrnhnsrcile4diuqor20m8l0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6chg60o35cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zj28i4lh0a1ood2p111104qnc2hoc55loojo3m4g_rp22sh2s8i66pr6chg60o35cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3mno83sahobr868h86f7jua354thgb1drlruteg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6chg60o35cjh2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zlbcfrq56u0htk8qbpkb1qurrglidgei60vfi0co_rp22sh2s8i66pr6chg60o35cjh2bs)

**HOW BLEXIT Works**

**Step One:** We enter communities no one else dares to go into - Detroit, Baltimore, New Orleans, Houston, etc. We host events and set up chapters of volunteers who build a support network and help get our message of individualism and empowerment to Black neighborhoods.

**Step Two:** We send the best volunteers and chapter members to our Leadership Academy.

We build leaders from the ground up. In fact, our staff is full of stories of activists we hired from the Leadership Academy. They started as a chapter member and now work for us full time.

Other members graduate from the Leadership Academy, and then they go back into their communities to support others or start their own businesses.

As you can see, we are BUILDING neighborhoods, NOT destroying them.

**Step Three:** Our educational content, both online and in-person, is teaching Black communities ideas they will never hear in the mainstream media.

BLEXIT is teaching about individualism, pro-life, school choice, teaching REAL history (not Critical Race Theory), and creating patriotism among Black families.

**Step Four:** We host large events with hundreds, sometimes thousands of attendees. Our events bring music, live entertainment, and education to Black communities.

What I really want to emphasize is this - BLEXIT is a "DO" tank! We are out there meeting people in neighborhoods.

Friend, this is deeply personal for me as a Black man.

We have to save our communities. We must save our country from the toxic and divisive organizations like BLM that are tearing down our businesses and livelihoods.

**So, please, I implore you to send any amount you generously can. We are a 501(c)(3) organization, and your support is tax-deductible. **

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zgdr00roh4jic10podfs2ch8i4v0npsvhe9ta6u0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6chg60o35cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zpguvsimfstev7qoe1te7d526ak0t0nkc00e9u08_rp22sh2s8i66pr6chg60o35cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zmr8eslkg7heer2s89191t6r0gue9bvun2crvij0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6chg60o35cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2znm1tgml9k4l4e94okcfklt76oc74ne79relojog_rp22sh2s8i66pr6chg60o35cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zjj33t7qmtegvve7n578o0vkeoe417ai2vahlqug_rp22sh2s8i66pr6chg60o35cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z29q7sdootdnjs32mep4fm83rv97a50jmmk370o0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6chg60o35cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6tmck3s44s4qldnbfjuro091pfrgeuds6l72th0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6chg60o35cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6nnhoonucm7si4ebn4ikrpmb4n2ck3u48dh34i8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6chg60o35cjh2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4mi9adakl7ivgsf6fnl2gs7agq0mq6gh5n50ncg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6chg60o35cjh2bs)

People ask me, "What does BLEXIT mean?"

It is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us.

_" If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim, you become your own oppressor." \- Candace Owens_

We believe in Faith, Freedom, and Family. With those three principles intact, you can find prosperity no matter how your life may have started. And I believe that is what will save us all in the end.

Thank you,

Brandon Tatum
Co-Founder
BLEXIT Foundation

body:
A TOTAL MESS. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7786%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=9Vh8so%2fz0M%2b6pvYR5dMRpg&sysid=1)
A TOTAL MESS.

| [ ](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c90304%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DGaT4BTBQE4YFC%2bNyQsnxw&sysid=1)

---
Katie Hobbs thought she was such a great cheater that there was no chance she’d ever get caught.

She was wrong. In a short, two-day trial, my team uncovered a treasure trove of evidence proving that the November election was blatantly influenced and disenfranchised Republican voters to help Katie Hobbs win.

Every day that we keep fighting the morally corrupt and unAmerican shadow cabal pulling the strings in Arizona are shaking in their boots.

Katie Hobbs thought she was such a great cheater that there was no chance she’d ever get caught.

She was wrong. In a short, two-day trial, my team uncovered a treasure trove of evidence proving that the November election was blatantly influenced and disenfranchised Republican voters to help Katie Hobbs win.

Every day that we keep fighting the morally corrupt and unAmerican shadow cabal pulling the strings in Arizona are shaking in their boots.

**[Time is on our side, but only if we continue getting the support we need.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c90397%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=a0XUn7K0fVlYFd5bhjbLFA&sysid=1)**

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: The most personal email I’ve ever sent you
body:
But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zn249t48h8jf346bh1pfhvpav9lg3hlnbk6fkof0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6chg60o36cdh2bs)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America’s black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation’s mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zauuonevq2e6a4grnaf39mnsj1tbm5vo8ldvpep0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6chg60o36cdh2bs)

**_Now I’ll share my story_ ... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how “helpless” I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We’re taught to believe we’re victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I’ve dealt with racism... _**I’ve even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8g60iascb5fnto6j9u3dmhbfn7vm60g9dqrus0o_rp22sh2s8i66pr6chg60o36cdh2bs)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I’m not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don’t want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a “think tank”, but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting “DO-tank”. We’re doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation’s values, what we’re doing to reach Black communities, and what we’re fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly “fighting for minorities” are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT’s efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zq2e5527ptqrrtf5jo2rrttdcqe5cdg0vo9cmtlo_rp22sh2s8i66pr6chg60o36cdh2bs)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zuougskso3rbiq4frksbgi7bkfoe3aaje037govg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6chg60o36cdh2bs)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we’re actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9n273gd42dth7lrhd9t7elm7uru6efrns33ons8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6chg60o36cdh2bs)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbcsh7q07t1au2st1ieue1c8cugc1pvc3d70edv8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6chg60o36cdh2bs)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we’ve allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We’re hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We’re not just preaching to the choir, and these aren’t boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT’s events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6orkr7d50m16gl7o1uip5oguc3ok8ue8j3154co_rp22sh2s8i66pr6chg60o36cdh2bs)

What does “BLEXIT” mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I’ve copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zuitqdvndtlfrovufg39tvabh7tp5e7l6hmo03uo_rp22sh2s8i66pr6chg60o36cdh2bs)

clean_body: But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the Friend, This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation. For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop. In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America’s black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. Now I’ll share my story ... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities. Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how “helpless” I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking. We’re taught to believe we’re victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals. This is WRONG. I’ve dealt with racism... I’ve even received death threats. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable. But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up. I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. I am breaking the rules. It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... I’m not doing that. You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country. So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don’t want to miss). When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a “think tank”, but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting “DO-tank”. We’re doing things no other organization in the country is doing. Here are the BLEXIT Foundation’s values, what we’re doing to reach Black communities, and what we’re fighting for: School Choice: Often, the people allegedly “fighting for minorities” are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools. The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. Criminal Justice Reform: The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities. Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message. Entrepreneurship: I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire. BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we’re actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. Teaching History: Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we’ve allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore. The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We’re hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We’re not just preaching to the choir, and these aren’t boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. What does “BLEXIT” mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor. This is personal to me. I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I’ve copied below to donate today: This is my last message to you before you close this email. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment. My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause. Thank you, Friend. Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for GOP Presidential, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

| | |

**[Peter, I was just officially sworn in as House Democratic Leader. Now, I’m asking you to help me lead Democrats in a historic fundraising day – 1,000 gifts in my first 24 hours – to show we stand ready to fight extreme MAGA Republicans and win back the House Majority for Democrats. Will you split a gift between me and Letitia James? I can’t tell you how much it would mean to see your donation>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57016366/386627580/-381550365?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk966-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZGEzMGVkYi05OThlLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LAbNtiQeAvNbvciZvW4qiun7_fE24Q2aZEZCPqJUAo0=)**
**Peter, as the new Democratic Leader, I want to take this moment to share what I stand for and earn your support: **

I was raised by working-class parents.

I’m a product of New York City’s public schools and grew up in a predominantly African-American neighborhood in Brooklyn.

**Now, I’m leading House Democrats forward as we fight for opportunity in every single zip code and an economy that works for everyone. We’re not wasting a single second getting to work. **

Which is why I'm asking for a historic surge of support – 1,000 Democratic gifts in my first 24 hours as Leader – to lay the groundwork for Democrats to reclaim the House and continue to get big things done for the American people. Can I count on you to split a gift between me and Letitia James?

Peter, I will always fight for what’s right, and I don’t care if it makes me a target of extreme MAGA Republicans.

I served as a Trump impeachment manager – _even though I knew Republicans would smear me for it._

I helped House Democrats pass the first meaningful gun safety legislation in 30 years – _even though it made us a target of the corporate gun manufacturers._

I stood with our caucus to call out corporate price-gouging – _even though we knew that special interest groups would fight back._

I know House Democrats will continue to find common ground when possible, fight extremism when necessary and always put People over Politics.

**And I know we can win back the House – the right way – but I need your help to act fast.**

Now that MAGA extremists have thrown the Republican Party into disarray, this is our best shot to show just how strong Democrats are.

**[So I’m humbly asking 1,000 Democrats to chip in during my first 24 hours as Leader and prove that we will spare no expense to reclaim our House Majority>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57016375/386627589/-381550365?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk966-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZGEzMGVkYi05OThlLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LAbNtiQeAvNbvciZvW4qiun7_fE24Q2aZEZCPqJUAo0=)**

Keep the faith,
Hakeem

name: Derek Kilmer
subject: Making the government work better and saving taxpayers’ money. >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
We can't afford to fall behind on our final fundraising goal of 2022, Peter.

I have some exciting news to share with you, Peter!

**The bipartisan Improving Government for America 's Taxpayers Act that I introduced became law as part of the National Defense Authorization Act in December.**

This bipartisan legislation will help Congress achieve significant taxpayer savings via oversight, legislation, and appropriations. It will also help hold federal agencies accountable and potentially save billions of dollars annually.

**_Here 's the bottom line:_ Saving taxpayers' money and ensuring that our government is serving the people is something that everyone - Democrats and Republicans - can get behind.** One of my main goals in Congress has always been ensuring that the government is working for you as effectively - and efficiently - as possible. And this new law is about doing just that, by making government work better and saving taxpayer money.

I am proud of this bipartisan effort to streamline the process of improving government accountability for Americans. And I'm ready to get back to work for the people in the 118th Congress.

As always, it's an honor to represent you.

- Derek

**Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.**

I have some troubling news I just heard Peter,

Biden and Schumer aren't letting Republicans off easy. Our victory in the House has only **SUPERCHARGED** the radical Left's resolve for absolute power everywhere in the DC Swamp.

And as of right now, America-First resources are depleted.

This is retired Navy SEAL and recently elected Congressman Ryan Zinke. Now that Republicans control the majority in the House we have a huge target on our backs. Biden and Schumer are working around the clock to ensure we are always one step behind with fundraising.

Bad news: we've officially lost the lead.

I'm reaching out with just a humble ask: We've sacrificed so much to get to this position but we're not to the finish line yet. **[Before we're crushed, could you spare just a handful of dollars to help the cause?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62170998:6hpYavGGN:m:1:3334294963:3DE5D6781B16621599DF4767D1DB3D59:r "Before

Ryan Zinke is a fifth generation Montanan who has dedicated his life to serving our great nation. Ryan is a decorated U.S. Navy SEAL officer who retired after 23 years of military service. After the military, Ryan served two terms as a State Senator, was twice elected as Montana's Congressman, and served two years as U.S. Secretary of the Interior under President Trump. Now after a couple quiet years spent with his family, he is serving again in Congress to help save America from threats we face both foreign and domestic.

subject: The Food Crisis of 2023
body:
There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with food insecurity.
# The Food Crisis of 2023
We live in uncertain times. There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with food insecurity. As inflation and supply chain disruptions continue to push food costs higher and higher, families are feeling the weight of financial distress as they struggle to make ends meet. John Boyd Jr., a fourth-generation farmer, warns that food shortages are coming. "For so long, we've enjoyed lots of food in this country, so we've never ever faced a food shortage. The worst is yet to come." **Leading industry sources are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point".** As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore... Obviously, waiting on the government for a handout in a disaster just isn't an option. And we were completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2ztn0n9v61t3gm6bn8uet9j3avq4vnmka0mfc6f58_rp22sh2s8i66pr6chg6cor4cjh2bs). Currently the 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food **is designed to last for 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve.
* **Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food."** And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.
* **You get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan with no interest!**

And that's not all, because... [**You also get $318 worth of FREE gifts!**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zuaso40d6peeej9kdafm0a3j3bbgqu1nhpjpcb4g_rp22sh2s8i66pr6chg6cor4cjh2bs) **FREE Bonus #1:** because they are so popular and a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you _**2**_ of their popular 72-Hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through a short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of the top-rated items on our website. And you get... **FREE Bonus #2:** You'll get a **Victory Garden Survival Seed Vault** with thousands of non-GMO heirloom seeds inside, designed to stay fresh for years. You can harvest and replant them over and over again. **FREE Bonus #3:** You also get their **Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater.** With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. **FREE Bonus #4:** You'll also get an **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books, you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these digital books are valued at $20, but they're yours free as a thank you for your order. But that's not all because you also get... **FREE Bonus #5:** You also get their **Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide**. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids, and you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. **FREE Bonus #6:** You also get **Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee.** Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure Arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. **FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa.** Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done, because you also get... **FREE Bonus #8:** You also get **$25 OFF your next purchase.** This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan... best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... **FREE Bonus #9:** **You get FREE Shipping and Handling on your entire order!** It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you. [**Get Your 4Patriots Survival Food Kits Rushed To You Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zg2ij4ptjlmbas384oor26nk03j99djlji3fntog_rp22sh2s8i66pr6chg6cor4cjh2bs) Isn't that great? The best part is... You'll have the peace of mind and security that comes from having your very own survival food stockpile. On great-tasting, survival food protection without the sticker shock. **Look, this food tastes homemade.** It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2znc2u06r30kjmf1f1u44s3ts9ovqs845l9g1i7co_rp22sh2s8i66pr6chg6cor4cjh2bs) You need to get 'er done today. Why? Because if you don't [**take action**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zqgn3ntgie4o6t4ho29ngghmia7n18nffm2anbrg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6chg6cor4cjh2bs) to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry, and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just [**imagine how much better you'll feel right away**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z8a11tbcthukplpdufi8t8mkl0mcj2v0b0da2eg0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6chg6cor4cjh2bs). When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit. **As it stands today, it's every man for himself.** In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. That's why I want you to have the same peace of mind that I do. [**Get Your 4Patriots Survival Food Kits Rushed To You Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zljc9crq6k8mrjljjb6oep5t50afjfg7b7m6lhbg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6chg6cor4cjh2bs) To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters **More Raving Reviews From Customers!** | | **Rory H.** I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things.
---|---
| **Billy H.** Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup.
---|---
| **Kevin S.** The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start.
---|---

---|---
| **Ken K.** I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal.
---|---

It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great.
---|---
| **Gary M.** I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed.
---|---
| **John H.** We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when."

name: 4Patriots
subject: The Food Crisis of 2023
body:
We live in uncertain times. There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with food insecurity. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0318%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=2jPrCDQJ%2frx7vFyTcuJVGg&sysid=1)
# The Food Crisis of 2023
We live in uncertain times. There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with food insecurity. As inflation and supply chain disruptions continue to push food costs higher and higher, families are feeling the weight of financial distress as they struggle to make ends meet. John Boyd Jr., a fourth-generation farmer, warns that food shortages are coming. "For so long, we've enjoyed lots of food in this country, so we've never ever faced a food shortage. The worst is yet to come." **Leading industry sources are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point".** As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore... Obviously, waiting on the government for a handout in a disaster just isn't an option. And we were completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655979%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uSPivXSzNuF%2fU9rZl9vVlA&sysid=1). Currently the 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food **is designed to last for 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve.
* **Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food."** And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.
* **You get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan with no interest!**

And that's not all, because... [**You also get $318 worth of FREE gifts!**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655970%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=k8zFJrtB6U3C3cZKEuYZxA&sysid=1) **FREE Bonus #1:** because they are so popular and a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you _**2**_ of their popular 72-Hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through a short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of the top-rated items on our website. And you get... **FREE Bonus #2:** You'll get a **Victory Garden Survival Seed Vault** with thousands of non-GMO heirloom seeds inside, designed to stay fresh for years. You can harvest and replant them over and over again. **FREE Bonus #3:** You also get their **Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater.** With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. **FREE Bonus #4:** You'll also get an **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books, you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these digital books are valued at $20, but they're yours free as a thank you for your order. But that's not all because you also get... **FREE Bonus #5:** You also get their **Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide**. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids, and you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. **FREE Bonus #6:** You also get **Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee.** Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure Arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. **FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa.** Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done, because you also get... **FREE Bonus #8:** You also get **$25 OFF your next purchase.** This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan... best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... **FREE Bonus #9:** **You get FREE Shipping and Handling on your entire order!** It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you. [**Get Your 4Patriots Survival Food Kits Rushed To You Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655971%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ctFisu8eROY16O6F4d5L1A&sysid=1) Isn't that great? The best part is... You'll have the peace of mind and security that comes from having your very own survival food stockpile. On great-tasting, survival food protection without the sticker shock. **Look, this food tastes homemade.** It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655972%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AkaHc4T46nF3CvtKsecF5Q&sysid=1) You need to get 'er done today. Why? Because if you don't [**take action**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655973%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=U4A%2bAcJV7ZO2QbijQl3SHg&sysid=1) to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry, and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just [**imagine how much better you'll feel right away**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655974%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CU%2b7kJRp0M%2b479XdcOE2yw&sysid=1). When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit. **As it stands today, it's every man for himself.** In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. That's why I want you to have the same peace of mind that I do. [**Get Your 4Patriots Survival Food Kits Rushed To You Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655971%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ctFisu8eROY16O6F4d5L1A&sysid=1) To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters **More Raving Reviews From Customers!** | | **Rory H.** I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things.
---|---
| **Billy H.** Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup.
---|---
| **Kevin S.** The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start.
---|---
| **Carol B.** I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings.
---|---
| **Ken K.** I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal.
---|---
| **Justin A.** My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great.
---|---
| **Gary M.** I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed.
---|---
| **John H.** We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when."
---|---
