The worst is yet to come." Leading industry sources are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point". As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like... Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired... Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick... Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished... Well, no need to worry anymore... Obviously, waiting on the government for a handout in a disaster just isn't an option. And we were completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling . Currently the 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because: 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value. This is not ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food is designed to last for 25 years , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too. You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve. Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food." And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out. You get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan with no interest! And that's not all, because... FREE Bonus #1: because they are so popular and a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you 2 of their popular 72-Hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through a short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. People love these kits. It's one of the top-rated items on our website. And you get... FREE Bonus #2: You'll get a Victory Garden Survival Seed Vault with thousands of non-GMO heirloom seeds inside, designed to stay fresh for years. You can harvest and replant them over and over again. FREE Bonus #3: You also get their Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater. With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. FREE Bonus #4: You'll also get an Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library. With these 4 digital books, you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these digital books are valued at $20, but they're yours free as a thank you for your order. But that's not all because you also get... FREE Bonus #5: You also get their Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids, and you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. FREE Bonus #6: You also get Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee. Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure Arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. FREE Bonus #7: You also get Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa. Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done, because you also get... FREE Bonus #8: You also get $25 OFF your next purchase. This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan... best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... FREE Bonus #9: You get FREE Shipping and Handling on your entire order! It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you. Isn't that great? The best part is... You'll have the peace of mind and security that comes from having your very own survival food stockpile. On great-tasting, survival food protection without the sticker shock. Look, this food tastes homemade. It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. You need to get 'er done today. Why? Because if you don't to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry, and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just . When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit. As it stands today, it's every man for himself. In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. That's why I want you to have the same peace of mind that I do. To your survival, Frank Bates Patriot Headquarters More Raving Reviews From Customers! | | Rory H. I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things. ---|--- | Billy H. Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup. ---|--- | Kevin S. The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start. ---|--- | Carol B. I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings. ---|--- | Ken K. I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal. ---|--- | Justin A. My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great. ---|--- | Gary M. I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed. ---|--- | John H. subject: (UPDATE) Capitol tour guides BANNED from mentioning Jan 6 attack! Add your name to stop this -->>
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | [Sign the petition: Stop banning Capitol tour guides from mentioning Jan 6 attack >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0da2742d-a3c1-4f07-814e-15a913842231/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | (_Already signed? Forward this to friends, and help us end the ban!)_ : In a shocking report, the _Washington Post_ revealed that the **Capitol Visitor Center has banned Capitol tour guides from mentioning the January 6th attack,** unless they are specifically questioned about it. The attack on the Capitol was not only one of the darkest days in our nation's history, it was one of the most newsworthy events ever to happen at the Capitol. Whitewashing it from a tour is both absurd and appalling. And if this is related to the Republican takeover of the House, that makes it even worse. [**Add your name, and tell the Capitol Visitor Center to stop blocking tour guides from mentioning the January 6th attack.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5fb55c3d-9efa-49da-ae50-4fda87655d19/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Brandon Tatum
subject: BLM vs Blexit
body:
I am a Black man, and I’m telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of A
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zoo22pef4fb543s45r4puotsjbua6t6he5vnbs40_rp22sh2s8i66pr6chg62pb4c1h2bs)

Friend,

**I am a Black man, and I 'm telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America - _Black Lives Matter_.**

Now, I know what you're thinking... _What about the KKK, or what about neo-nazis?_

I ask, "what about them is influential?!"

This is 2022. Does the KKK have institutional power like BLM does? Is the KKK receiving millions of dollars from corporations and Hollywood celebrities?

No. They aren't, but BLM is.

BLM claims to speak for Black communities. But all I ever hear from BLM is how much they hate America. They only focus on victimhood to divide us as the greatest nation on Earth. BLM cries out for action, but the only action they do is burn down Black neighborhoods and cozy up to corporations.

I saw the hypocrisy long ago. **That 's why I started the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens. **

**BLEXIT** is a non-profit bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

_Our message to America 's black and minority communities is that you are NOT a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture_.

I believe God has put me on this mission to reach Black communities. I'll tell you the full story of how I cofounded BLEXIT with Candace, but first, I must ask for your immediate support.

[_**Can you please support BLEXIT by sending a gift of $5, $10, $20.22, $100, or any amount you can afford today? Click here to donate >>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z67fpqmfogol9fmirc1rqq4hpn6rl0jeermhpj6g_rp22sh2s8i66pr6chg62pb4c1h2bs)

**How I Started BLEXIT**

I was an All-American high school football player in Fort Worth, Texas. I accepted a full athletic scholarship from the University of Arizona in 2005. I played at Arizona for five years and entered the NFL Draft in 2010; however, God had other plans.

With my entire family around, I was not drafted. I was so angry. I ripped my shirt off. But, God had other plans for me.

This led me to join the Tucson police force, and it changed my life forever.

I learned what it meant to put my life on the line to save others. I woke up every morning to thank Jesus that I got to live another day to serve. This experience taught me a lot, but it was foundational to learning about the lies of BLM.

Learning that BLM is lying to Black communities and teaching them to hate the police forever changed my opinion on the "Black Lives Matter" organization. But more importantly, I learned not to be a victim. Not getting drafted into the NFL taught me life lessons I wouldn't have learned otherwise. I learned to serve others.

Now, I'm giving back to the Black community to make sure they don't become bought into this toxic victimhood mentality that BLM pushes.

[_**Can you help me reach Black neighborhoods with a message of individualism, freedom, and entrepreneurship? Click here to donate any amount >>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjbm518v2irtvi5mrkehljf9nlatr5q83ogo5i68_rp22sh2s8i66pr6chg62pb4c1h2bs)

BLM incites lawlessness. BLEXIT stands for the rule of law.

BLM destroys communities. BLEXIT empowers them.

BLM only sees the color of your skin. BLEXIT sees character.

BLM wants to disrupt families. BLEXT values the nuclear family.

_Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with 42 grassroots chapter programs in 42 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters._

**Here 's how you can help:**

_I am looking to raise $83,000 online to support BLEXIT during this critical year. We must expand our chapters, build new leaders, and reach people within Black communities_.

This is a long game we are playing. If this were a football game, we would only be in the 1st quarter.

BLM thinks they speak for Black communities, but we are taking over quickly and providing real opportunities for our members.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrg6u5u7coo4fnv2kl8ofro12o93tg8qau25cqig_rp22sh2s8i66pr6chg62pb4c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrveh2itk6r6lvm30ii99k0f48q2e031kpbq8mto_rp22sh2s8i66pr6chg62pb4c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4d3knomrhq802houehrk41558a3kufki1voeer0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6chg62pb4c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zoa7t6lsosdmd5aoakqqvtepfum2jqaple84ardg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6chg62pb4c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zral8r0k9v7ilqrrdjsasrvurq1b1bq24jbb7k3o_rp22sh2s8i66pr6chg62pb4c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zf85mcrsjphm2norqrd0kiebhdaaj8qfkf9ifma8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6chg62pb4c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zt6118lrh1p5ur29u877qcm4qa1eqagolijuvje0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6chg62pb4c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zebnikqj6pte383dc9ca7jcmv1fvi59mgqeot6j0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6chg62pb4c1h2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvgj4n99i47tutf7br03eagph2j9k5lbk933clrg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6chg62pb4c1h2bs)

**HOW BLEXIT Works**

**Step One:** We enter communities no one else dares to go into - Detroit, Baltimore, New Orleans, Houston, etc. We host events and set up chapters of volunteers who build a support network and help get our message of individualism and empowerment to Black neighborhoods.

**Step Two:** We send the best volunteers and chapter members to our Leadership Academy.

We build leaders from the ground up. In fact, our staff is full of stories of activists we hired from the Leadership Academy. They started as a chapter member and now work for us full time.

Other members graduate from the Leadership Academy, and then they go back into their communities to support others or start their own businesses.

As you can see, we are BUILDING neighborhoods, NOT destroying them.

**Step Three:** Our educational content, both online and in-person, is teaching Black communities ideas they will never hear in the mainstream media.

BLEXIT is teaching about individualism, pro-life, school choice, teaching REAL history (not Critical Race Theory), and creating patriotism among Black families.

**Step Four:** We host large events with hundreds, sometimes thousands of attendees. Our events bring music, live entertainment, and education to Black communities.

What I really want to emphasize is this - BLEXIT is a "DO" tank! We are out there meeting people in neighborhoods.

Friend, this is deeply personal for me as a Black man.

We have to save our communities. We must save our country from the toxic and divisive organizations like BLM that are tearing down our businesses and livelihoods.

**So, please, I implore you to send any amount you generously can. We are a 501(c)(3) organization, and your support is tax-deductible. **

clean_body: I am a Black man, and I’m telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of A Friend, I am a Black man, and I 'm telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America - Black Lives Matter. Now, I know what you're thinking... What about the KKK, or what about neo-nazis? I ask, "what about them is influential?!" This is 2022. Does the KKK have institutional power like BLM does? Is the KKK receiving millions of dollars from corporations and Hollywood celebrities? No. They aren't, but BLM is. BLM claims to speak for Black communities. But all I ever hear from BLM is how much they hate America. They only focus on victimhood to divide us as the greatest nation on Earth. BLM cries out for action, but the only action they do is burn down Black neighborhoods and cozy up to corporations. I saw the hypocrisy long ago. That 's why I started the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens. BLEXIT is a non-profit bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America 's black and minority communities is that you are NOT a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. I believe God has put me on this mission to reach Black communities. I'll tell you the full story of how I cofounded BLEXIT with Candace, but first, I must ask for your immediate support. How I Started BLEXIT I was an All-American high school football player in Fort Worth, Texas. I accepted a full athletic scholarship from the University of Arizona in 2005. I played at Arizona for five years and entered the NFL Draft in 2010; however, God had other plans. With my entire family around, I was not drafted. I was so angry. I ripped my shirt off. But, God had other plans for me. This led me to join the Tucson police force, and it changed my life forever. I learned what it meant to put my life on the line to save others. I woke up every morning to thank Jesus that I got to live another day to serve. This experience taught me a lot, but it was foundational to learning about the lies of BLM. Learning that BLM is lying to Black communities and teaching them to hate the police forever changed my opinion on the "Black Lives Matter" organization. But more importantly, I learned not to be a victim. Not getting drafted into the NFL taught me life lessons I wouldn't have learned otherwise. I learned to serve others. Now, I'm giving back to the Black community to make sure they don't become bought into this toxic victimhood mentality that BLM pushes. BLM incites lawlessness. BLEXIT stands for the rule of law. BLM destroys communities. BLEXIT empowers them. BLM only sees the color of your skin. BLEXIT sees character. BLM wants to disrupt families. BLEXT values the nuclear family. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with 42 grassroots chapter programs in 42 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. Here 's how you can help: I am looking to raise $83,000 online to support BLEXIT during this critical year. We must expand our chapters, build new leaders, and reach people within Black communities. This is a long game we are playing. If this were a football game, we would only be in the 1st quarter. BLM thinks they speak for Black communities, but we are taking over quickly and providing real opportunities for our members. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today: HOW BLEXIT Works Step One: We enter communities no one else dares to go into - Detroit, Baltimore, New Orleans, Houston, etc. We host events and set up chapters of volunteers who build a support network and help get our message of individualism and empowerment to Black neighborhoods. Step Two: We send the best volunteers and chapter members to our Leadership Academy. We build leaders from the ground up. In fact, our staff is full of stories of activists we hired from the Leadership Academy. They started as a chapter member and now work for us full time. Other members graduate from the Leadership Academy, and then they go back into their communities to support others or start their own businesses. As you can see, we are BUILDING neighborhoods, NOT destroying them. Step Three: Our educational content, both online and in-person, is teaching Black communities ideas they will never hear in the mainstream media. BLEXIT is teaching about individualism, pro-life, school choice, teaching REAL history (not Critical Race Theory), and creating patriotism among Black families. Step Four: We host large events with hundreds, sometimes thousands of attendees. Our events bring music, live entertainment, and education to Black communities. What I really want to emphasize is this - BLEXIT is a "DO" tank! We are out there meeting people in neighborhoods. Friend, this is deeply personal for me as a Black man. We have to save our communities. We must save our country from the toxic and divisive organizations like BLM that are tearing down our businesses and livelihoods. So, please, I implore you to send any amount you generously can. We are a 501(c)(3) organization, and your support is tax-deductible. People ask me, "What does BLEXIT mean?" It is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. " If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim, you become your own oppressor." \- Candace Owens We believe in Faith, Freedom, and Family. With those three principles intact, you can find prosperity no matter how your life may have started. And I believe that is what will save us all in the end. Thank you, Brandon Tatum Co-Founder BLEXIT Foundation If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for 1600 Daily, . 625 First St #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

clean_body: A TOTAL MESS.A TOTAL MESS. | Katie Hobbs thought she was such a great cheater that there was no chance she’d ever get caught. She was wrong. In a short, two-day trial, my team uncovered a treasure trove of evidence proving that the November election was blatantly influenced and disenfranchised Republican voters to help Katie Hobbs win. Every day that we keep fighting the morally corrupt and unAmerican shadow cabal pulling the strings in Arizona are shaking in their boots. My team can’t win this fight alone. Blood, sweat, and tears will only get us so far. Can you spare ANYTHING to help me and my team fight for YOU? | God Bless you, Kari Lake Paid for by Save Arizona Fund Inc. name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: The most personal email I’ve ever sent you
body:
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0c567ea39032457cbb2df96c7a291347&_e=YLbQAeZtpmUOYkd84YNMwD4NrtdqYWuk4AwW8UXfwvIGU_F8b9hBBW68RuxkuQsUrjmgE3jgzaj-7hI_F03PRxndh8mp0e2Q7dacfQxelpD4YwuuBgNFmeecPbmMscQlm8SxOTetK7G6BvDP3DHM5O2Xq0yeumj2z0bLrdIrn7_Knsaj0mVnaa6jV25XnVTr5KrKJO39muToyCOC6tzhJUoAV54B8U1J5hFhvb85Q6PXvb40IifPX6FnffAxnoh2deeHOZni9eBwfqpdZNwqJnveXudUklHHXd20auaIrMs%3D)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0c567ea39032457cbb2df96c7a291347&_e=YLbQAeZtpmUOYkd84YNMwD4NrtdqYWuk4AwW8UXfwvIGU_F8b9hBBW68RuxkuQsUrjmgE3jgzaj-7hI_F03PRxndh8mp0e2Q7dacfQxelpD4YwuuBgNFmeecPbmMscQlm8SxOTetK7G6BvDP3DHM5LQ4_VEzm7FicPyfjJePQezoI_9xwOU73MsSnUTrXCA5tsRRx6wfp5IfFhHXclsfkBg20LglxXHyQ-6pUnwYdvlppFSHEtH8JyBZdTqoNQQP_wPjg7FBhJ4PFwTiApXumLDxgS9EkpDVSo76cjVaCCQ%3D)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I've dealt with racism... _**I 've even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0c567ea39032457cbb2df96c7a291347&_e=YLbQAeZtpmUOYkd84YNMwD4NrtdqYWuk4AwW8UXfwvIGU_F8b9hBBW68RuxkuQsUrjmgE3jgzaj-7hI_F03PRxndh8mp0e2Q7dacfQxelpD4YwuuBgNFmeecPbmMscQlm8SxOTetK7G6BvDP3DHM5OIXgBj7jSWGIMYAPXtQNBmhUAcbwmrBzAIyEJzTUzUP8W_3_yDA30LhVM-Ext4LG04eTK5mipaKip0DdUfwWFyH3M24y8mpms-EwbNFjoWKPa0FgtNp3M1bC7ZzKe0Rgvm68ONsF8ioBSGNbTjnmzU%3D)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I 'm not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0c567ea39032457cbb2df96c7a291347&_e=YLbQAeZtpmUOYkd84YNMwD4NrtdqYWuk4AwW8UXfwvIGU_F8b9hBBW68RuxkuQsUrjmgE3jgzaj-7hI_F03PRxndh8mp0e2Q7dacfQxelpD4YwuuBgNFmeecPbmMscQlm8SxOTetK7G6BvDP3DHM5DBCviFiYXzRcsd9uuM5BXAawSToY5Z8xnagGG0oNn8UloSxvjdtEIq7pYQbxM5V1mIEcEBSKqZ6M0gfUF-MR3xJ9hJuKVJn_EXEl8WZ6rw7XAhqY-PYaSBj-J0-6yeYB5vKRtOeMMLIhrc-ySJS3w4%3D)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0c567ea39032457cbb2df96c7a291347&_e=YLbQAeZtpmUOYkd84YNMwD4NrtdqYWuk4AwW8UXfwvIGU_F8b9hBBW68RuxkuQsUrjmgE3jgzaj-7hI_F03PRxndh8mp0e2Q7dacfQxelpD4YwuuBgNFmeecPbmMscQlm8SxOTetK7G6BvDP3DHM5FGITEzD9LibCF3JNaMDbX22iEWGt7B-vKipeH9LRoKNpOSOeWCF7nlYK99jExbcXwaWtRHuxQ-mL22gb-ZROlM525j1_4TSLtL7ZUrNHgrA4rA99C0mRL0lZkRvQGVlvGrpGXQlWdqGpySPWDGD2mY%3D)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0c567ea39032457cbb2df96c7a291347&_e=YLbQAeZtpmUOYkd84YNMwD4NrtdqYWuk4AwW8UXfwvIGU_F8b9hBBW68RuxkuQsUrjmgE3jgzaj-7hI_F03PRxndh8mp0e2Q7dacfQxelpD4YwuuBgNFmeecPbmMscQlm8SxOTetK7G6BvDP3DHM5MmnpkBHcEOR3JnHxurTS1M2_uoU5yqLf_68MawN6ifPRlLbINRJ4bb3F-N9nu44xt_OHGFFvy_RxlJlTPxvyagZmYD8Xo9XMMyyUa-kkLvlsgN1MPmBDIaHXrM6l4jxPsSOjgkOrINnD5fFt5lli7M%3D)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0c567ea39032457cbb2df96c7a291347&_e=YLbQAeZtpmUOYkd84YNMwD4NrtdqYWuk4AwW8UXfwvIGU_F8b9hBBW68RuxkuQsUrjmgE3jgzaj-7hI_F03PRxndh8mp0e2Q7dacfQxelpD4YwuuBgNFmeecPbmMscQlm8SxOTetK7G6BvDP3DHM5PvBA-Y9age4-AOcPJK6LGUl54I-KSN7NW8kD99i9pbOE4oRrCz__L7Aq27Y4fvUHH5aAryiubeqnmTFVagiyW7G_kk3HHnBnKZHa1Eb_CljxQehqXRn3-ERuWJgNlT-LG2DGovBrGlR8Y2ecM7O1W8%3D)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT 's events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0c567ea39032457cbb2df96c7a291347&_e=YLbQAeZtpmUOYkd84YNMwD4NrtdqYWuk4AwW8UXfwvIGU_F8b9hBBW68RuxkuQsUrjmgE3jgzaj-7hI_F03PRxndh8mp0e2Q7dacfQxelpD4YwuuBgNFmeecPbmMscQlm8SxOTetK7G6BvDP3DHM5M_017TaLcynKiG2ymsErgnEv_dxs4VXIjHZc5IVVNzWL-rwa0B5Gpj77knVN2K8IcxWSSqmh9Jk5A-Dz2ZX6QoGrWPHtGuASmHcXdJtLWXyBBlCB-yikvy10pgMVD2jlB39WmYS9AjkOLSCqS1v9Vc%3D)

What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0c567ea39032457cbb2df96c7a291347&_e=YLbQAeZtpmUOYkd84YNMwD4NrtdqYWuk4AwW8UXfwvIGU_F8b9hBBW68RuxkuQsUrjmgE3jgzaj-7hI_F03PRxndh8mp0e2Q7dacfQxelpD4YwuuBgNFmeecPbmMscQlucdblnE2S9M9VZBxhVBiPqEsYxBuoey2nv6mzswqH5Q0i0DflH7P4b1HRBJO3PWQ1VIfc9yUGNIBpMnnaBYphoeJhP4yMPaHz5WDgqEoMAS3HFon6ZlJ2egdo7yluUbvokvWQeeJ-JIicUfA90uOEJvWNES8jxi0w3nJdER7wY8%3D)

clean_body: Friend, This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation. For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop. In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. Now I 'll share my story... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities. Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking. We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals. This is WRONG. I've dealt with racism... I 've even received death threats. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable. But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up. I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. I am breaking the rules. It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... I 'm not doing that. You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country. So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss). When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing. Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for: School Choice: Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools. The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. Criminal Justice Reform: The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities. Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message. Entrepreneurship: I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire. BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. Teaching History: Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore. The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor. This is personal to me. I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today: This is my last message to you before you close this email. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment. My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause. Thank you, Friend. Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation Sent to Conservative Liberty Wire subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

It’s time to get back to work, friends’. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57021353/386647198/-144884643?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_GEN_NO_20230107_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWYwODNiMC1hNDhlLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K9xUWGwByEim3Cq2oFjNTRzFGsBY3s4fM8xOMi5r_tA=) Folks, Earlier this week, I was sworn into the United States Senate to serve Colorado for six more years. Now, it’s time to get back to work. Coloradans sent me back to Washington because they see the same problems I do: a changing climate, a fragile democracy, a healthcare system that costs too much and covers too few, and an economy that helps those on top get further ahead but leaves everyone else behind. **Folks, let’s make this next term our best yet.** Let’s lift millions more children out of poverty by making the extended _Child Tax Credit_ permanent. Let’s create thousands of more jobs and continue tackling the climate crisis by investing more in green energy and environmental protection. Let’s get back to work ending forty years of failed “trickle-down” policies and build an economy that works for all of us. And let’s reject Donald Trump and his allies’ attempts to destroy our democracy. That is what we worked for in this election, and we won. But yesterday’s swearing-in does not signal the end of our work — only a new beginning. **So, if you’re still with me:**[**Make a donation today to become a 2023 Founding Donor and support our continued work. Together, we’ll continue electing Democrats and organizing for a better, more prosperous future.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57021354/386647199/-144884643?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_GEN_NO_20230107_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWYwODNiMC1hNDhlLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K9xUWGwByEim3Cq2oFjNTRzFGsBY3s4fM8xOMi5r_tA=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **** | | | ********[Donate $10 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57021355/386647200/-144884643?express_lane=true&amount=10&&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_GEN_NO_20230107_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWYwODNiMC1hNDhlLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K9xUWGwByEim3Cq2oFjNTRzFGsBY3s4fM8xOMi5r_tA=)********

name: 4Patriots
subject: The Food Crisis of 2023
body:
We live in uncertain times. There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with food insecurity. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7787%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=2rA5OV34XD2rKtIexeiXdg&sysid=1)
# The Food Crisis of 2023
We live in uncertain times. There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with food insecurity. As inflation and supply chain disruptions continue to push food costs higher and higher, families are feeling the weight of financial distress as they struggle to make ends meet. John Boyd Jr., a fourth-generation farmer, warns that food shortages are coming. "For so long, we've enjoyed lots of food in this country, so we've never ever faced a food shortage. The worst is yet to come." **Leading industry sources are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point".** As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore... Obviously, waiting on the government for a handout in a disaster just isn't an option. And we were completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c90322%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=eRm0Mn%2bnYxOYFyhBOBqiqQ&sysid=1). Currently the 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food **is designed to last for 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve.

The Food Crisis of 2023 We live in uncertain times. There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with food insecurity. As inflation and supply chain disruptions continue to push food costs higher and higher, families are feeling the weight of financial distress as they struggle to make ends meet. John Boyd Jr., a fourth-generation farmer, warns that food shortages are coming. "For so long, we've enjoyed lots of food in this country, so we've never ever faced a food shortage. The worst is yet to come." Leading industry sources are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point". As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like... Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired... body:
As an organizer, and your congressman, I will continue to recommit myself to our shared vision for the future every single day.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57022448/386651354/1120393829?refcode=em-wrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDI0NzIxYS1hODhlLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EcPAS3WYcBzfGwiC2et5S3jtmuOtDWdaIgP1V2LpgZI=&emci=a657c38f-388b-ed11-9d7a-00224832e611&emdi=fd24721a-a88e-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=6830379)
Peter,
In the early hours of the morning, I had the humbling honor of being sworn into the U.S. House of Representatives for the 118th Congress.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57022449/386651355/-1098251002?refcode=em-20230107&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDI0NzIxYS1hODhlLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EcPAS3WYcBzfGwiC2et5S3jtmuOtDWdaIgP1V2LpgZI=)
We didn’t get here by accident. I ran on an unapologetic, progressive, pro-worker platform — a platform that deeply resonated with our communities and the growing progressive movement in the heart of Texas. Now, I’m ready to make good on the promises of my campaign, but I can’t do it alone. Together, we will fight to restore abortion rights, tackle the climate crisis, and win good-paying union jobs for all.
**Standing together in solidarity is more important than ever, Peter. As House Republicans embrace authoritarianism and division we need as much support as possible to stand united for democracy.[Will you chip in $5, $10 or even $20 today to help us continue to strategize, fight back, and stand in solidarity with working Americans?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57022450/386651356/-1098251002?refcode=em-20230107&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDI0NzIxYS1hODhlLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EcPAS3WYcBzfGwiC2et5S3jtmuOtDWdaIgP1V2LpgZI=)**
****[Chip In »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57022451/386651357/-1098251002?refcode=em-20230107&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDI0NzIxYS1hODhlLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EcPAS3WYcBzfGwiC2et5S3jtmuOtDWdaIgP1V2LpgZI=)****
---
If the last few days and years have taught us anything, it’s that nothing can be taken for granted. As an organizer, and your congressman, I will recommit myself to our shared vision every single day because it is a huge show of your trust in me that I am here today.
**All I ask in return is that you bring your own unique contribution to this movement, whether how you sow seeds of compassion in your own community, your artistic talents, your policy ideas, or your community service — it’s going to take all of us, and our individual gifts to not only power this movement but sustain it for the long-haul.**
From the bottom of my heart, thank you. Let’s get to work for Texans and for working families across America.
With gratitude,
Greg
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57022452/386651358/-96605760?refcode=em-20230107&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDI0NzIxYS1hODhlLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EcPAS3WYcBzfGwiC2et5S3jtmuOtDWdaIgP1V2LpgZI=)
_Congressman Greg Casar
Texas Congressional District 35_
_**[P.S. If you can, I would appreciate your continued support with a financial contribution to our campaign today](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57022453/386651359/-96605760?refcode=em-20230107&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDI0NzIxYS1hODhlLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EcPAS3WYcBzfGwiC2et5S3jtmuOtDWdaIgP1V2LpgZI=), but if you are unable to at this time, know that I am still grateful for your presence and participation in this movement. Thank you.**_

clean_body: As an organizer, and your congressman, I will continue to recommit myself to our shared vision for the future every single day. Peter, In the early hours of the morning, I had the humbling honor of being sworn into the U.S. House of Representatives for the 118th Congress. = We didn’t get here by accident. I ran on an unapologetic, progressive, pro-worker platform — a platform that deeply resonated with our communities and the growing progressive movement in the heart of Texas. Now, I’m ready to make good on the promises of my campaign, but I can’t do it alone. Together, we will fight to restore abortion rights, tackle the climate crisis, and win good-paying union jobs for all. Standing together in solidarity is more important than ever, Peter. As House Republicans embrace authoritarianism and division we need as much support as possible to stand united for democracy.= **= If the last few days and years have taught us anything, it’s that nothing can be taken for granted. As an organizer, and your congressman, I will recommit myself to our shared vision every single day because it is a huge show of your trust in me that I am here today. All I ask in return is that you bring your own unique contribution to this movement, whether how you sow seeds of compassion in your own community, your artistic talents, your policy ideas, or your community service — it’s going to take all of us, and our individual gifts to not only power this movement but sustain it for the long-haul. From the bottom of my heart, thank you. Let’s get to work for Texans and for working families across America. With gratitude, Greg = Congressman Greg Casar Texas Congressional District 35 =, but if you are unable to at this time, know that I am still grateful for your presence and participation in this movement. Thank you. ****=** | ****** ---|---

name: C7 Tac
subject: I'm 1776% sure no one will be taking...
body:
This is the tumbler that makes drinks great again...
---
| | | | | | | **WE GOT YOUR 6.**
---

| | |
It was 1776 when America gave Great Britain the finger and said “we’re out.”
For two-and-and-half centuries we Americans have enjoyed unadulterated, in-your-face freedom. (Despite the left wing’s best efforts.)
And I think we can both agree that one thing has provided us with this freedom that we love and cherish.
Our God-given right to bear arms.
And if you're anything like us, you like to help preserve this legacy by showing your support for the 2nd amendment.
(Plus we find it’s a great snowflake repellent.)
That’s why we took this iconic number and had a little something engraved on our premium quality tumblers.
Because **I am 1776% sure no one will be taking my guns!**
---
| | | And nothing makes me feel more like a red-blooded American patriot...
Than sipping Kentucky’s finest out of this bad boy while watching a snowflake run for a “safe space.”
The best part is you can make a day of it since the double-wall insulation keeps cold drinks cold for 24 hours. (And hot drinks are hot for 8 hours!)
**This is the tumbler that makes drinks great again.**
* Engraved by freedom-loving Americans in Boise, Idaho
* Food Grade 18/8 Stainless Steel Construction
* Fits and any truck or car cup holder
* Never rusts...even after collecting salty liberal tears
* Leak-proof lid for those bumpy roads or stormy fishing days
* Superior finish (Sweat-proof!)
* Fits 20oz of American whiskey, beer, water, coffee, etc
* 30-day money-back guarantee
* Makes the PERFECT gift

This rugged tumbler is 100% awesome and 0% liberal.
So if you're unapologetically American and you like your beverages to stay icy cold, or scalding hot...
This Freedom Tumbler is for you.
And I have some excellent news for you today.
Because for a very limited time, [you can get your own Freedom Tumbler at just a fraction of the normal price.](https://links.c7tac.com/a/1537/click/11135/6374453/7348cbe649a92fd54bd8e09768283620e61c9792/369370bf1c1ed3beb1bab64e2d11921979e8e061)
If you were to go directly to our online store, you’d pay USD40 for this piece of badassery.
And we sell them at that price every single day of the week.
But I’m on a mission to make this thing go “viral.”
So right now you can get your very own Freedom Tumbler for only USD40 USD19.
Hell, at that price you can get one for you and a friend and still pay half of what one normally costs.
The only catch is, I set aside some of these for this special sale...and right now we only have 694 left as of the sending of this email!
And once those are gone you’ll have to pay the normal price of USD40.
I think we can both agree that USD19 is a small price to pay for showing your support for the 2nd amendment.
Plus pissing off whiny liberal snowflakes everywhere you go is _priceless._
**[GO HERE to claim your Freedom Tumbler for 50% OFF](https://links.c7tac.com/a/1537/click/11135/6374453/7348cbe649a92fd54bd8e09768283620e61c9792/369370bf1c1ed3beb1bab64e2d11921979e8e061)**
So if you're ready to trigger a liberal just by enjoying a tasty beverage, you better hurry.
Because this IS a limited-time offer and these WILL sell out fast.
We’ve mostly been getting orders for multiple tumblers at this incredible price, so I really don’t know how much longer these will be available.
But if you order now, your Freedom Tumbler will be delivered to your front door in the next 3-5 days.
And since you're backed by our 30-day, 100% guarantee...
There’s no risk on your part.
If you're not 100% satisfied, email our support team and we’ll refund you every penny. But I don’t see that happening, to be honest.
**Just look at what other 2nd amendment supporters are saying about their Freedom Tumblers**
“ _Fist bumps, thumbs up, smiles, and some gal passed me her number at Starbucks....so be ready.”_ **Robert B. – Omaha, NE**
_“When drinking from this tumbler, I have bald eagles wearing American flags as capes swoop down and land on my arm. I get the nods and the handshakes when walking around, rocking this tumbler. People appreciate my badassness when representing.”_ **Justin G. – Toledo, OH**
_“I bought one for myself, now every member of the family wants one.”_ **Lenny P. – Marcus Hook, PA**
Remember, these are only 50% off until I sell the remaining ones.
**[GO HERE to get your Freedom Tumbler now](https://links.c7tac.com/a/1537/click/11135/6374453/7348cbe649a92fd54bd8e09768283620e61c9792/369370bf1c1ed3beb1bab64e2d11921979e8e061)**
There’s never been a more important time than now to stand up for our rights.
Thanks for being a fellow patriot!
---
* * *

[_**TACTICAL | SHOP | CONTACT US**_](https://links.c7tac.com/a/1537/click/11135/6374453/6aa9ab53b7d5386dd9b370b3493857e2e20a15f6/369370bf1c1ed3beb1bab64e2d11921979e8e061)

body:

Hillsdale College | | | This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=64a2ced473124588900c77385341f38f&_e=9IU8KmsPWyRcP4W6jia5HgWB-yQgbMLoRIFNgxXMB-GgCeuMiLxlH9ypgzr9V29rrqni_0BuzjEdu4hQUasAm5hV0gHd2iVsdV7S25tTA4YkIxaWherUNLlKyKtLRSfzhob1ynibdB5Im5xE7xNc7obajktbUTgRsR-roCnL7GFsnGY3Hc0KG7qPXXCVoFq05bgTiLmypL6gd3MMLtTDcUjGDW94BNYCP4mEtyUUonmMZYoeyfNFC2l9zQDN8KCL5P5fPZTTzrKr79cup5YMbyoGTUHYnI4j5QHIdGJGN9GAdP-Tq2tjyKPyGsmMFucMizpH97GBFSCfAZ8LxYO0NcyFf1i9_uefMeHLiG7DOrBn8GC9WpjMgu3JzHUxu-EomyM05TY3fcconTllf6q7uQ%3D%3D) Fellow American, [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=64a2ced473124588900c77385341f38f&_e=9IU8KmsPWyRcP4W6jia5HgWB-yQgbMLoRIFNgxXMB-GgCeuMiLxlH9ypgzr9V29rrqni_0BuzjEdu4hQUasAm5hV0gHd2iVsdV7S25tTA4YkIxaWherUNLlKyKtLRSfzhob1ynibdB5Im5xE7xNc7obajktbUTgRsR-roCnL7GFsnGY3Hc0KG7qPXXCVoFq05bgTiLmypL6gd3MMLtTDcUjGDW94BNYCP4mEtyUUonmMZYoeyfNFC2l9zQDN8KCL8UUqbf_sBJxBXd0cvJW1cjBs-l0dIve8Xg7E9GKQfLtgJaaRJvx8i-ji7KwsL5PJtCZ-csTqT9CjrLiRCT9QSwgcFczn8RpnS1gnqOOkE-DSugmumura3BbGKdO17_zP-5pT037zNwxYOGXIxKd2TA%3D%3D) You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities, and its increasing influence in K-12 education. But we must not lose hope. Instead, we must fight back with the truth. Hillsdale College has been engaging the Left on the battlefield of education from the beginning. That’s why we’ve turned our course, [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=64a2ced473124588900c77385341f38f&_e=9IU8KmsPWyRcP4W6jia5HgWB-yQgbMLoRIFNgxXMB-GgCeuMiLxlH9ypgzr9V29rrqni_0BuzjEdu4hQUasAm5hV0gHd2iVsdV7S25tTA4YkIxaWherUNLlKyKtLRSfzhob1ynibdB5Im5xE7xNc7obajktbUTgRsR-roCnL7GFsnGY3Hc0KG7qPXXCVoFq05bgTiLmypL6gd3MMLtTDcUjGDW94BNYCP4mEtyUUonmMZYoeyfNFC2l9zQDN8KCLe0Lmy94qF0bA18WjJTjeDqdRy8xWP3_7HO79W8gjf6-mf6_lkQ94wrsW37uOCm5HxYPnAskFuff2UlwWKhChUI4wz2YOikMVWGiiwYOfQFUuwVyqArHLH4dGEVk0wPastlQkXsr5GU50uezizDTIBQ%3D%3D) into a DVD set, and I’d like you to have a copy. Taught by historian Wilfred McClay and based on his recently published history of America, **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** presents a full, unbiased account of America’s past. Hillsdale’s goal in producing this course is to **restore the kind of intelligent patriotism—especially among our young people—that is essential to preserving free government.** **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** is a powerful counterweight to _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project,” which is injecting the idea that America is an essentially unjust nation into the curricula of America’s K-12 schools. Please consider getting [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=64a2ced473124588900c77385341f38f&_e=9IU8KmsPWyRcP4W6jia5HgWB-yQgbMLoRIFNgxXMB-GgCeuMiLxlH9ypgzr9V29rrqni_0BuzjEdu4hQUasAm5hV0gHd2iVsdV7S25tTA4YkIxaWherUNLlKyKtLRSfzhob1ynibdB5Im5xE7xNc7obajktbUTgRsR-roCnL7GFsnGY3Hc0KG7qPXXCVoFq05bgTiLmypL6gd3MMLtTDcUjGDW94BNYCP4mEtyUUonmMZYoeyfNFC2l9zQDN8KCLmGsUfkG43FN_bhDnShZFIFEG_I-doCCrKGLa1_7cEKcpHNlR4ULqWSU4Gx1pYP6snVISMkRB32h07d2uFzluODURiPHSH4ZPoXN9Yhqn3ZOLwoPaRJ9hcTum9nGPExCAaeyoHdzpZdVkdHyognITgQ%3D%3D) as a DVD set for your home library or to give as a gift. Presenting real American history is the surest means of preserving liberty. Quantities are limited, so reserve your copy today. [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=64a2ced473124588900c77385341f38f&_e=9IU8KmsPWyRcP4W6jia5HgWB-yQgbMLoRIFNgxXMB-GgCeuMiLxlH9ypgzr9V29rrqni_0BuzjEdu4hQUasAm5hV0gHd2iVsdV7S25tTA4YkIxaWherUNLlKyKtLRSfzhob1ynibdB5Im5xE7xNc7obajktbUTgRsR-roCnL7GFsnGY3Hc0KG7qPXXCVoFq05bgTiLmypL6gd3MMLtTDcUjGDW94BNYCP4mEtyUUonmMZYoeyfNFC2l9zQDN8KCL0c2AeFYJBILOalNrQjaHcpNPD1416jB_j5IDG6lJecYeJttvZIOlFsBz6APON_xlB2fqLIHYg2gmaMWwewPA_iP3d37SdotRs-J6nl5CY4HT67j4caeIO5NK_5rHzbQD38dTbPSMfao2gE2z56kOEQ%3D%3D) Thank you for your partnership with Hillsdale College and your support of its mission on behalf of liberty. name: Brandon Tatum
subject: BLM vs Blexit
body:
[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2d4fa9927f9f4f32a264c8531089add2&_e=KAw56AEgOcjdHjk4o61DhPSLsO1QB1tXlLpj1Hkoap99gKHimc4wAPoD9l5WckKb_3te7ALx8Frw-TXkKlUtbIY3U1kol_maHyBAD-9N170q253NXTDBfy_FObl_WoyOdOo_fnflGpdUaqFAJjZaayyEkuFgtZcY9sTbGMU-RcwPUTO0dnIQrPhiwE4rYKwRyPCdNTfCZA3uOHQ_J7pG0F2n6ih8S2b-XwsGP693qKJLHJpTFEwj7u3lDqnWRVa4IbjnpUHg_jWNNBPzyHeNmC2kBmD2ocBopl4nb9B2aTQ%3D)

Friend,

**I am a Black man, and I 'm telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America - _Black Lives Matter_.**

Now, I know what you're thinking... _What about the KKK, or what about neo-nazis?_

I ask, "what about them is influential?!"

This is 2022. Does the KKK have institutional power like BLM does? Is the KKK receiving millions of dollars from corporations and Hollywood celebrities?

No. They aren't, but BLM is.

BLM claims to speak for Black communities. But all I ever hear from BLM is how much they hate America. They only focus on victimhood to divide us as the greatest nation on Earth. BLM cries out for action, but the only action they do is burn down Black neighborhoods and cozy up to corporations.

I saw the hypocrisy long ago. **That 's why I started the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens. **

**BLEXIT** is a non-profit bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

_Our message to America 's black and minority communities is that you are NOT a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture_.

I believe God has put me on this mission to reach Black communities. I'll tell you the full story of how I cofounded BLEXIT with Candace, but first, I must ask for your immediate support.

[_**Can you please support BLEXIT by sending a gift of $5, $10, $20.22, $100, or any amount you can afford today? Click here to donate >>**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2d4fa9927f9f4f32a264c8531089add2&_e=KAw56AEgOcjdHjk4o61DhPSLsO1QB1tXlLpj1Hkoap99gKHimc4wAPoD9l5WckKb_3te7ALx8Frw-TXkKlUtbIY3U1kol_maHyBAD-9N170q253NXTDBfy_FObl_WoyOdOo_fnflGpdUaqFAJjZaa2NahGHKdKsQ9fVtm-EV81hX_itDnFl1cteD7Wii8x1QuT0UT82yzjAJg34wyUn05KhVzxK10mdZeHMsBr0HXB8P1CZYmRGziD1V5oCOZBy0k_wbmImXFwLBfDk1l_nlDrVKYJEd6TONdM8EegXtUUI%3D)

**How I Started BLEXIT**

I was an All-American high school football player in Fort Worth, Texas. I accepted a full athletic scholarship from the University of Arizona in 2005. I played at Arizona for five years and entered the NFL Draft in 2010; however, God had other plans.

With my entire family around, I was not drafted. I was so angry. I ripped my shirt off. But, God had other plans for me.

This led me to join the Tucson police force, and it changed my life forever.

I learned what it meant to put my life on the line to save others. I woke up every morning to thank Jesus that I got to live another day to serve. This experience taught me a lot, but it was foundational to learning about the lies of BLM.

Learning that BLM is lying to Black communities and teaching them to hate the police forever changed my opinion on the "Black Lives Matter" organization. But more importantly, I learned not to be a victim. Not getting drafted into the NFL taught me life lessons I wouldn't have learned otherwise. I learned to serve others.

Now, I'm giving back to the Black community to make sure they don't become bought into this toxic victimhood mentality that BLM pushes.

[_**Can you help me reach Black neighborhoods with a message of individualism, freedom, and entrepreneurship? Click here to donate any amount >>**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2d4fa9927f9f4f32a264c8531089add2&_e=KAw56AEgOcjdHjk4o61DhPSLsO1QB1tXlLpj1Hkoap99gKHimc4wAPoD9l5WckKb_3te7ALx8Frw-TXkKlUtbIY3U1kol_maHyBAD-9N170q253NXTDBfy_FObl_WoyOdOo_fnflGpdUaqFAJjZaa1XkHEcc5ReqT5VLKjnKQJN3TR5QDHh4JLkyUsyO2cxVIWb8GAPXoQdxU95JmhZgwsPY1JbkR5GvWK7Z52S_OC3iabO-lG0YlYF0oTpEy1E8eCnPZ5hmSro7_dlMoiwQq9b4SJXpWeSJYvop4PGG5Pc%3D)

BLM incites lawlessness. BLEXIT stands for the rule of law.

BLM destroys communities. BLEXIT empowers them.

BLM only sees the color of your skin. BLEXIT sees character.

BLM wants to disrupt families. BLEXT values the nuclear family.

_Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with 42 grassroots chapter programs in 42 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters._

**Here 's how you can help:**

_I am looking to raise $83,000 online to support BLEXIT during this critical year. We must expand our chapters, build new leaders, and reach people within Black communities_.

This is a long game we are playing. If this were a football game, we would only be in the 1st quarter.

BLM thinks they speak for Black communities, but we are taking over quickly and providing real opportunities for our members.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

**HOW BLEXIT Works**

**Step One:** We enter communities no one else dares to go into - Detroit, Baltimore, New Orleans, Houston, etc. We host events and set up chapters of volunteers who build a support network and help get our message of individualism and empowerment to Black neighborhoods.

**Step Two:** We send the best volunteers and chapter members to our Leadership Academy.

We build leaders from the ground up. In fact, our staff is full of stories of activists we hired from the Leadership Academy. They started as a chapter member and now work for us full time.

Other members graduate from the Leadership Academy, and then they go back into their communities to support others or start their own businesses.

As you can see, we are BUILDING neighborhoods, NOT destroying them.

**Step Three:** Our educational content, both online and in-person, is teaching Black communities ideas they will never hear in the mainstream media.

BLEXIT is teaching about individualism, pro-life, school choice, teaching REAL history (not Critical Race Theory), and creating patriotism among Black families.

**Step Four:** We host large events with hundreds, sometimes thousands of attendees. Our events bring music, live entertainment, and education to Black communities.

What I really want to emphasize is this - BLEXIT is a "DO" tank! We are out there meeting people in neighborhoods.

Friend, this is deeply personal for me as a Black man.

We have to save our communities. We must save our country from the toxic and divisive organizations like BLM that are tearing down our businesses and livelihoods.

clean_body: Friend, I am a Black man, and I 'm telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America - Black Lives Matter. Now, I know what you're thinking... What about the KKK, or what about neo-nazis? I ask, "what about them is influential?!" This is 2022. Does the KKK have institutional power like BLM does? Is the KKK receiving millions of dollars from corporations and Hollywood celebrities? No. They aren't, but BLM is. BLM claims to speak for Black communities. But all I ever hear from BLM is how much they hate America. They only focus on victimhood to divide us as the greatest nation on Earth. BLM cries out for action, but the only action they do is burn down Black neighborhoods and cozy up to corporations. I saw the hypocrisy long ago. That 's why I started the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens. BLEXIT is a non-profit bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America 's black and minority communities is that you are NOT a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. I believe God has put me on this mission to reach Black communities. I'll tell you the full story of how I cofounded BLEXIT with Candace, but first, I must ask for your immediate support. How I Started BLEXIT I was an All-American high school football player in Fort Worth, Texas. I accepted a full athletic scholarship from the University of Arizona in 2005. I played at Arizona for five years and entered the NFL Draft in 2010; however, God had other plans. With my entire family around, I was not drafted. I was so angry. I ripped my shirt off. But, God had other plans for me. This led me to join the Tucson police force, and it changed my life forever. I learned what it meant to put my life on the line to save others. I woke up every morning to thank Jesus that I got to live another day to serve. This experience taught me a lot, but it was foundational to learning about the lies of BLM. Learning that BLM is lying to Black communities and teaching them to hate the police forever changed my opinion on the "Black Lives Matter" organization. But more importantly, I learned not to be a victim. Not getting drafted into the NFL taught me life lessons I wouldn't have learned otherwise. I learned to serve others. Now, I'm giving back to the Black community to make sure they don't become bought into this toxic victimhood mentality that BLM pushes. BLM incites lawlessness. BLEXIT stands for the rule of law. BLM destroys communities. BLEXIT empowers them. BLM only sees the color of your skin. BLEXIT sees character. BLM wants to disrupt families. BLEXT values the nuclear family. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with 42 grassroots chapter programs in 42 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. Here 's how you can help: I am looking to raise $83,000 online to support BLEXIT during this critical year. We must expand our chapters, build new leaders, and reach people within Black communities. This is a long game we are playing. If this were a football game, we would only be in the 1st quarter. BLM thinks they speak for Black communities, but we are taking over quickly and providing real opportunities for our members. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today: HOW BLEXIT Works Step One: We enter communities no one else dares to go into - Detroit, Baltimore, New Orleans, Houston, etc. We host events and set up chapters of volunteers who build a support network and help get our message of individualism and empowerment to Black neighborhoods. Step Two: We send the best volunteers and chapter members to our Leadership Academy. We build leaders from the ground up. In fact, our staff is full of stories of activists we hired from the Leadership Academy. They started as a chapter member and now work for us full time. Other members graduate from the Leadership Academy, and then they go back into their communities to support others or start their own businesses. As you can see, we are BUILDING neighborhoods, NOT destroying them. Step Three: Our educational content, both online and in-person, is teaching Black communities ideas they will never hear in the mainstream media. BLEXIT is teaching about individualism, pro-life, school choice, teaching REAL history (not Critical Race Theory), and creating patriotism among Black families. Step Four: We host large events with hundreds, sometimes thousands of attendees. Our events bring music, live entertainment, and education to Black communities. What I really want to emphasize is this - BLEXIT is a "DO" tank! We are out there meeting people in neighborhoods. Friend, this is deeply personal for me as a Black man. We have to save our communities. We must save our country from the toxic and divisive organizations like BLM that are tearing down our businesses and livelihoods. So, please, I implore you to send any amount you generously can. We are a 501(c)(3) organization, and your support is tax-deductible. People ask me, "What does BLEXIT mean?" It is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. " If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim, you become your own oppressor." \- Candace Owens We believe in Faith, Freedom, and Family. With those three principles intact, you can find prosperity no matter how your life may have started. And I believe that is what will save us all in the end. name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Reaction to House Speaker Election
body:
| | | **For Immediate Release:**
January 7, 2023 **Tea Party Patriots Action Reacts to McCarthy’s Election to Speaker** Atlanta, GA – On Friday night, Kevin McCarthy was elected Speaker of the U.S. House. In response, Tea Party Patriots Action Honorary Chairman Jenny Beth Martin released the following statement: “We appreciate the courageous 20 Members of Congress who stood firm for structural reforms to improve how Congress functions. The courageous 20 showed a commitment to America and the Constitution as they worked to change the Rules of the House of Representatives.

“I look forward to watching as Speaker Kevin McCarthy keeps his commitment to adhere to the Rules, which the courageous 20 Members of Congress have said are the best House Rules in our lifetimes, and the other parts of the agreement he has made with the 20.

“Some across America, and many inside the chamber, saw the process as uncomfortable. Transformative changes to the status quo are never an easy process. Nevertheless, the Republican Conference showed a willingness to push through the discomfort to decentralize power away from the Speaker's position and restore individual Representatives' ability to represent their constituents. As such, this process has been good for the People's House and America.”
