clean_body: | | | For Immediate Release: January 7, 2023 Tea Party Patriots Action Reacts to McCarthy’s Election to Speaker Atlanta, GA – On Friday night, Kevin McCarthy was elected Speaker of the U.S. House. In response, Tea Party Patriots Action Honorary Chairman Jenny Beth Martin released the following statement: “We appreciate the courageous 20 Members of Congress who stood firm for structural reforms to improve how Congress functions. The courageous 20 showed a commitment to America and the Constitution as they worked to change the Rules of the House of Representatives. “I look forward to watching as Speaker Kevin McCarthy keeps his commitment to adhere to the Rules, which the courageous 20 Members of Congress have said are the best House Rules in our lifetimes, and the other parts of the agreement he has made with the 20. “Some across America, and many inside the chamber, saw the process as uncomfortable. Transformative changes to the status quo are never an easy process. Nevertheless, the Republican Conference showed a willingness to push through the discomfort to decentralize power away from the Speaker's position and restore individual Representatives' ability to represent their constituents. As such, this process has been good for the People's House and America.” | | | | | Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. operates as a social welfare organization under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to Tea Party Patriots Action are not deductible as charitable contributions for income tax purposes. | | © 2023 Towne Lake Pkwy Ste 116-314, Woodstock, GA 30189 |

name: =?utf-8?Q?Willie=20Montague?=
subject: The First Black Speaker?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fredrick Douglass PAC
body:
| | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=eed8445617&e=fdefed58de)
---
Hello Peter,
There’s so much talk on Capitol Hill this week about the Speaker of the House. It’s one of the most important positions in all of our government with an incredible amount of power - so shouldn’t we make sure it goes to the right person?**Of course we should.** The process we’re seeing play out is something that I’m not mad about. Usually these things go on behind closed doors and we’re not allowed to see what happens. This time, it’s out in the open and twenty conservatives are fighting HARD for our values to be taken into consideration. **I’m with them.** I want to draw your attention to a specific moment though. When Byron Donalds was nominated on the Republican side, he was the **first** Black Republican nominated for House Speaker.He’s one of four Black Republicans in the House right now - and until the other day he was only one of two. **As a Black man myself, I hope you realize that’s somewhat of a problem.** The Republican Party has done more for Black prosperity and Black people than the Democrats... by far. The Democrats ONLY use them for votes in the worst possible way. **So why can we not get their votes? We have a serious outreach problem.**
| [CLICK HERE TO SUPPORT THE FREDRICK DOUGLASS PAC’S BLACK OUTREACH PROGRAMS!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=3c30dd5b73&e=fdefed58de)
---
I want to draw your attention to something. Look at Georgia. The Governor’s race was won handily by Brian Kemp. Let’s talk about why that was.The Kemp campaign invested quite heavily in Black outreach and **DOUBLED** their percentage of Black voters that voted in their favor.Now, did they get a huge percent of Black votes? No. But they don’t need it. It’s a math game. With just 12% of the Black vote in the GOP column, Brian Kemp was able to get a **huge win** even against Stacey Abrams - a Black candidate.
| [INVEST IN BLACK GOP OUTREACH RIGHT NOW!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=407abff755&e=fdefed58de)
---
My name is Willie Montague, I’m a Black man from Orlando Florida. I’m a pastor, activist and a lifelong Republican. I know that with the right amount of investment in Black outreach the GOP could secure MANY more victories across this nation... even in districts that we don’t typically think of.The issue? Our national GOP does **NOTHING** in terms of Black outreach. When I say Black outreach, I mean people on the ground... not just fancy Facebook ads and recruiting Black candidates. **You don’t even need to have a Black candidate to win Black votes. Look at the Democrats and Joe Biden.** Now, we’re not in an active election season so you might think the time for Black Outreach isn’t now? And **THAT** is where you’re wrong.Black voters HATE that Democrats only come around during election time. That’s why we need to be different. I need your investment in the Fredrick Douglass PAC **TODAY** so I can begin to organize our Black outreach programs to begin **IMMEDIATELY!** This huge Byron Donalds news is a perfect time. Did you see what Cori Bush said about Byron? Calling him a “prop” for white supremacy? Black people don’t respond well to that type of foolishness. **Our chance is now.****Rather than wait for the next election season to be a month away, let’s start NOW with our Black outreach programs!**
| [INVEST IMMEDIATELY BLACK GOP OUTREACH!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=6ec7b8b292&e=fdefed58de)
---
I’ve put together programs like this before — and I’m ready to step up and do what the national GOP won’t do. We need grassroots organizations like mine to empower leaders & take the lead on Black outreach.Without some kind of “angel investor” we don’t have the funds to do it and we do it on a rag-tag budget, but, we’re now ready to take this to the next level and need your help.For our efforts this quarter, we need to raise about $13,000 more than we have in the bank right now to reach the amount of people we want to reach.Our organization is set up to receive contributions of up to $5,000 from any person, but you can also donate as little as $10.00 and make a big difference for us. **The bottom line is this — we saw what happened in the midterms. No Red Wave materialized. We need a new strategy. Help ME make the change in Black outreach for the GOP so that we can have *actual* victories again.** Click below and lend your support to this very important cause!
| [INVEST $25 IN BLACK GOP OUTREACH!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=20417792ae&e=fdefed58de)
---

subject: 3 days to save abortion rights in Virginia
body:
Tuesday election
| | | | |

| | |

| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf6e34849-11ff-4e16-a455-a54da1e12755/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| | | | | Peter, **_We are only 3 days from a race that could turn Virginia into a state actively hostile to all women. _****_One that would treat half the population as Handmaid's-Tale-like vassals of the state._** [**_To prevent this tragedy, will you join Blue Amp Action in giving $5, $10, $25 to Aaron Rouse RIGHT NOW, to use immediately in a winning effort on Tuesday?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4c46e2e3-fc9d-438b-87c9-3df41faede88/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _This coming Tuesday, January 10th, is a crucial special election in Virginia to fill an open state senate seat. Why is this so crucial: Because anti-choice fanatic _Glenn Youngk is Governor. Republicans also control the state house. Our paper-thin, 21-19 majority in the state senate is all that stands between Virginia women and Republican promises to make women second class citizens. **There are two problems, though. ** **1) **The Manchin problem. One Democrat, Joe Morissey, refers to himself as "prof-life" and supports Republican efforts to ban abortion **2)** The open state senate seat to be filled Tuesday. If Republicans win, they'll just need Morissey to join them in voting against abortion--and it'll be banned in all cases.
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7f7bb6fd-3736-4395-8716-9837bd68a92e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| _**If we elect **_**_abortion-rights champion, Aaron Rouse, we'll protect _all_ the rights of 8.6 million Virginians. If we allow his opponent, extremist Kevin Adams to win, abortion becomes illegal in the Old Dominion. _**_**This will lead to women sustaining grievous injuries--even death--because of doctors too scared to treat them.**_ **_Rarely does one state senate seat make the difference._ _This one does. _** [**_What we do NOW will determine if Virginia women are forced to_**** _ hand over control of their bedrooms and doctors offices to Peeping Toms in the state legislature._****_ To prevent this tragedy, will you join Blue Amp Action in giving $5, $10, $25 to Aaron Rouse RIGHT NOW, to use immediately in a winning effort on Tuesday?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T57bc6881-f51a-490c-96e3-02246bb3f495/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for fighting for all women, for never giving into the tyrants who wish to control their most fundamental decision in their lives._ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can. | | or

name: Brandon Tatum
subject: BLM vs Blexit
body:
I am a Black man, and I’m telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America - Black Lives Mat
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=315008cc28994d27afc0cf7fbd57b1d3&_e=ZYrDh3_QODUnP9XcGrbIKeuKt5A2YORR0Q1NZrDwKgOssxuk5FZxONG2cO3zMnTDRFHutWM4KbvW22mE5Yuok-eWW6JC5bidCn9AgjDuuRI2c6uH6tKUXlQ6nui5L6wEtd03k75bWtsj8XOGbQkcus1wWrmlpJGFkVQVNlNAOXFXI9XvLKeTtJ4H6YZdYHGKgeZgn177h4W7Tk53eh_nHwEydAlFvKjbvJjp2yxrX2RBC99OtJnO_1GHoSFrNVirlNMLe_FOkGFptwj1CSBdRQlu-fPDk3ppJOcIwLSRFac%3D)

Friend,

**I am a Black man, and I 'm telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America - _Black Lives Matter_.**

Now, I know what you're thinking... _What about the KKK, or what about neo-nazis?_

I ask, "what about them is influential?!"

This is 2022. Does the KKK have institutional power like BLM does? Is the KKK receiving millions of dollars from corporations and Hollywood celebrities?

No. They aren't, but BLM is.

BLM claims to speak for Black communities. But all I ever hear from BLM is how much they hate America. They only focus on victimhood to divide us as the greatest nation on Earth. BLM cries out for action, but the only action they do is burn down Black neighborhoods and cozy up to corporations.

I saw the hypocrisy long ago. **That 's why I started the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens. **

**BLEXIT** is a non-profit bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

_Our message to America 's black and minority communities is that you are NOT a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture_.

I believe God has put me on this mission to reach Black communities. I'll tell you the full story of how I cofounded BLEXIT with Candace, but first, I must ask for your immediate support.

[_**Can you please support BLEXIT by sending a gift of $5, $10, $20.22, $100, or any amount you can afford today? Click here to donate >>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=315008cc28994d27afc0cf7fbd57b1d3&_e=ZYrDh3_QODUnP9XcGrbIKeuKt5A2YORR0Q1NZrDwKgOssxuk5FZxONG2cO3zMnTDRFHutWM4KbvW22mE5Yuok-eWW6JC5bidCn9AgjDuuRI2c6uH6tKUXlQ6nui5L6wEtd03k75bWtsj8XOGbQkcumAyrODTis4c6am77Mhg2CntJ5SPPiVRxwjO02V4s_ZpEZRbO9BT9FvBYYfCmMIheGMsb7PcmA1kDJBS4B6SPPDJcdTpLYajnVeiskWofa_xHFrcXlOmZVm_xbUzeucWTy_eWPQ0wRmbKVHa0KdLYsM%3D)

**How I Started BLEXIT**

I was an All-American high school football player in Fort Worth, Texas. I accepted a full athletic scholarship from the University of Arizona in 2005. I played at Arizona for five years and entered the NFL Draft in 2010; however, God had other plans.

With my entire family around, I was not drafted. I was so angry. I ripped my shirt off. But, God had other plans for me.

This led me to join the Tucson police force, and it changed my life forever.

I learned what it meant to put my life on the line to save others. I woke up every morning to thank Jesus that I got to live another day to serve. This experience taught me a lot, but it was foundational to learning about the lies of BLM.

Learning that BLM is lying to Black communities and teaching them to hate the police forever changed my opinion on the "Black Lives Matter" organization. But more importantly, I learned not to be a victim. Not getting drafted into the NFL taught me life lessons I wouldn't have learned otherwise. I learned to serve others.

Now, I'm giving back to the Black community to make sure they don't become bought into this toxic victimhood mentality that BLM pushes.

[_**Can you help me reach Black neighborhoods with a message of individualism, freedom, and entrepreneurship? Click here to donate any amount >>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=315008cc28994d27afc0cf7fbd57b1d3&_e=ZYrDh3_QODUnP9XcGrbIKeuKt5A2YORR0Q1NZrDwKgOssxuk5FZxONG2cO3zMnTDRFHutWM4KbvW22mE5Yuok-eWW6JC5bidCn9AgjDuuRI2c6uH6tKUXlQ6nui5L6wEtd03k75bWtsj8XOGbQkcur-E9kryKjyrFqTM598EVyxaYjqRWls-IiYFyThbh95j579yEDQKL_8Osfa02aoN54Rw2m3_DD4T7SfVR_lKhnwMepsYzvEZ5Xgq2rQXE3Ira_JTFAD2U2HdJf_ifOJC9FrtOmEv86UOBwjdyy4RcOQ%3D)

BLM incites lawlessness. BLEXIT stands for the rule of law.

BLM destroys communities. BLEXIT empowers them.

BLM only sees the color of your skin. BLEXIT sees character.

BLM wants to disrupt families. BLEXT values the nuclear family.

_Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with 42 grassroots chapter programs in 42 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters._

**Here 's how you can help:**

_I am looking to raise $83,000 online to support BLEXIT during this critical year. We must expand our chapters, build new leaders, and reach people within Black communities_.

This is a long game we are playing. If this were a football game, we would only be in the 1st quarter.

BLM thinks they speak for Black communities, but we are taking over quickly and providing real opportunities for our members.

**HOW BLEXIT Works**

**Step One:** We enter communities no one else dares to go into - Detroit, Baltimore, New Orleans, Houston, etc. We host events and set up chapters of volunteers who build a support network and help get our message of individualism and empowerment to Black neighborhoods.

**Step Two:** We send the best volunteers and chapter members to our Leadership Academy.

We build leaders from the ground up. In fact, our staff is full of stories of activists we hired from the Leadership Academy. They started as a chapter member and now work for us full time.

Other members graduate from the Leadership Academy, and then they go back into their communities to support others or start their own businesses.

As you can see, we are BUILDING neighborhoods, NOT destroying them.

**Step Three:** Our educational content, both online and in-person, is teaching Black communities ideas they will never hear in the mainstream media.

BLEXIT is teaching about individualism, pro-life, school choice, teaching REAL history (not Critical Race Theory), and creating patriotism among Black families.

**Step Four:** We host large events with hundreds, sometimes thousands of attendees. Our events bring music, live entertainment, and education to Black communities.

What I really want to emphasize is this - BLEXIT is a "DO" tank! We are out there meeting people in neighborhoods.

Friend, this is deeply personal for me as a Black man.

We have to save our communities. We must save our country from the toxic and divisive organizations like BLM that are tearing down our businesses and livelihoods.

clean_body: I am a Black man, and I’m telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America - Black Lives Mat Friend, I am a Black man, and I 'm telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America - Black Lives Matter. Now, I know what you're thinking... What about the KKK, or what about neo-nazis? I ask, "what about them is influential?!" This is 2022. Does the KKK have institutional power like BLM does? Is the KKK receiving millions of dollars from corporations and Hollywood celebrities? No. They aren't, but BLM is. BLM claims to speak for Black communities. But all I ever hear from BLM is how much they hate America. They only focus on victimhood to divide us as the greatest nation on Earth. BLM cries out for action, but the only action they do is burn down Black neighborhoods and cozy up to corporations. I saw the hypocrisy long ago. That 's why I started the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens. BLEXIT is a non-profit bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America 's black and minority communities is that you are NOT a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. I believe God has put me on this mission to reach Black communities. I'll tell you the full story of how I cofounded BLEXIT with Candace, but first, I must ask for your immediate support. How I Started BLEXIT I was an All-American high school football player in Fort Worth, Texas. I accepted a full athletic scholarship from the University of Arizona in 2005. I played at Arizona for five years and entered the NFL Draft in 2010; however, God had other plans. With my entire family around, I was not drafted. I was so angry. I ripped my shirt off. But, God had other plans for me. This led me to join the Tucson police force, and it changed my life forever. I learned what it meant to put my life on the line to save others. I woke up every morning to thank Jesus that I got to live another day to serve. This experience taught me a lot, but it was foundational to learning about the lies of BLM. Learning that BLM is lying to Black communities and teaching them to hate the police forever changed my opinion on the "Black Lives Matter" organization. But more importantly, I learned not to be a victim. Not getting drafted into the NFL taught me life lessons I wouldn't have learned otherwise. I learned to serve others. Now, I'm giving back to the Black community to make sure they don't become bought into this toxic victimhood mentality that BLM pushes. BLM incites lawlessness. BLEXIT stands for the rule of law. BLM destroys communities. BLEXIT empowers them. BLM only sees the color of your skin. BLEXIT sees character. BLM wants to disrupt families. BLEXT values the nuclear family. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with 42 grassroots chapter programs in 42 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. Here 's how you can help: I am looking to raise $83,000 online to support BLEXIT during this critical year. We must expand our chapters, build new leaders, and reach people within Black communities. This is a long game we are playing. If this were a football game, we would only be in the 1st quarter. BLM thinks they speak for Black communities, but we are taking over quickly and providing real opportunities for our members. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Step Two: We send the best volunteers and chapter members to our Leadership Academy. We build leaders from the ground up. In fact, our staff is full of stories of activists we hired from the Leadership Academy. They started as a chapter member and now work for us full time. Other members graduate from the Leadership Academy, and then they go back into their communities to support others or start their own businesses. As you can see, we are BUILDING neighborhoods, NOT destroying them. Step Three: Our educational content, both online and in-person, is teaching Black communities ideas they will never hear in the mainstream media. BLEXIT is teaching about individualism, pro-life, school choice, teaching REAL history (not Critical Race Theory), and creating patriotism among Black families. Step Four: We host large events with hundreds, sometimes thousands of attendees. Our events bring music, live entertainment, and education to Black communities. What I really want to emphasize is this - BLEXIT is a "DO" tank! We are out there meeting people in neighborhoods. Friend, this is deeply personal for me as a Black man. We have to save our communities. We must save our country from the toxic and divisive organizations like BLM that are tearing down our businesses and livelihoods. So, please, I implore you to send any amount you generously can. We are a 501(c)(3) organization, and your support is tax-deductible. People ask me, "What does BLEXIT mean?" It is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. **To: The January 6th Committee
From: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38127?t=8&akid=5984%2E878179%2Evu-oZI)**

Dear January 6th Committee,

Exposing Donald Trump’s involvement in the January 6th attempted insurrection is saving our Democracy.

I know that persevering through brutal attacks from Trump’s MAGA stooges in Congress wasn’t easy.

But, spending countless hours combing over evidence to find the truth about that horrific day was crucial work.

Last week, you made me proud to be an American.

I’m so proud that we have leaders like YOU who are working to give the American people the truth about the attack on our Democracy.

**The bravery you’ve shown in standing up for what’s right will go down in history.**

Despite the attacks you’ve endured and the censorship you’ve received, you’ve never wavered.

**So thank you. Our country is better because of your leadership.** [**Today, I’m signing this letter and making a donation to VPP to keep electing leaders like you all.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38127?t=9&akid=5984%2E878179%2Evu-oZI) | [DONATE $5 TO SIGN THE LETTER »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38127?t=10&akid=5984%2E878179%2Evu-oZI)

A Grateful Democrat

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57033984/386665676/-1511406121?refcode=em_fr_2023.01.07_b1_cd_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzBkYjY2MS1iODhlLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4HeouEP702Bs46giOGOCGuGXFngwPr2JtO6FefjYgIU=) Derek, last night I was sworn in as a member of the 118th Congress. It is an honor to have the opportunity to serve my country once again and to represent western Pennsylvania and all of the hardworking people that call it home.

**Today is the beginning of our next journey, Derek, and I’m so grateful to have you by my side.**

The Republican dysfunction that played out over the past week is an example of what happens when our leaders put politics over people. Derek, you sent me to Congress to push back against that extremism and chaos.

**That’s why every day, in every decision, whether I’m in western Pennsylvania or in Washington, I promise I will always put you, your families, and this country first.** I will dedicate my time in Congress to fighting for our common good, for our shared prosperity, and for a government that serves all of us and puts people first.

Derek, thank you for your support. Without you, and folks just like you throughout western Pennsylvania, none of this would have been possible. **I’m so excited to see what we accomplish together next.**

Let’s get to work,

Chris Deluzio | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57033988/386665677/-1511406121?refcode=em_fr_2023.01.07_b1_cd_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzBkYjY2MS1iODhlLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4HeouEP702Bs46giOGOCGuGXFngwPr2JtO6FefjYgIU=)**

**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57034588/386665861/-417100599?refcode=em_fr_2023.01.07_b1_hj_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGQxMjViOC1iODhlLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ou-LgbcEqYHk5jnyMJsupgDqPhmP_UfZjip1tG-QFYU=)**
**[Peter, I was just officially sworn in as House Democratic Leader, after 14 failed, dysfunctional attempts by Republicans to convene our Congress. Now, I’m asking you to help me lead Democrats in a historic fundraising day – 1,000 gifts in my first 24 hours – to show we stand ready to fight extreme MAGA Republicans and win back the House Majority for Democrats. Will you split a gift between myself and Emilia Sykes? I can’t tell you how much it would mean to see your donation>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57034590/386665862/-417100599?refcode=em_fr_2023.01.07_b1_hj_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGQxMjViOC1iODhlLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ou-LgbcEqYHk5jnyMJsupgDqPhmP_UfZjip1tG-QFYU=)

Peter, as the new Democratic Leader, I want to take this moment to share what I stand for and earn your support:**

I was raised by working-class parents.

I’m a product of New York City’s public schools and grew up in a predominantly African-American neighborhood in Brooklyn.

**Now, I’m leading House Democrats forward as we fight for opportunity in every single zip code and an economy that works for everyone. We’re not wasting a single second getting to work.**

Which is why I'm asking for a historic surge of support – 1,000 Democratic gifts in my first 24 hours as Leader – to lay the groundwork for Democrats to reclaim the House and continue to get big things done for the American people. Can I count on you to split a gift between myself and Emilia Sykes? _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57034593/386665863/-417100599?refcode=em_fr_2023.01.07_b1_hj_all-nd&amount=5&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGQxMjViOC1iODhlLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ou-LgbcEqYHk5jnyMJsupgDqPhmP_UfZjip1tG-QFYU=) | [$25 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57034595/386665864/-417100599?refcode=em_fr_2023.01.07_b1_hj_all-nd&amount=25&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGQxMjViOC1iODhlLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ou-LgbcEqYHk5jnyMJsupgDqPhmP_UfZjip1tG-QFYU=)

Peter, I will always fight for what’s right, and I don’t care if it makes me a target of extreme MAGA Republicans.

I served as a Trump impeachment manager – _even though I knew Republicans would smear me for it._

I helped House Democrats pass the first meaningful gun safety legislation in 30 years – _even though it made us a target of the corporate gun manufacturers._

I stood with our caucus to call out corporate price-gouging – _even though we knew that special interest groups would fight back._

I know House Democrats will continue to find common ground when possible, fight extremism when necessary and always put People over Politics.

**And I know we can win back the House – the right way – but I need your help to act fast.**

Now that MAGA extremists have thrown the Republican Party into disarray, this is our best shot to show just how strong Democrats are.

[**So I’m humbly asking 1,000 Democrats to chip in during my first 24 hours as Leader and prove that we will spare no expense to reclaim our House Majority >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57034613/386665870/-417100599?refcode=em_fr_2023.01.07_b1_hj_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGQxMjViOC1iODhlLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ou-LgbcEqYHk5jnyMJsupgDqPhmP_UfZjip1tG-QFYU=)

Keep the faith,
Hakeem

**A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change.** **As the _State Representative for Akron_ and _Ohio's State House Minority Leader_ , _Emilia cut through the divisiveness to deliver results_.**

name: Team NPP
subject: Fellow activist, are you still in our corner?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project_
body:
Every year is a new opportunity to empower our communities.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57034945/386665965/409185284?refcode=EM_FR_230107NewYear_N_TEAM_90DO_4_NG_B_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRkMTVhODE0LWI5OGUtZWQxMS05ZDdiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QWfbsOvhXgR5x94ObQ3zXjik52xbROlfcHoA2VFBRE0=)
| Fellow activist,

**We may have entered a new year, but our mission remains the same:** empowering the Commonwealth’s historically disenfranchised communities of immigrants, youth, Black, Indigenous, and other people of color to make their voices heard in our state government.

2023 may not have quite the same stakes as last year, but in no way does that mean it is an “off-year.” Every year is a new opportunity to work towards a Commonwealth that works for ALL Pennsylvanians.

We are one of the only organizations in Pennsylvania doing voter registration year-round, and we will be out in full force all throughout 2023 to uplift our communities, better our system, protect our rights, and so much more — but we need you in our corner to do it. **[You were there for us last year, and we have no doubt that you will be here for us again this year. That is why we’re asking you, fellow activist, to pitch in $10 right now to support us on our continuous journey for equality and justice for all. name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: What should we expect from our lawmakers? – update from Mississippi’s favorite think tank
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-8132736?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,

**Kevin McCarthy was expecting to be elected House Speaker in Washington this week. So far things haven’t worked out that way.** In multiple votes, a small number of conservatives have refused to support him for the job of Speaker, leaving everything in limbo.

Some will say this is evidence of a dysfunctional and divided conservative movement. Others might point out that the issues of contention are vital. **Unless the legitimate concerns of those opposed to McCarthy about House procedures are taken seriously, how is the House going to do anything other than rubber stamp the growth of big government?**
---
|
---
| **Whatever the truth of it, watching events unfold in Washington this week underlines the importance of keeping a close eye on our elected lawmakers after they’ve received our vote.**

To help folk in Mississippi keep track of our state lawmakers during the new 2023 legislative session, we have built this bill tracker. You can [view it here](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=3bccc2aa60&e=5703353baa).

Our bill tracker will allow you to see every bill under consideration. Our assessment of the key bills cuts through the political bluster and provides a succinct analysis based on a simple question; does this measure extend liberty or not?

We won’t just be monitoring bills. **As Mississippi’s free market think tank, we are very active in working to ensure real conservative reform.** In the 2023 session, we would like to see:

1. **Tax cuts****:** With a massive state budget surplus, we have just published a Responsible Budget for Mississippi that authentic conservatives can support.
2. **Action against ‘woke’ corporatism:** The ESG (Environmental Social and Governance) agenda promoted by big money managers is forcing publicly listed corporations to promote a “woke” agenda. New legislation is needed to help restore the voices of everyday citizens in the economy.
3. **Giving people the power of Recall:** Local residents should have the power to recall ineffective and incompetent local officials.
4. **School choice:** Legislation is needed to break the monopoly of the Charter School Authorizer Board, which acts as a roadblock to reform. At the same time, we need a bill to ensure transparency in education, so that moms and dads can see what their child is being taught
5. **A Women's Bill of Rights** : We need to codify, for purposes of law and regulations, the common sense—and previously self-evident—definition of “woman.”
6. **Cuts to the cost of Healthcare** : Too many people in our state are unable to afford healthcare. The answer is not to hose more federal dollars at local healthcare, which would simply inflate costs. Instead, we need a concerted effort to eliminate the restrictive practices that make health care more expensive by preventing new providers from operating.
7. **A Parents' Bill of Rights** Young people have been subjected to irreversible gender reassignment procedures that they have subsequently come to regret. Our proposal would stop this in our state.
8. **A Mississippi REINS Act** : Bureaucrats like to make decisions and spend taxpayers’ money without accountability. To combat this, conservatives in our state should support a “Regulations from the Executive in Need of Scrutiny” (REINS) bill.
9. **Action to fix the right of Initiative: **It is time to fix the right of initiative so that the public is able to vote to change state law.

**Each Wednesday Tyler Jones, our head of legislative outreach, will send you an update on progress in the legislature. She will update you on what your lawmakers are actually doing to deliver these conservative reforms.**
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=a3dbf20428&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Have a wonderful weekend!

Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO

---
|
---

In multiple votes, a small number of conservatives have refused to support him for the job of Speaker, leaving everything in limbo. Some will say this is evidence of a dysfunctional and divided conservative movement. Others might point out that the issues of contention are vital. Unless the legitimate concerns of those opposed to McCarthy about House procedures are taken seriously, how is the House going to do anything other than rubber stamp the growth of big government? | | Whatever the truth of it, watching events unfold in Washington this week underlines the importance of keeping a close eye on our elected lawmakers after they’ve received our vote. To help folk in Mississippi keep track of our state lawmakers during the new 2023 legislative session, we have built this bill tracker. You can . Our bill tracker will allow you to see every bill under consideration. Our assessment of the key bills cuts through the political bluster and provides a succinct analysis based on a simple question; does this measure extend liberty or not? We won’t just be monitoring bills. As Mississippi’s free market think tank, we are very active in working to ensure real conservative reform. In the 2023 session, we would like to see: 1. Tax cuts: With a massive state budget surplus, we have just published a Responsible Budget for Mississippi that authentic conservatives can support. 2. Action against ‘woke’ corporatism: The ESG (Environmental Social and Governance) agenda promoted by big money managers is forcing publicly listed corporations to promote a “woke” agenda. New legislation is needed to help restore the voices of everyday citizens in the economy. 3. Giving people the power of Recall: Local residents should have the power to recall ineffective and incompetent local officials. 4. School choice: Legislation is needed to break the monopoly of the Charter School Authorizer Board, which acts as a roadblock to reform. At the same time, we need a bill to ensure transparency in education, so that moms and dads can see what their child is being taught 5. A Women's Bill of Rights : We need to codify, for purposes of law and regulations, the common sense—and previously self-evident—definition of “woman.” 6. Cuts to the cost of Healthcare : Too many people in our state are unable to afford healthcare. The answer is not to hose more federal dollars at local healthcare, which would simply inflate costs. Instead, we need a concerted effort to eliminate the restrictive practices that make health care more expensive by preventing new providers from operating. 7. A Parents' Bill of Rights Young people have been subjected to irreversible gender reassignment procedures that they have subsequently come to regret. Our proposal would stop this in our state. 8. A Mississippi REINS Act : Bureaucrats like to make decisions and spend taxpayers’ money without accountability. To combat this, conservatives in our state should support a “Regulations from the Executive in Need of Scrutiny” (REINS) bill. 9. Action to fix the right of Initiative: It is time to fix the right of initiative so that the public is able to vote to change state law. Each Wednesday Tyler Jones, our head of legislative outreach, will send you an update on progress in the legislature. She will update you on what your lawmakers are actually doing to deliver these conservative reforms. | "Forward this email to a friend!" | | Have a wonderful weekend! Warm regards, Douglas Carswell President & CEO | | |

clean_body: Friend, There’s an invasion happening, and Biden is doing nothing to stop it. And no, we’re not talking about Ukraine. This invasion is happening right here on America’s southern border. The largest immigration caravan reached Texas on Sunday, December 11, when over 1,000 people crossed the U.S.-Mexico border into El Paso, Texas. The next day, over 2,300 immigrants came into that sector in 24 hours. And that’s only what happened in 2 days near El Paso. Over 2 MILLION illegal immigrants have come across the southern border. And what is Biden doing about it? NOTHING. Friend, you and I need a leader that’s serious about taking on sanctuary cities and stopping illegal immigration. We need Ron DeSantis. We’re Ready for Ron, an America First grassroots movement working to recruit Ron for President in 2024 because we are tired of the hypocrisy of the Democrat Left. We’ve set a goal to raise $1 million before New Year’s Eve to help draft DeSantis to run for President. Ron EXPOSED the Left’s hypocrisy when he sent 50 illegal immigrants to Martha’s Vineyard, New Hampshire – Biden’s home state and where many Democrats, like the Obama family, own homes— sympathy and care were not what these immigrants found. Instead, the community declared an emergency and deployed the National Guard. The message they gave to America?2 MILLION illegal immigrants are fine as long as they're far away from the elite Left. The Left doesn’t care about helping legal immigrants, stopping human or drug trafficking, or any of the increasing number of crimes at our southern border. The best candidates for President need to prove an ability to govern. Ron has proven himself as a leader and a governor by keeping Florida open and thriving through the COVID pandemic. We need someone who will fight for freedom instead of giving in to the Insane Left, stand up against the woke globalists who support Biden, and call out the Left for their hypocrisy. We need Ron DeSantis. Can you help join the fight for America by helping us meet our goal of raising $1 million before the New Year to help us draft DeSantis? Click below to send your support. Thank you, Draft DeSantis For inquiries, please call: (561) 291-9897. . name: Andrea Salinas
subject: I’m ready to hit the ground running.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
Last night, I was sworn in to the 118th Congress to represent Oregon’s 6th District.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57038851/386670127/-2053298293?refcode=em_fr_2023.01.07_b1_as_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NThjMGVhYi1jMThlLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YgeNHr8yykQOJrltEUZX6194IIFb7r1PsQuwerxGSrQ=)
---
**Team, last night I had the distinct honor of being sworn in to the 118th Congress. I am so grateful and humbled to have the opportunity to represent our communities and the folks that call them home.** Today is a historic moment, as I am the first Latina to represent Oregon in Congress. My dad came to the United States from Mexico in 1950 and worked in the fields picking cotton and tomatoes before he was in the first grade. It's my family's story that made me believe change is possible in a single generation – but only if we work for it. I can’t promise that change will come easily. But I can promise that, no matter what lies ahead, I will be your champion – always. **It’s the honor of my lifetime to be your Congresswoman, and I will use every minute of my time in office to fight for a future that doesn’t leave anyone behind.** You, along with all of my other supporters, have built our people-powered campaign, and I am so incredibly proud to have you on my team. I’m so excited to see what we accomplish together next. _Andrea_ | _[Donate »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57038852/386670128/-2053298293?refcode=em_fr_2023.01.07_b1_as_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NThjMGVhYi1jMThlLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YgeNHr8yykQOJrltEUZX6194IIFb7r1PsQuwerxGSrQ=)_

name: VADEMS
subject: The Abortion Fight in Virginia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
Session starts in 4 days & the GOP is fighting to ban abortion in VA

|
---
Derek, **Republicans in the General Assembly are going after abortion rights in Virginia.** GOP Del. Marie March has proposed legislation that would create a **_total ban_** on abortion and Del. John McGuire introduced legislation to prevent women who receive Medicaid from getting abortion care - even in cases of abuse. _Fortunately, there is something Democrats can do._ **There’s a special election on Tuesday in SD-07 that could change the balance of power in the Virginia Senate** and block all of the anti-abortion legislation that the GOP puts forth from becoming law. [**That’s why we sent you this email — your support in this election is paramount. body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-jan2023-fr-january?refcode=E17393-20230101-headerfooter-header-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-jan2023-fr-january?refcode=E17393-20230101-headerfooter-header-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25]
Dear friends,

At long last, I have finally been sworn into the 118th Congress, and could not be more thankful for all we accomplished together last year.

Our fight to defend our institutions from MAGA extremists has never been more urgent, as we’ve seen their party fall into complete dysfunction on the House floor over the past few days. Despite this, I take my oath to defend our Constitution seriously and know I would not be here today without your continued support.

Regardless of who is in leadership, this is my pledge to you: You will always have a champion in me for truth, fairness, and our democracy.

I know this year will be full of challenges, but today I am focusing on my gratitude for your commitment to fighting alongside our team.

Thank you for everything,

Rep. Eric Swalwell

clean_body: Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. [] Dear friends, At long last, I have finally been sworn into the 118th Congress, and could not be more thankful for all we accomplished together last year. Our fight to defend our institutions from MAGA extremists has never been more urgent, as we’ve seen their party fall into complete dysfunction on the House floor over the past few days. Despite this, I take my oath to defend our Constitution seriously and know I would not be here today without your continued support. Regardless of who is in leadership, this is my pledge to you: You will always have a champion in me for truth, fairness, and our democracy. I know this year will be full of challenges, but today I am focusing on my gratitude for your commitment to fighting alongside our team. Thank you for everything, Rep. Eric Swalwell DONATE TO ERIC >> [] [] Text ERIC to 43033 to get text updates! On your phone? | | For years, the Republican party has done everything in its power to subvert our democracy and sow division among Americans. Republicans created a monster, in their quest to secure absolute power.**And now, like everyone knew it would, the monster is rearing its ugly head.** From throwing their support behind Trump, to their denial of the January 6 insurrection, to the countless lies they've told to Americans, the Republican party has welcomed extremism and chaos with open arms. We saw that when Congressional Republicans repeated Trump's Big Lie, even after his MAGA mob attacked the Capitol, and we're seeing it now as Republicans failed for days to elect a Speaker of the House. **Their party is controlled by incompetent liars and power-hungry sycophants. They have forced out anyone in their ranks who would stand up for our democracy. They played with fire, and now we're all getting burned.** Our democracy cannot move forward if it's being held hostage by Republicans stuck in a power struggle. This is a sign of what is to come with a Republican-led House: chaos, infighting, and standstill. They have made it clear they care little for the American people and even less for our democracy. **My Democratic colleagues in the House are eager to get to work for the American people and to create a more equitable America for all.**[**Will you join our subject: We can’t trust Joe Biden and Kamala Harris to do it...

body:
| | | Peter, When Joe Biden and Kamala Harris took their oaths of office, they promised to protect and defend our great nation.

_But right now, they’re doing NOTHING to keep Americans safe from one of the biggest dangers our country is facing..._

**...ILLEGAL IMMIGRATION.**

Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and the rest of the Democrats are letting drugs, weapons, and criminals pour into our country through the Southern border.

Right now, we’re counting on patriots like YOU to take a stand for our safety.

name: Grassroots Army
subject: Having Our Delegates Backs
body:
Delegates Should **NOT** Have To Pay For Convention
===================================================

###Hi Folks,

Garrett Soldano here.
---------------------

The Michigan Republican Party is going through unprecedented turmoil. For the first time in decades we have no say in the direction of our state. Now more than ever we need the stabilizing power of the Michigan Republican Party.
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Facts about the state of the MIGOP:
-----------------------------------

We have more candidates running for chair than ever before. (It’s not even close!)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The MIGOP is facing more financial uncertainty and instability than ever before.
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Party leadership is proposing a last minute**
-----------------------------------------------

**$50 dollar fee**
------------------

**to attend and participate in a convention you are elected to attend.**
------------------------------------------------------------------------

It is incredible to see so many grassroots driven candidates involved in this process. This is how it should be. In the past, many chairs have run with minimal challenges which leads to complacency, stagnation, and quite frankly, not much motivation to go above and beyond once elected as Chair.
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The Michigan Republican Party is facing one of the hardest fundraising environments in decades. The next Chair will be tasked with raising enough money for party operations (keeping the lights on, paying staff, party insurance policies, convention costs, legal fees, financial compliance etc) while at the same time making sure the party funds our candidates and to be the watchdog over the rampant overreach by Michigan Dems.
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

I don’t think anybody can make the argument that Whitmer, Nessel and Benson had a better message than Tudor Dixon, Matt DePerno or myself for that matter. Gretchen Whitmer out raised Tudor Dixon by nearly $28,000,000. This was unacceptable and the state party had the audacity to blame the loss on Tudor Dixon. The MIGOP has to take an active role to help our Republican candidate for President, our future U.S Senate candidate, all statewides, and to help our House and Senate caucuses take back a majority.
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Next week the MI GOP Central Committee will be voting on a proposal to implement a mandatory
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**$50 per delegate/alternate fee**
----------------------------------

to attend and vote at the convention. Furthermore, the idea is that if you do not pay beforehand and want to vote on convention day,
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**it's $75 on the day of convention!**
--------------------------------------

The precinct delegate is the backbone of our party. Over the past 2 years, we have elected thousands of new delegates who are still figuring out the convention process and this is simply not fair to them when you consider all we ask of these delegates already.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

If you agree, sign the petition
-------------------------------

[Sign The Petition](https://9l762.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/Yo8p5lqksausuhQK9kCWh3v9XMAeRxmJpkuPnb6K6mIGy8WhAatNwgMF89psHdWajRxHPwjJSp2BTbwAYXLhWnJGEKNZpI1kreQJV9P5dO8bi69-p1y4P-v-j9N05geo_go5DGw_pcl4nBAPrar0qLwUvu4v8hwRSv4eWxdEEYC3qRfUeQiK_td2B8gKYjPSiBP2rzDrm9dsKa_XL73T0io5DS_EpNcF9AIF-oPAHVrjq6vv81Q)

As candidates running for Chair, we are all auditioning to be your next leader of the biggest conservative organization in the state. When you boil it down, the leader of the party has two key responsibilities: to make sure Republicans around the state have a voice and to raise enough money to help Republicans secure victories.
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

If we elect a leader who does not have the ability to raise the funds necessary, we will not be able to compete in the fashion we need to win elections. On the same note, if we do not give every elected precinct delegate the opportunity to represent the constituents of their precinct, county and state; we are failing at our fundamental job.
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Conventions should not be a space for only those who can afford to cover the cost. After all we are facing Bidenflation, Whitmer tyranny and suppression from the establishment as it is.
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

There are a total of 10 candidates who have filed to run for MIGOP chair as of today. This is a great opportunity for every candidate to demonstrate their ability and priorities as the next leader of the MIGOP. Whoever the next Chair is will need to raise tens of millions of dollars if they want to have a chance of succeeding in 2024.
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The DePerno/Soldano ticket calls on all 10 candidates to agree to donate $20,000 each to the MIGOP to cover the convention costs on behalf of the precinct delegates around the state.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

This will serve as two major indicators in regards to the priorities of the next Chair:
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Proving you can raise a very small fraction of what will be needed to succeed.
------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Demonstrating that you believe EVERY elected and elevated delegate and alternate should be able to do their fundamental role they were elected to do without restriction.
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

If you agree, sign the petition
-------------------------------

[Sign The Petition](https://9l762.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/VA6YYVTXuEo5gKaxhA_P7IX0OTlckcW4GMQvka91njgafHb9-A9faiGKr7jt97YEwahHNNSVz_HOoGpqA6ee_tG0Z9v4ScXr4xMgjhuSdYa_QV8R3ybsCwARx41xDR_nKNxwfFWu6axQmRmLeaxdg2srs7dnVtDMOTUOxsL16s4vSddksatu2F7s2wGOUUXK9h7l1RbSnmRA9df4vm8m-qEKsvh3mEnoa-0WnDE_GB8m8ZPfVbE)

The DePerno/Soldano ticket vows to you that we will lead the charge to eliminate this burden from the very people who give their all to the party every single day in the name of conservatism. This is a fundamental function of the party and its delegates. Anybody running for the position of Chair/Co-Chair should agree with this notion.
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

We look forward to hearing from the other 9 candidates and if they are willing to pledge their support to you, our delegates, and to the future success of the MIGOP.
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Best Regards,
--------------

Garrett Soldano
----------------

**Grassroots Army**

8357 Barony Pt, 49071, Mattawan

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com

If you wish to unsubscribe, click on the Unsubscribe button below

[Update your preference](https://9l762.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/up/4OQyrTBy31vuhDpeANokWME53pNairDcPmPO1w) | [View in browser](https://9l762.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/mr/XTfzN2sLfEU_fWI3-w8c9dVicvRdd2KMdXYjmDArpE7aPlnp3ky-V74FVHDFjIhFd0qJsJf805BiiYGWptS16BoLdwyhUxaAvuAu50zQF4yGluaTdbWzYLXgLGz2RbIklSmYJ1yk) | [Unsubscribe](https://9l762.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/un/0NN6Ria-LizkWDPOaWO04E253ZyaGamvd-t7Zf-nppPVJlQo7LM85d2JrQRDQp4KfvugUb4tQSRmU2tU94lgLNSozNOXbOwAs0v4AuRI_gwRkZ3G5P7dqHwU-x5gpYlB0G_D6IsdykADgkSUz-xrzpfNB2QpiBaLftf1BgInKA)

To help you get back into the swing of things, we’ve gathered the highlights of what President Biden and the Democratic Party have been up to lately → | | |
---
Happy New Year, Peter! We hope you were able to enjoy a restful holiday season with your loved ones and reflect on all that we accomplished in 2022. From passing critical legislation to electing Democrats nationwide in last month’s midterms, we could not have done it without _you._ **To help you get back into the swing of things, we’ve gathered the highlights of what President Biden and the Democratic Party have been up to lately →**

* * *
**SWEARING IN NEW CONGRESSIONAL MEMBERS** This week, Vice President Harris swore in our United States senators -- including Sens. Catherine Cortez Masto, John Fetterman, Mark Kelly, Raphael Warnock, and more -- securing our Democratic Senate majority.
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhu6qjNNRCXJ6fi4PJDS5vIlp9IwjwxgLDCoXU0jZII7XQGIPo2sU_1PSECXYgG4xvGuTGH-LoO6KH0nVulYC0Odk-bo2K3zNMcc0H4S9uCvbL42NpjUu5D1GqAumkR1z6qLLfs6vm_Of04HzNbWbQRqQrOMprQmPJVAjaUMqgOXZO_J5ySQhKHzbc01O0NOShMGzrdZcE-Jzud7FNOrQ_S5OUj5sZtFc2YrPehDi2q4i3QEDlA_wHiGU0feYJqVmNpPE5_lxVLISM93zpc1OXV09KJVE3QdsjY0VVNSwbGt_jI-OMfDDaQ5qVFnTSUl1P0Voic-N5Yf-BDtw1aMpwcoFNcpzd6QrS0KG2HPaz1hl/3sn/hkZji5ObSZCX9GJnCNKnWQ/h0/VWxJG3C_T7nFq1aflUPeaamnwKeyuTIeVa59SjP9WdY)
The election of these Senators was the culmination of years of hard work, and grassroots support made it all possible. **[As we begin the new year, will you take a moment to sign our card welcoming the 118th Congress and pass along your warm wishes? It would mean so much.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0vWSczDM5JVQEwDVBPD9TM3GjKVvjEyw7Ks12JCosRgA8BPXd-On8_lcuMVU81grlsSdKtDvxvoz0Lfi5GQlxMcAt9NkeY3713lg9e4dOOqu5EeKt93om8L2r2Kv3LV55EWKWGJb9YmccL75QCO88IsKduuSGvgn_VuVcHJsHJuHzK9G6U7trNYQK3Gbx2qe8mK3BjCdNrNQ7UxRSx9AK74rG5zloxin-aE5lrDvn0I_LDOCh3hoI52ki2noWh-EZktHtXww-pC133jmPO_rLDqLVN68yZnTD9j_xoi33gg3aCUC5mcdwr6p7QSpdj0jncoGXPPbHE11wr9JfePzxGdp1JixnU41LLLXadz_pvSOwQ1GpIBa_OvzZdLILylffw/3sn/hkZji5ObSZCX9GJnCNKnWQ/h1/LZjn08II9CF9YjlA1XA5eytCDewBdswDr2j-kcgHuBs)**
| | | [SIGN THE CARD](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0vWSczDM5JVQEwDVBPD9TM3GjKVvjEyw7Ks12JCosRgA8BPXd-On8_lcuMVU81grlsSdKtDvxvoz0Lfi5GQlxMcAt9NkeY3713lg9e4dOOqu5EeKt93om8L2r2Kv3LV55EWKWGJb9YmccL75QCO88IsKduuSGvgn_VuVcHJsHJuHzK9G6U7trNYQK3Gbx2qe8kGshU041EqhDcHEtgxsALtVTP72ecycn0tWsWhX10UQFKuweV0F2Z5FFywU46fTeczb-iGKza5j5E75iAgVggmGAPA0DWmVx3SC2LSlYJYibLMW5zvM_PDtFYjL0iUUIxRR1qIR8ub1RAiFxet2gC-eTqM4xDSKV8cnLFskbdCClQtNk9Ej0UPjPUdlFXWcWA/3sn/hkZji5ObSZCX9GJnCNKnWQ/h2/_1zYk0HXMaOSddU587QG9T4bO3RZ7Vg-zOExvjlnCVg)

* * *
**DELIVERING BIPARTISAN RESULTS**
President Biden and Congress recently wrapped up one of the most productive legislative sessions in decades. From the _Bipartisan Infrastructure Law_ to the _Bipartisan Safer Communities Act_ , our elected officials are making history by passing legislation to build a better America. Take a look at the 65 bills signed into law in 2022:

---

* * *
**INVESTING IN OUR NATION’S INFRASTRUCTURE**
President Biden’s economic plan is proving that when America invests in ourselves -- especially in our infrastructure, clean energy, and high-growth industries that are critical to our economic and national security -- we can build a bottom-up and middle-out economy.
To highlight how we’re rebuilding our nation’s infrastructure and creating good-paying jobs and to announce additional investments, President Biden, Vice President Harris, and senior administration officials are traveling to communities across the country.

| | [READ MORE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDEA0Es8AR8U9h_eL5jzwmAKy8CPWXmMSKb979xq4aFRM4lpQfyzJOHP_MkCQvfdebGRRib0U6xW5Zq9VCNnk4icsPcsv-3zHV4OJhCVsnu8xAR5fAT5FUNBPhG3OdPcxJwLneQCkdo16epbyqcUSf4skTAaN7rKVj0UY0cnzMEPFw32bkZApaqIzX8qYhN8arp-7oIjw-7vOm6X6WXjiHG-Gpic_EbS48jiHto_GfmrayznN_lh0FqSx6FSvQ3uRx73s9MPxAFY1V3Io3GNvalGs9_lqoLUBKCBYu7ulxsWMYRJIMM_Apnfj8hHi9UzajEOpS_HDZanv7Rm5gWD-of9DvCM2rWQtrwvfK-0Ij6O4nihwpGRWIVD4vFsFz9mxNHnCoi50ilqgKupKBKQMQNQ74hLi63cKdNUxrfNDVyZUOMT1DKvjqGljnewtAGivFhfPHGtKX44q046iO83UvaxJifVPMy6iX5d2ASnaManvEifDMrtTOM54RSM-y3LnE19X98-OhzpyKLj8K5y3rl4/3sn/hkZji5ObSZCX9GJnCNKnWQ/h5/mmxzdsgwXIpK1FqGu6UdbnDypHrthlZRJvhKQNalDPY)

* * *
**[BACK IN STOCK] ‘HATE HAS NO HOME HERE’ TOTE**
Tell the world that hate has no home here with our bestselling tote. Start the new year by sporting this American-made, union-printed bag -- and the best part? **Every purchase you make from the Official Democratic Store helps elect Democrats up and down the ballot in every ZIP code.**

[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTJh31EiYifSjElOovENR-1bUA4a_aKioS6hedOFNdTIcmsvhirPXyZG5oTcq5-OtvOkWdzixklRvjSbhuLiSBzRCGhAOKTFfBu7pcfPqujh-ou-9c1tdHFYVo7NuuP7T358NuTS65GbKSaYFHcSKpSrWvBScOyuliFwsTYhPt5aVe4zzC7rMnV7jWwYUMcVqBpPFjXIwTq7Rs6YOmrZmWGnIg9uLw_aXAC1q4qACc_9CnXQKLmlZevqt4fQYD74Fu5rEG-HMbAUHuumNP_QFOHmyzD-uZvm1jAZriwSqK41qCoLQfNn4jRw5nBmZYdTdLbQr3N5ltpLw_VOQnnfMf9PNapFSB6zAbQYa2O-iZ4sCVhAEIwU9QIOI58uCEVZVIxrXf_SCak0ib4QycW_KIcIZLziuJFjPo_lst8weMO7j3xic2NtD1mEFC33bcO82Fg/3sn/hkZji5ObSZCX9GJnCNKnWQ/h6/Tk8xFwLDSyhvodA6WD-VsCZV_L7hxgfzXVunrbiC67k)

* * *
**NEW YEAR’S RESOLUTION: RENEW YOUR SUPPORT FOR DEMOCRATIC CANDIDATES**
The DNC is the only party committee tasked with electing Democrats in every ZIP code, from the school board to the Senate. As we always say, there are no off-years. clean_body: To help you get back into the swing of things, we’ve gathered the highlights of what President Biden and the Democratic Party have been up to lately → | | | Happy New Year, Peter! We hope you were able to enjoy a restful holiday season with your loved ones and reflect on all that we accomplished in 2022. From passing critical legislation to electing Democrats nationwide in last month’s midterms, we could not have done it without you. To help you get back into the swing of things, we’ve gathered the highlights of what President Biden and the Democratic Party have been up to lately → SWEARING IN NEW CONGRESSIONAL MEMBERS This week, Vice President Harris swore in our United States senators -- including Sens. Catherine Cortez Masto, John Fetterman, Mark Kelly, Raphael Warnock, and more -- securing our Democratic Senate majority. The election of these Senators was the culmination of years of hard work, and grassroots support made it all possible. | | | DELIVERING BIPARTISAN RESULTS President Biden and Congress recently wrapped up one of the most productive legislative sessions in decades. From the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law to the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act , our elected officials are making history by passing legislation to build a better America. Take a look at the 65 bills signed into law in 2022: | | INVESTING IN OUR NATION’S INFRASTRUCTURE President Biden’s economic plan is proving that when America invests in ourselves -- especially in our infrastructure, clean energy, and high-growth industries that are critical to our economic and national security -- we can build a bottom-up and middle-out economy. To highlight how we’re rebuilding our nation’s infrastructure and creating good-paying jobs and to announce additional investments, President Biden, Vice President Harris, and senior administration officials are traveling to communities across the country. | | [BACK IN STOCK] ‘HATE HAS NO HOME HERE’ TOTE Tell the world that hate has no home here with our bestselling tote. Start the new year by sporting this American-made, union-printed bag -- and the best part? Every purchase you make from the Official Democratic Store helps elect Democrats up and down the ballot in every ZIP code. | | NEW YEAR’S RESOLUTION: RENEW YOUR SUPPORT FOR DEMOCRATIC CANDIDATES The DNC is the only party committee tasked with electing Democrats in every ZIP code, from the school board to the Senate. As we always say, there are no off-years. We've got to do everything in our power to fund on-the-ground efforts to protect voters, train volunteers and organizers, and empower local and state parties. Until next week, Team Joe | |

Today, I'm writing to let you know that we've produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our "Constitution 101" course, and I'd like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College's world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. "Constitution 101" is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2c49417c5b944d0cb309a91474aab3bb&_e=sqgmgQf2M5GSnahF_s6eDia8EYYbANdI-NNWV0qfBT0tBzoutrxy_2WZ-Xi5di-X0moGY87C72d1M1vppL4elEEn_pCOhVlVTXHyl7esXk58nN8fgSjWvHNExBJGo_8rIQgejSjor0gWp0w4A0DFoGOp4Y8UZZdn2Huc-M3y2sqo80TTL50aRWnNQlLSiQ38TYBOVCjK7xhDsS9Nx8fqWqPa_M2C37qrhFR7Sny7mKSFlXfmHvc4BQC7dLzwX6LWKSJb-_QbxBhwLAQEhf5gFgwc7cE0PvX9n7wyUrmipGw5wG49MUruCLyP4jprfAheeVGfT1LgUzDQQ0vUtIFOYgQpokS0ZbQhccM1eHmw8nyM9G7nNIE8PSohO-G0A5Blbagq9hkCJNFuQ5leeZUk_Q%3D%3D) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. subject: Thank you Senator Stabenow
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GRETCHEN WHITMER FOR GOVERNOR Gretchen Whitmer for Governor
body:
We need to mobilize every last voter. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57039621/386677053/1951059990?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzcvMS85MDA5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTRiYzEzZC1jZThlLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G9AUORQLfl6DNR58HeA8-cP5WDAenYWNRaHfKDiAiXo=&emci=145259f6-ca8e-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=ae4bc13d-ce8e-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=7753671)

Earlier this week, Senator Stabenow announced her decision not to seek re-election in 2024.

As the first woman elected to represent Michigan in the U.S. Senate, Senator Stabenow’s been leading the fight for working families, the auto industry, and farmers for a lifetime in Michigan and for Michigan in Washington.

She is a fierce protector of our Great Lakes, fought for decades to modernize the Soo Locks, and continues to tackle toxic contaminants in drinking water. She’s also a leader in expanding access to affordable health care and ensuring parity for mental health services.

Most of all, she is an incredible friend. Debbie is one-of-one, and she is a champion for Michigan.

**[Today, I’m putting together a card to say thank you to Senator Stabenow for her years of service to Michigan. Will you sign the card for Senator Stabenow today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57039630/386677058/1951059990?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzcvMS85MDA5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTRiYzEzZC1jZThlLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G9AUORQLfl6DNR58HeA8-cP5WDAenYWNRaHfKDiAiXo=&emci=145259f6-ca8e-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=ae4bc13d-ce8e-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=7753671)** [SIGN THE CARD](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57039633/386677065/1951059990?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzcvMS85MDA5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTRiYzEzZC1jZThlLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G9AUORQLfl6DNR58HeA8-cP5WDAenYWNRaHfKDiAiXo=&emci=145259f6-ca8e-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=ae4bc13d-ce8e-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=7753671) Thank you,

Gretchen Whitmer

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: I’m officially running to replace Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
He’s the coward who pumped his fist at insurrectionists outside the Capitol on January 6th, then ran for his life hours later.
| Josh Hawley is up for re-election to the U.S. Senate in 2024 — **and I’m the 13-year Marine veteran who’s going to replace him.**

[Watch our brand new launch video, then become one of the first founding donors of our grassroots movement by splitting a donation between me and Voter Protection Project today.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38117?t=6&akid=5983%2E878179%2EZfEE8_) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38118?t=7&akid=5983%2E878179%2EZfEE8_) | [Watch the launch video »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38118?t=8&akid=5983%2E878179%2EZfEE8_)
---
**You know Josh Hawley.** He’s been climbing the ladder in Missouri to become another corrupt, career politician.

**But here’s where you’ll best recognize him:**
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38117?t=9&akid=5983%2E878179%2EZfEE8_)
He’s the guy who pumped his fist at insurrectionists outside the Capitol on January 6th, then ran for his life just a few hours later.

**When things get tough, Missourians deserve a U.S. Senator who will stand up and fight for them — not run away like a coward.**

[If you’re ready to send a real warrior for working people to the U.S. Senate, I need you on my team. Can I count on you to become a founding donor to my grassroots campaign by splitting a donation between me and Voter Protection Project today?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38117?t=10&akid=5983%2E878179%2EZfEE8_)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38118?t=11&akid=5983%2E878179%2EZfEE8_)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38119?t=12&akid=5983%2E878179%2EZfEE8_)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38120?t=13&akid=5983%2E878179%2EZfEE8_)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38121?t=14&akid=5983%2E878179%2EZfEE8_)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38117?t=15&akid=5983%2E878179%2EZfEE8_)
In 2024, we’ll have a real shot to take back power from corrupt politicians and corporate elites like Josh Hawley. This is our chance to put everyday working people in charge of our country.

Let’s get moving,

Lucas Kunce
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=5983%2E878179%2EZfEE8_). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=5983%2E878179%2EZfEE8_).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=5983%2E878179%2EZfEE8_) to request fewer emails.
