name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Did you see Ilhan’s email?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

We wanted to be sure that you saw Ilhan’s email to you from the other day.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/124689?refcode=em20230107-26931&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=26931%2E1203867%2Ef61Kwk ]Will you read it below and then make a $3 contribution
before midnight tonight to support our work to recruit and elect the next
slate of progressive champions?

It’s so important that we have the resources to fully fund our 2024
candidate recruitment plans.

Thank you for everything,

Team JD

---Forwarded message below---

Peter, it’s
Ilhan Omar, writing to you today with an urgent message.

I know firsthand the difficulties that come when you dare to challenge the
establishment. Fighting off the corporate PACs, the political machine, and
the smear attacks is an uphill battle — but when we win, we win big.

Thanks to Justice Democrats, our Squad is growing in Congress every cycle.

JD’s work is invaluable to our movement and they are worth your support.
The resources they raise now toward their $75,000 end-of-year goal will
pay off in the future with every new Justice Democrat they help elect to
Congress.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/124689?refcode=em20230107-26931&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=26931%2E1203867%2Ef61Kwk ]Will you join me today and invest in Justice Democrats during these
final days of 2022, so they can hit the ground running in the new year in
just a few days? $3 — or any amount — will support their
critical work.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/124689?refcode=em20230107-26931&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=26931%2E1203867%2Ef61Kwk ]Contribute $3

In less than a month, Justice Democrat Summer Lee will be joining us to
legislate for nothing less than the transformative change we need. We need
every progressive we can get in order to win change on this scale. It will
take all of us fighting together to win Medicare for All, the Green New
Deal, a federal living wage, criminal justice reform, and more.

Justice Democrats is uniquely positioned to transform the Democratic
Party, and they are succeeding. Investing in their work early will have
long-term benefits for our movement, which is why I urge you to support
them with a donation today.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/124689?refcode=em20230107-26931&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=26931%2E1203867%2Ef61Kwk ]Can you chip in $3 today to help Justice Democrats
raise $75,000 by the end of the year? There isn’t much time left and what
you give now will determine the future of JD’s work through the 2024 cycle
— and they are worth the investment.

In solidarity,

Ilhan Omar

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1023&akid=26931%2E1203867%2Ef61Kwk ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1024&akid=26931%2E1203867%2Ef61Kwk ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230107-26931-footer&t=1025&refcode2=26931_1203867_f61Kwk&akid=26931%2E1203867%2Ef61Kwk

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1026&akid=26931%2E1203867%2Ef61Kwk

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

subject: Random New Year’s Thoughts

body:
We can’t let our despair overwhelm us

| **The Supreme Court officially overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , eliminating national protection of the right to have an abortion.** [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57023012/386652867/919132167?refcode=UTS_20230107_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU3MTIyZTllLWFhOGUtZWQxMS05ZDdiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TUpyfQAB5zvGqaCRUotQWMY6p-n6MoPgf_zfMV4N230=&emci=d3d7620f-468d-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=e7122e9e-aa8e-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=24268976) Peter, this news is devastating. But we can’t let our despair overwhelm us – we must fight back immediately to save reproductive rights. **IF** we don’t fight this ruling and push the Senate to codify _Roe v. Wade_ , women across the country will be in grave danger. **BUT IF** we give this fight everything we have, we can push the Senate to pass a law guaranteeing reproductive rights to everyone in the country! clean_body: We can’t let our despair overwhelm us | The Supreme Court officially overturned Roe v. Wade , eliminating national protection of the right to have an abortion. Peter, this news is devastating. But we can’t let our despair overwhelm us – we must fight back immediately to save reproductive rights. IF we don’t fight this ruling and push the Senate to codify Roe v. Wade , women across the country will be in grave danger. BUT IF we give this fight everything we have, we can push the Senate to pass a law guaranteeing reproductive rights to everyone in the country! | Let's make our voices heard! body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Join Our Revolution's LIVE 2023 Kickoff Call
this Monday 1/9 at 8:30p ET/5:30 PT and strategize directly with
progressive leaders for the year to come!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1011&akid=3867%2E5885482%2EFZEvKJ ]Click here to RSVP now and read below to find out more about this
important first strategy call of 2023!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1012&akid=3867%2E5885482%2EFZEvKJ ][IMG]

New US Rep Greg Casar will talk about his first week in the House and how
the largest progressive bloc ever in Congress is strategizing for the New
Year!

We'll also hear from new St. Louis Board President Megan Green on how to
build and wield local power! Our progressive bloc passed a Guaranteed
Basic Income pilot program in St. Louis last month, and we’re organizing
to elect more mayors and council members in major cities in 2023!

And Our Revolution has with BIG news for New Year — we're launching
campaigns in states across the country to raise the minimum wage because
one job should be enough! Saru Jarayaman, President of One Fair Wage will
be with us to organize for workers and higher wages in 2023!

Then, CA Dems Progressive Caucus Chair Amar Shergill will give an update
on efforts to transform the party.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1013&akid=3867%2E5885482%2EFZEvKJ ]Don't miss this exciting first call of the year! Click here to RSVP:

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20WAGOP?=
subject: Stay and fight!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Washington State is worth fighting for!

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .
Contact:
Steve Johnson
Communications Director
Washington State Republican Party
(425) 460-0570
steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org)

or ** unsubscribe from this list (https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=4f90cbb438&e=6a281f566d&c=9bd5a8f9c2)
.

Last night, I was sworn in as the Representative for Illinois’ 13th Congressional District!**It will be an honor to serve our communities in the 118th Congress.**

I’m incredibly thankful for you. None of this would have been possible without your support. There is so much work to be done, and I’m eager to get started and continue the fight for the hard-working families across Central and Southern Illinois.

I am deeply grateful for your support.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Nathaniel=20Moran?=
subject: Proud to be your new Congressman
disclaimer_text: paid for by Nathaniel Moran for Congress
body:
At 1:40am on January 7, I was finally sworn in as your new Congressman of the First District of Texas. | | | [View this email in your browser.](https://mailchi.mp/nathanielmoran/swearingin-17008371?e=bbce4dd6ad)
---
| | [ ](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=6600ee33f8&e=bbce4dd6ad)
---
|
---
| Hello!

Early this morning at 1:40 am, I took the oath of office to serve as the Congressman representing the First District of Texas. I wanted to tell you again how much I appreciate your support. Without your prayers, hard work, and vote, I would not be in Washington, DC, today. And I will need your continued partnership in the future.

As this long week has shown, I’ll need your prayers, but also your insight and wisdom as issues come up that affect East Texas. Throughout my service at the Capitol, please reach out to our hardworking office staff or me to let us know what is important to you and your community.
---
|
---
_Many family members joined me in Washington, D.C. earlier this week. Although most couldn't stay for the swearing-in, it was great to have them with me._
| Thank you again for your continued support. I could feel your prayers and well wishes 1,200 miles away.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
|
---
| Nathaniel Moran
Congressman, First District of Texas
---

**Derek, as the new Democratic Leader, I want to take this moment to share what I stand for and earn your support:**

I was raised by working-class parents.

I’m a product of New York City’s public schools and grew up in a predominantly African-American neighborhood in Brooklyn.

**Now, I’m leading House Democrats forward as we fight for opportunity in every single zip code and an economy that works for everyone. We’re not wasting a single second getting to work.**

Which is why I'm asking for a historic surge of support – 1,000 Democratic gifts in my first 24 hours as Leader – to lay the groundwork for Democrats to reclaim the House and continue to get big things done for the American people. Derek, I will always fight for what’s right, and I don’t care if it makes me a target of extreme MAGA Republicans.

I served as a Trump impeachment manager – _even though I knew Republicans would smear me for it._

I helped House Democrats pass the first meaningful gun safety legislation in 30 years – _even though it made us a target of the corporate gun manufacturers._

I stood with our caucus to call out corporate price-gouging – _even though we knew that special interest groups would fight back._

I know House Democrats will continue to find common ground when possible, fight extremism when necessary and always put People over Politics.

**And I know we can win back the House – the right way – but I need your help to act fast.**

Now that MAGA extremists have thrown the Republican Party into disarray, this is our best shot to show just how strong Democrats are.

[**So I’m humbly asking 1,000 Democrats to chip in during my first 24 hours as Leader and prove that we will spare no expense to reclaim our House Majority >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57040360/386681167/-140622575?refcode=em_fr_2023.01.07_b2_hj_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWQ4ZmYzNS1kYzhlLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x5QxFnFD00Ro6ocB-7nP9enZ8hdbJBmWCVTbeSzqgoc=)

Hakeem

clean_body: = = As the new Democratic Leader, I want to take this moment to share what I stand for and earn your support: I was raised by working-class parents. I’m a product of New York City’s public schools and grew up in a predominantly African-American neighborhood in Brooklyn. Now, I’m leading House Democrats forward as we fight for opportunity in every single zip code and an economy that works for everyone. We’re not wasting a single second getting to work. Which is why I'm asking for a historic surge of support – 1,000 Democratic gifts in my first 24 hours as Leader – to lay the groundwork for Democrats to reclaim the House and continue to get big things done for the American people. Can I count on you to split a gift between myself and Andrea? | = I will always fight for what’s right, and I don’t care if it makes me a target of extreme MAGA Republicans. I served as a Trump impeachment manager – even though I knew Republicans would smear me for it. I helped House Democrats pass the first meaningful gun safety legislation in 30 years – even though it made us a target of the corporate gun manufacturers. I stood with our caucus to call out corporate price-gouging – even though we knew that special interest groups would fight back. I know House Democrats will continue to find common ground when possible, fight extremism when necessary and always put People over Politics. And I know we can win back the House – the right way – but I need your help to act fast. Now that MAGA extremists have thrown the Republican Party into disarray, this is our best shot to show just how strong Democrats are. = Keep the faith, Hakeem | | = Andrea Salinas for Oregon PO Box 230985 Tigard, OR 97281 Paid for by Andrea Salinas for Oregon Andrea is fighting for Oregon, fighting for affordable quality health care, an economy that works for everyone, and clean air, land, and water. Now, Andrea's ready to show Washington what hard work can accomplish – real, meaningful change for all of us. | =

subject: Restoring hope in our country
body:
You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities, and its increasing influence in K-12 education.

Hillsdale College | | | This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=bfc41367441247728c478f672635179e&_e=kQM1Yop8GkJbCnaLs10ChG2e1IQqhyf7mLWnPqWOfouzUoz4mt5FTaz_XkuwRiPDRq0aTpvE2kPWm0RjKbNJiiObm4PBXnSzlVy584b0GTO4N6YuJvq96_-DsiVLJA4X4wnm9W48EZ0KTBSUEYURTeXv-8_V4JKr5PNOLVPElwLgoZrlVz9uRaWhSy9_qhWhhnk85WyOD-X2KkWK_NTecXyD5VjNRdIiuMqOFHQklVhb4rPUSzHqRAvCYpeX2Yc7jBROpRZAQEFW-XuBj8TJniMMwink1jabREhMcp6T81AD4LAKAEQWUNkQ_BIJ3S0YbXZUlO0zbzhf37Sk2lDuX5FRhp5lLndKNCTYYdxPLV0hz8YAqY5gcZ1Iw9XRDpSfNBkIzZjA4IY1C8y2ntU73A%3D%3D) Fellow American, [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=bfc41367441247728c478f672635179e&_e=kQM1Yop8GkJbCnaLs10ChG2e1IQqhyf7mLWnPqWOfouzUoz4mt5FTaz_XkuwRiPDRq0aTpvE2kPWm0RjKbNJiiObm4PBXnSzlVy584b0GTO4N6YuJvq96_-DsiVLJA4X4wnm9W48EZ0KTBSUEYURTeXv-8_V4JKr5PNOLVPElwLgoZrlVz9uRaWhSy9_qhWhhnk85WyOD-X2KkWK_NTecXyD5VjNRdIiuMqOFHQklVhb4rPUSzHqRAvCYpeX2Yc7BE2i0pR0Sox6u13KwKOZxMATlDCf_1r6j4HkHEYQqXCHqpQW27swYZwGvfBrc8CrkmQgNYefSyN962EdUSQwun6Eq8ChGUan1DE2el4LG7P38WHA1AG_FT5iK5QO8ucQu4mre-E2LMXtksUJ74blYw%3D%3D) You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities, and its increasing influence in K-12 education. That’s why we’ve turned our course, [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=bfc41367441247728c478f672635179e&_e=kQM1Yop8GkJbCnaLs10ChG2e1IQqhyf7mLWnPqWOfouzUoz4mt5FTaz_XkuwRiPDRq0aTpvE2kPWm0RjKbNJiiObm4PBXnSzlVy584b0GTO4N6YuJvq96_-DsiVLJA4X4wnm9W48EZ0KTBSUEYURTeXv-8_V4JKr5PNOLVPElwLgoZrlVz9uRaWhSy9_qhWhhnk85WyOD-X2KkWK_NTecXyD5VjNRdIiuMqOFHQklVhb4rPUSzHqRAvCYpeX2Yc74gOdIkrit6L2krZ_S82xVGXi6B2x_wTsNWRq4LlbvRTPDa1ut7h7JvpefuMsFXRCkk85c17QmCNqgnh7-NVMjdIIIAVj9CMHivG1iwa7G_f4f-ZU6HyUjnP4nuksoBhNIFBrZRjmNzudBucIYrxTYQ%3D%3D) into a DVD set, and I’d like you to have a copy. Taught by historian Wilfred McClay and based on his recently published history of America, **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** presents a full, unbiased account of America’s past. Hillsdale’s goal in producing this course is to **restore the kind of intelligent patriotism—especially among our young people—that is essential to preserving free government.** **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** is a powerful counterweight to _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project,” which is injecting the idea that America is an essentially unjust nation into the curricula of America’s K-12 schools. Please consider getting [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=bfc41367441247728c478f672635179e&_e=kQM1Yop8GkJbCnaLs10ChG2e1IQqhyf7mLWnPqWOfouzUoz4mt5FTaz_XkuwRiPDRq0aTpvE2kPWm0RjKbNJiiObm4PBXnSzlVy584b0GTO4N6YuJvq96_-DsiVLJA4X4wnm9W48EZ0KTBSUEYURTeXv-8_V4JKr5PNOLVPElwLgoZrlVz9uRaWhSy9_qhWhhnk85WyOD-X2KkWK_NTecXyD5VjNRdIiuMqOFHQklVhb4rPUSzHqRAvCYpeX2Yc71i0efJAEHPYFhYP3_2OwuToLeB5RdJ986xf-UqZCXPm0CQnEFBhuGi0j1DQAx9oLTRjEqqobac9l48qBW4yaB6sPmCFXA4RmRs10DagYQiFnQlXAU04OGgd5aelsPxYCpDhZRi3AbnVqtQx7mDdfOA%3D%3D) as a DVD set for your home library or to give as a gift. Presenting real American history is the surest means of preserving liberty. Quantities are limited, so reserve your copy today. [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=bfc41367441247728c478f672635179e&_e=kQM1Yop8GkJbCnaLs10ChG2e1IQqhyf7mLWnPqWOfouzUoz4mt5FTaz_XkuwRiPDRq0aTpvE2kPWm0RjKbNJiiObm4PBXnSzlVy584b0GTO4N6YuJvq96_-DsiVLJA4X4wnm9W48EZ0KTBSUEYURTeXv-8_V4JKr5PNOLVPElwLgoZrlVz9uRaWhSy9_qhWhhnk85WyOD-X2KkWK_NTecXyD5VjNRdIiuMqOFHQklVhb4rPUSzHqRAvCYpeX2Yc7OJsm5eRaZbqPSku4MitOn2-dJ2yvSsSJmYAuHXN4PzQox0fbC7pCB17QjuZGKHd4AWC-MgOBud5_4FrZZGN3pn4fYX_S0pmq-49fxFWA0CW6AsN5kQ0nc9uIdotlPv2yqiUKNW1cB2pFZ1jzxl43RQ%3D%3D) Thank you for your partnership with Hillsdale College and your support of its mission on behalf of liberty. name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c28260b527614b5fb0ae4003b5370a2f&_e=95EIPCNNDAHgsRdgexR5mSuXTIFeLw2wHOQmdDwPduwqZE4GUU7l8ERVvw3kWBHp3unJ2d1_NUkKgMo7FSk0LkuR9rhwtrRFPes7fovxucCHWoiQyqSoe1wbssJxpPZGFG5rsn3X9qyPvMkB75Eb4-NF3MgSabRCg9HI9_0knZReh53dlfOysvJi0tDBsTB811WZkJHxqUogkjrNOQ9rJslYiPDVQ9CeNS97ox8-IYVz7j45TpExQ4GgfXMK1medhKkgHXdokNW6bATMfA7HMHYigF6W3Q7aSaMKhmhbi3kmRQ7lIPOhx5zkCe5Gf60AJb54WoFNcMZAn_-Bj0SOwHjs-wbIPNUy0os_Nhys3PMmkgpzzTy6Os1yTnv7opEqbEYBZfp_ndjKM7ZDsL28gQ%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.
A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.
That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.**
By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.
You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below:
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c28260b527614b5fb0ae4003b5370a2f&_e=95EIPCNNDAHgsRdgexR5mSuXTIFeLw2wHOQmdDwPduwqZE4GUU7l8ERVvw3kWBHp3unJ2d1_NUkKgMo7FSk0LkuR9rhwtrRFPes7fovxucCHWoiQyqSoe1wbssJxpPZGFG5rsn3X9qyPvMkB75Eb4-NF3MgSabRCg9HI9_0knZReh53dlfOysvJi0tDBsTB811WZkJHxqUogkjrNOQ9rJslYiPDVQ9CeNS97ox8-IYVRDZqZ_su41Ep4A2uiRq-KhmeYptzqqxl33ATjGzhjIiuKz9mQIBzkXp9ZpyEt2qE6x4Y08rJEazZNpH5mGrJfflb-yUNlDd9NT87MJaULkjcHaQ30pNyExvxp5-DMO6sSInJufDN51sSwmY1AbFETV4JNCVpZLCmK-VcVAvX-Vg%3D%3D)**
For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.
**But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.**
This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.
Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states.
These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College.
**And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.**
So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.
**You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:**
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c28260b527614b5fb0ae4003b5370a2f&_e=95EIPCNNDAHgsRdgexR5mSuXTIFeLw2wHOQmdDwPduwqZE4GUU7l8ERVvw3kWBHp3unJ2d1_NUkKgMo7FSk0LkuR9rhwtrRFPes7fovxucCHWoiQyqSoe1wbssJxpPZGFG5rsn3X9qyPvMkB75Eb4-NF3MgSabRCg9HI9_0knZReh53dlfOysvJi0tDBsTB811WZkJHxqUogkjrNOQ9rJslYiPDVQ9CeNS97ox8-IYV76ZhvA1NePb5O-_TSkFEiDUkg0w3k-RF927GYroD8SN6Q3KPZKHUKpbYTyg-fE3dahAggOFUSwNFytg4Uqh3e09x3oxidkXDHSZvcyv82p5t1RaneFPfJa3KJdjrKuAqT_AForloIRWCoBmx8lEmBP6g3fUhLuWjkyVeuWkrHTA%3D%3D)**
And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.
Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.
Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Sent to Conservative Liberty Wire subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Draft DeSantis
subject: The invasion the Left won’t talk about 🤬🤬
body:
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9f61bd8bbd494bf0b1d6bce5f2cd9e7c&_e=n6Wv8wLIj_Qo7aKlfdW0MonYg_llhYx8AzASenorhxcO6Tc6yYRwRmsgb6KgW5qqvNPWqx_Wcnj7-xUK3IbV98mEm6pTNYrN19HrmOLM__sIGD44bV7h5kz7btTcbxNhQ5TtJaFDXKLD5FrxiPwN-tTBSxjlJrSW66_cLugibwAFLenL1oVga5gYWL-KHS8wOUXsTDyad3bdrSmIcqXTM4F9I0q7Jzqyu20ieVlG8nlDaQru3IPHpLNrzF65rCydu2maaG8GeKSfnB5Zt5pI8g%3D%3D)

Friend,

There's an invasion happening, and Biden is doing nothing to stop it.

And no, we're not talking about Ukraine.

_**This invasion is happening right here on America 's southern border.**_

The largest immigration caravan reached Texas on Sunday, December 11, when over **1,000** people crossed the U.S.-Mexico border into El Paso, Texas. The next day, over **2,300** immigrants came into that sector in 24 hours.

And that's only what happened in 2 days near El Paso. **Over 2 MILLION illegal immigrants have come across the southern border. **

**And what is Biden doing about it?

NOTHING.**

Friend, you and I need a leader that's serious about taking on sanctuary cities and stopping illegal immigration.

We need Ron DeSantis.

We're Ready for Ron, an America First grassroots movement working to recruit Ron for President in 2024 because we are tired of the hypocrisy of the Democrat Left.

We've set a goal to raise $1 million before New Year's Eve to help draft DeSantis to run for President.

[_**If you 're ready for a president who won't shy away from the tough fights and work to secure our country, can you donate $10, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here to send your urgent gift >>>**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9f61bd8bbd494bf0b1d6bce5f2cd9e7c&_e=n6Wv8wLIj_Qo7aKlfdW0MonYg_llhYx8AzASenorhxcO6Tc6yYRwRmsgb6KgW5qqvNPWqx_Wcnj7-xUK3IbV98mEm6pTNYrN19HrmOLM__sIGD44bV7h5kz7btTcbxNhYozHxpTO_JRSe7oPKv7SCSRM0Mzh2yZmQTuGxMm6Gs6ey4p8X7JyKb7OJAbS5kVo56gctJlb42AH7fouWJdsTk_2Ct12rfhAbxlkCMnO9_53aZ_OI7-i17pPfChWNCBk8s-JL05qPzgSRckOTh0lVg%3D%3D)

| Endorsement Alert Hanover Delegate Buddy Fowler
---
| Dear Friend, I am honored to have received the endorsement of my good friend and fellow conservative leader Delegate Buddy Fowler at my campaign kickoff for Virginia State Senator District 10 in Goochland County today!
---
| | |
---|---
|
"I am proud to endorse my friend and fellow conservative Republican leader in the House of Delegates, Delegate John McGuire for State Senate District 10. John shares our Hanover values and is the kind of conservative fighter that we need to protect our God given rights in the State Senate. I'm asking you to join ME in supporting John McGuire for State Senate by signing up to be a delegate to his convention"
-Buddy Fowler
| Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire

| We will have a convention, probably in May, for State Senate District 10. name: Katie Porter
subject: Doing things a bit differently
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Congress
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/12?t=1&akid=15611%2E3422442%2Efrm1vX)
Derek,
While I’ve been back in Washington for a chaotic and troubling start to the 118th Congress, I’ve been reminded that **I really don’t “do Congress” the way most of my colleagues do.**
* I don’t take money from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil, Big Pharma, or Wall Street Banks.
* I’m leading the fight to ban Members of Congress and their families from trading stocks.
* When Congress brought back earmarks (which are a way of funding Members’ pet projects) in 2021, I was the only Democrat to oppose them.

In practice, that means while many of my colleagues take long meetings with lobbyists, I get to spend my time on the issues that really matter to my constituents. It means that instead of spending each day calling corporate donors, **my campaign is run largely because of grassroots supporters.**
I might not look or talk like most of my colleagues. **I drive a minivan and my toughest constituents are my three kids.** But Congress should look like the people we represent, and I’m proud to be representing the many families of Orange County.
Thanks for being on Team Porter,
Katie
**[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14212?refcode=EMAF07_KID_20230107_V1_F&t=2&akid=15611%2E3422442%2Efrm1vX)**

Paid for by Katie Porter for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you would like to update your information, please **[click here.](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/em-update-info-footer/?t=3&akid=15611%2E3422442%2Efrm1vX)** Our campaign is powered by grassroots supporters chipping in to emails just like this one. If you would like to receive fewer emails, please [**click here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=15611%2E3422442%2Efrm1vX).

To contribute via check, please address to: Katie Porter for Congress, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

name: 2023 REPUBLICAN INNER CIRCLE
subject: Your Offer:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter,
---
I’m so excited to personally invite you to become an **OFFICIAL MEMBER** of our **2023 REPUBLICAN INNER CIRCLE. **

subject: Michelle Obama and Stacey Abrams teamed up
body:
You won’t believe who teamed up in the fight against GOP-led voter suppression... | | |
---
| | You won’t believe who teamed up in the fight against GOP-led voter suppression: **Michelle Obama and Stacey Abrams!** They’re doubling their power to _urge_ – together – that every single person who cares about our right to vote should join this fight. In their very FIRST public joint venture, Michelle Obama warned that Republicans are attacking our “freedom to vote, cast our ballots and have our votes counted” – and Stacey Abrams explained how these laws would unfairly impact “Black, Brown, young, and working-class voters, and voters with disabilities.” **Michelle Obama and Stacey Abrams are drawing attention to this problem. | | Friend, **Have a 2A Task Force New Year! ** The holiday season focuses on the things that truly matter - God, family, and our country. The 2A Task Force focuses on defending one of our most essential constitutional rights, the right to keep and bear arms, and highlights the importance of not complying. Despite the Biden administration and the radical left’s mission to rewrite our Constitution, our mission is to reinforce and protect us from tyrants using the power of government to take away our liberties. The 2A Task Force is led by one of the country’s most respected voices on the Second Amendment, Donald Trump Jr. He recognized an opportunity to better organize pro-second amendment efforts and already succeeded once by sinking Biden’s radical anti-gun lobbyist nomination to lead the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms, and Explosives, **but now we need your HELP!**

**[I was just officially sworn in as House Democratic Leader, after 14 failed, dysfunctional attempts by Republicans to convene our Congress. Now, I’m asking you to help me lead Democrats in a historic fundraising day – 1,000 gifts in my first 24 hours – to show we stand ready to fight extreme MAGA Republicans and win back the House Majority for Democrats. Will you split a gift between myself and Jennifer Wexton? I can’t tell you how much it would mean to see your donation →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57038818/386669897/-1926870648?refcode=EM_FR_230103HJ_N_HJ_FULL_7_NG_N_L1&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNWUyZjk4Zi1iZjhlLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PRJqlPrDraIkklNM7UMyF6j9hRDWeqBJ_JZ1Iec9QFU=)**

As the new Democratic Leader, I want to take this moment to share what I stand for and earn your support:

I was raised by working-class parents.

I’m a product of New York City’s public schools and grew up in a predominantly African-American neighborhood in Brooklyn.

Now, I’m leading House Democrats forward as we fight for opportunity in every single zip code and an economy that works for everyone. We’re not wasting a single second getting to work.

Which is why I'm asking for a historic surge of support – 1,000 Democratic gifts in my first 24 hours as Leader – to lay the groundwork for Democrats to reclaim the House and continue to get big things done for the American people. I will always fight for what’s right, and I don’t care if it makes me a target of extreme MAGA Republicans.

I served as a Trump impeachment manager – even though I knew Republicans would smear me for it.

I helped House Democrats pass the first meaningful gun safety legislation in 30 years – _even though it made us a target of the corporate gun manufacturers._

I stood with our caucus to call out corporate price-gouging – _even though we knew that special interest groups would fight back._

I know House Democrats will continue to find common ground when possible, fight extremism when necessary and always put People over Politics.

**And I know we can win back the House – the right way – but I need your help to act fast.**

Now that MAGA extremists have thrown the Republican Party into disarray, this is our best shot to show just how strong Democrats are.

[**So I’m humbly asking 1,000 Democrats to chip in during my first 24 hours as Leader and prove that we will spare no expense to reclaim our House Majority →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57038825/386669904/-1926870648?refcode=EM_FR_230103HJ_N_HJ_FULL_7_NG_N_L1&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNWUyZjk4Zi1iZjhlLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PRJqlPrDraIkklNM7UMyF6j9hRDWeqBJ_JZ1Iec9QFU=)

Keep the faith,

Hakeem

**Rep. Jennifer Wexton proudly serves the 10th District of Virginia. She's fighting to create a strong economy, ensure equality for all, and invest in a better future for America.** ****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57038826/386669905/-1926870648?refcode=EM_FR_230103HJ_N_HJ_FULL_7_NG_N_Biobox&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNWUyZjk4Zi1iZjhlLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PRJqlPrDraIkklNM7UMyF6j9hRDWeqBJ_JZ1Iec9QFU=)****

I helped House Democrats pass the first meaningful gun safety legislation in 30 years – even though it made us a target of the corporate gun manufacturers. I stood with our caucus to call out corporate price-gouging – even though we knew that special interest groups would fight back. I know House Democrats will continue to find common ground when possible, fight extremism when necessary and always put People over Politics. And I know we can win back the House – the right way – but I need your help to act fast. Now that MAGA extremists have thrown the Republican Party into disarray, this is our best shot to show just how strong Democrats are. = Keep the faith, Hakeem Rep. Jennifer Wexton proudly serves the 10th District of Virginia. She's fighting to create a strong economy, ensure equality for all, and invest in a better future for America. **=** Paid for by Wexton for Congress Wexton for Congress PO Box 650550 Sterling, VA 20165 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Team Sherrod
subject: Sherrod’s counting on you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
Sherrod Brown - Senator from Ohio [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP13/1/87645/images/brown_2018_logo-outlined.png]
We’re just a few days into the New Year, but frankly, we’re already thinking about 2024.
Why?
Because that’s when Sherrod will be up for re-election in Ohio.
Ohio is already shaping up to be the 2024 Senate race to watch. As one of only three Senate Democrats in states Trump won in 2020, Sherrod is a prime target for Mitch McConnell and the GOP. And already Republican opponents are lining up to take on Sherrod.
Now’s when our work for 2024 really begins.
Today, we’re going to set the tone for 2024. And we need everyone on our team to work harder than ever before to stand with Sherrod and protect the progress we’ve made. Will you add your name and commit to being part of our campaign over the next two years? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/gfRQgeD4EUWeOBvAjeUTDw2]
This year, Sherrod is working to build on his efforts to make our economy work for everyone and stand up for every worker and family.
Making health care more affordable. Raising wages. Bringing back jobs that have been shipped overseas. Protecting people’s hard-earned pensions. These are the things Sherrod’s been fighting for all along. (Seriously -- after college, Sherrod spent his free time in local Ohio union halls. Those conversations with working Ohioans shaped everything he does in office.)
While corporations and Wall Street are focused on what’s best for their stakeholders and bottom lines, Sherrod works for Ohio.
It’s no surprise then that Sherrod has been called a “scourge” of Wall Street. It’s why we know corporate special interests will pour every penny they have into this race to try to defeat him.
But we have something better than the wealthy special interests -- we have friends like you who are committed to keeping Sherrod in office. And we just need enough people to be part of our movement so we can build a winning campaign. If a supporter in Cincinnati and a supporter from Dayton and a supporter from Canton join our team, we’ll have the power we need to out-organize the special-interest groups.
Sherrod’s counting on you -- will you add your name and promise to support his campaign in the months to come? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/gfRQgeD4EUWeOBvAjeUTDw2]
Thank you,
Team Sherrod
PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
Contributions or gifts to Friends of Sherrod Brown are not tax deductible.
Friends of Sherrod Brown
3867 West Market Street
Ste. 289
Akron, OH 44333
United States
Don't want to receive these emails anymore? unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/tClQUZwGoEOS_rmuR1aPwA2?unsubscribedata=lN1yYsvoAyAODr3szq1sAT5EiswieMUQ9DdUEe4tBaNP1zG052czKKieyQ5QuXL3n1G5JiqdodEoh9dMIGCw%2BfjNhCt%2FeYnqmY3NCf7RZNpxwlPXQUzEy62jWuZ8WR2BXRMIYPD4PvU3cTJTKRMYSLRXavASYQ4PIGJHO1XQD%2F1BZaTuo7ni0neJGDlwJB9GH8K8GSDYArfB57bjbr839Wvg9R1fkaj0nMyfQN8%2FEfT6OkicDLc9mkKvtNnaWngTy2yCbUxNrCgRJMIzHuwutzzqHjHkBJ8rsY6OpKGr9sJIFtTqjxVwDXD1%2FRHlesksGDUaJyR5h7rWn4PnMC%2B4mWE4UsBHgWpNXDEa%2FVQDWxvcSGHUGgyuJK%2FCd1mXL%2BRxZSgqeVvahWXPKvq%2F5YsmsSjTRZmrkdisAvozPQcabVMddi5%2B1R122dsONAXEgoMI www.sherrodbrown.com [https://www.sherrodbrown.com/?emci=8c78dfd1-9807-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=18332626]

---
Friend -- This is Christie, the Executive Director of the DSCC. I’m reaching out because it is _crucial_ that we hear from top grassroots Democrats like you to inform our campaign strategy in the new year.

In 2020, this grassroots team provided KEY insights that helped us take back the Senate, and in 2022 you did it again, helping us defy history and expand our _razor-thin_ Senate majority. Now, I'm turning to you one more time to help us win in 2024.

It may be hard to believe, but the actions we take RIGHT NOW will decide whether or not we hold the Senate again in 2024. Now is the time to lay the groundwork for victory. **Your input on these crucial decisions will be VITAL for Democrats next year, which is why I need to hear from you directly.**

So please, click on this personalized link to answer my exclusive Democratic Strategy Survey and help inform the critical choices that will deliver another victory in 2024: **[www.dscc.org/DemStrategySurvey/#9716520](https://go.dscc.org/go/11584?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230107-Christie-ChristieStrategySurvey2023RF-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230107-Christie-ChristieStrategySurvey2023RF-ETG-sl1&akid=9395%2E9716520%2EW0Z2X2)**

_**NOTE: Please do not share this link with anyone, as it may corrupt our data**_

Thank you for being a KEY part of this team!

Christie
DSCC Executive Director

The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. subject: Bring Constitution 101 to your home
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD | | | This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7029470e863f4224986018f359d4bf68&_e=qNvm4h-8i5klM97wZ_IO5uMfmd8qfUOlkv7nk6fEHPCGuo3ce3ZrISdNfwIUT1h_gn-JpD_XiB6LAt3jcyjLmDi2-03RxBlp27p6nyEBR8VwBeS2_KQ287JpAgHInU_LgCAIj75T9wP0_IXejm3uZgVvvTaiE568v0WOP5ivM-7gd5dbs8IOuCtHMSWVemi-qFy3fEwCMj-k8AqnYtbLqTxGuqPcV7sX-wVP6re1eoj4KyIJZYubV-zRDQS8B9zO7We7V_naoNlQ_xOos8G-E4DQ8Nghi8VQwbPFaYUIIjVS74LAzlaCVbbr3ZvghluT7RCmjsDW1Hx-un9nU0s89zutdfILZmETF__sHpk9MoF_ge5k-q1iGzCEbestufBw_yAWr7qBGBkwaxkeMHsVdg%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7029470e863f4224986018f359d4bf68&_e=qNvm4h-8i5klM97wZ_IO5uMfmd8qfUOlkv7nk6fEHPCGuo3ce3ZrISdNfwIUT1h_gn-JpD_XiB6LAt3jcyjLmDi2-03RxBlp27p6nyEBR8VwBeS2_KQ287JpAgHInU_LgCAIj75T9wP0_IXejm3uZgVvvTaiE568v0WOP5ivM-7gd5dbs8IOuCtHMSWVemi-qFy3fEwCMj-k8AqnYtbLqTxGuqPcV7sX-wVP6re1eoj4KyIJZYubV-zRDQS8B9zOW9fcSjn-FfhM3Uax0k9Lt8Xtwo8TcWA5bnDHd60u3GZoWlsaqZZlGpFn2ZFQRpuFTIh8F2bO2Z6VTDstjRFvhzDxYiQJ_ZDAQGVKLuKg0rINvku9Fhh_9pTH4UYzUflo8QvqXE3uJ5-7RlR2ZL7FJg%3D%3D) I hope you're having a great day so far. Today, I'm writing to let you know that we've produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our "Constitution 101" course, and I'd like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College's world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. "Constitution 101" is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7029470e863f4224986018f359d4bf68&_e=qNvm4h-8i5klM97wZ_IO5uMfmd8qfUOlkv7nk6fEHPCGuo3ce3ZrISdNfwIUT1h_gn-JpD_XiB6LAt3jcyjLmDi2-03RxBlp27p6nyEBR8VwBeS2_KQ287JpAgHInU_LgCAIj75T9wP0_IXejm3uZgVvvTaiE568v0WOP5ivM-7gd5dbs8IOuCtHMSWVemi-qFy3fEwCMj-k8AqnYtbLqTxGuqPcV7sX-wVP6re1eoj4KyIJZYubV-zRDQS8B9zOUxHqWfYU5lwnEU6Gr0elk0K4qBBaI-UHWizzuqtX1mBZvnLGHdaHRPkz-gsXwPPuZZPeSwvKXWk4TOMTEOMHt2K_4Qopqlw1N7qvKroDCYyyuGXnORrJQXSLD5jYlRh3o-j_gaVqoGmb63O80la-Cg%3D%3D) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new "Constitution 101" DVD box set are limited, so I hope you'll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth--Defending Liberty since 1844

name: =?utf-8?Q?Russ=20Vought?=
subject: A transformational agreement
body:
A major step towards breaking the Washington cartel. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/citizensrenewingamerica.com/were-on-the-offensive-10327959?e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | |
---
| | |
#
Friends,

The fight for the Speakership _was always about policies not personalities_. While Kevin McCarthy was never our choice for Speaker, concessions made in the fight are the biggest wins against the Washington Cartel we’ve seen in 60 years.

I’m sharing with you a statement we [just sent](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=87c07c568d&e=17913c7d6d) to the press. It sums up our hard work behind the scenes and appropriately recognizes the 20 conservative stalwarts **who fought tooth and nail against the entire political establishment and won**.

Because of their bravery, a transformational agreement with major legislative priorities now puts the DC political cartel on the defense.

_CRA Statement_

_“ After the entire political establishment, **including all manner of legacy conservative pundits, said it was wrong or impossible, the 20 conservative stalwarts who temporarily blocked Kevin McCarthy from becoming Speaker** have now forced an agreement that, as reported, is truly transformational in how the House of Representatives should be run. It levels a body blow against the DC political cartel that colludes against the American people.

“Namely, it gives House conservatives the procedural power through the all-important Rules Committee to control the consideration of all major bills and amendments — **independence from Leadership not seen in nearly 60 years. ** It creates a modern-day Church-style committee with full authority and resources to hold the weaponized national security state accountable. It commits the House to balance the budget in ten years, with substantial cuts to woke and weaponized government, and dictates the terms for the upcoming fight on the debt limit. And it enforces all of these commitments by allowing any one member to force a vote on removing the Speaker. All of these are major priorities envisioned and championed by the Center for Renewing America.

“This agreement would not be possible but for the early and **immediate five members who defined the art of the possible by publicly declaring their opposition to Mr. McCarthy.** And now this agreement must be the foundation moving forward in the House of Representatives for all future Speakers.”_

**Read:[Full CRA Statement](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=d916fec911&e=17913c7d6d)**
---
|
---
| **CRA President Russ Vought on War Room Explaining McCarthy’s Concessions**
---
| [ ](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=77596383b8&e=17913c7d6d)
---
[As I told Steve Bannon on _War Room_](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=02f6f92071&e=17913c7d6d), Kevin McCarthy had to agree to truly historic concessions which decentralize power, handing it back to rank and file members who are the exact opposite of the Washington cartel. We haven’t seen power-sharing changes like this in 60 years.

_But now is not the time to rest on our laurels_. Conservatives must come alongside and thank the 20 and encourage them to stay together as a group.

We also must stay plugged in. We need to make sure the terms of this agreement, including the legislative priorities, are fought for every day in Congress. **That’s where you come in.**

[With your support](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=1d559d4ff9&e=17913c7d6d), we can solidify these gains, make sure our major priorities are advanced in Congress, and ensure the terms of this agreement are upheld.

[Any amount helps](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=570e1c2783&e=17913c7d6d)! If we fight on principle and conviction we can bring the Washington cartel to its knees.
|
Sincerely,

Russ Vought
President
Citizens for Renewing America
---
| | |
---
| | | | | | [](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=74af4f09aa&e=17913c7d6d)
---

body:
From: dpwillis67@gmail.com
| **BREAKING: Hakeem Jeffries to make history as the first Black lawmaker to lead a party in Congress** Listen, this is a HUGE milestone for Jeffries, Democrats, and the entire country. So we’re sending Jeffries a letter from our top grassroots supporters to congratulate him! [**We’re hand-delivering this letter to his office at 8 AM Monday – so we only have 55 more signature spots available! SIGN NOW! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38141?t=6&akid=5986%2E878179%2EtKtHgJ) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38141?t=7&akid=5986%2E878179%2EtKtHgJ) | [**Donate $3 to sign the letter now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38141?t=8&akid=5986%2E878179%2EtKtHgJ)
---
TO: Representative Hakeem Jeffries
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: CONGRATULATIONS **_Dear Rep. Jeffries – CONGRATULATIONS!_**

**We cannot begin to tell you the pride and joy we had when we found out that you had been selected to lead the House Democrats!**

While House Republicans are in complete shambles and struggling to govern, you have Democrats ready to begin delivering on their promises to voters.

**We know fighting against MAGA extremists in the new GOP controlled House won’t be easy, but you’re already showing impressive poise and leadership.**

**So we just wanted to show our thanks and send our congratulations!** [**I hope you know that there are MILLIONS of us across the country that stand with you. That’s why I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to Voter Protection Project to congratulate you on this outstanding accomplishment and to continue to elect incredible Democrats like you »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38141?t=9&akid=5986%2E878179%2EtKtHgJ) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38141?t=10&akid=5986%2E878179%2EtKtHgJ) | [**Donate $3 to sign the letter now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38141?t=11&akid=5986%2E878179%2EtKtHgJ)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=5986%2E878179%2EtKtHgJ). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=5986%2E878179%2EtKtHgJ).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=5986%2E878179%2EtKtHgJ) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=5986%2E878179%2EtKtHgJ). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=5986%2E878179%2EtKtHgJ)

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: What a mess.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
I’ve seen enough, Peter: **the Republicans are in ruin.**
For many years, Republicans have criticized Democrats and called us divided and disorganized.
But under just two years of Democratic House leadership, we passed hundreds of billions of dollars into economic relief, infrastructure investments, and climate action. We won major gun control legislation. And we just had the best midterm showing in decades.
**The Republicans could barely even agree on who they want to lead their party.** Is this truly how they intend to govern? Once again, the GOP has shown that it cares about power more than serving the people.
The people are looking to us to serve them, and Democrats will step up. [**Can you rush a donation today to support me during this critical moment?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/25523?refcode=em20230107-2034&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2034%2E420207%2EmqT2ty)
**[Chip in »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/25523?refcode=em20230107-2034&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=2034%2E420207%2EmqT2ty)**
Peter, we always knew this transition would be challenging. But this is beyond the pale. Our job as Democrats now is to be the proposition party, not just the opposition party.
Despite all the claims leading up to the midterm elections of a “red wave,” none came. The American people do not want to be led by extremists who care more about their egos than passing the life-saving policies we need on the ground now.
That’s why we will show the Republicans how to lead while they bicker among themselves -- and progressives will continue to fight every day for our people-first agenda.
[**If you’re onboard, please consider rushing $5, $10, or more today to support our work. Can I count on you, Peter?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/25523?refcode=em20230107-2034&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=2034%2E420207%2EmqT2ty)
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230107-2034-footer&t=22&refcode2=2034_420207_mqT2ty&akid=2034%2E420207%2EmqT2ty)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: We can guarantee that the vacancy on Wisconsin’s Supreme Court will be filled by a Democrat, if these two Democratic judges win the upcoming primary.
body:
Will 2024’s presidential race be affected?
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4836c0c9-bc32-4331-9a77-3442631c692f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---

| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_The most important election of the year might well be about 5 weeks away._** _In one of the most important swing states, Wisconsin, there will be a primary for Wisconsin Supreme Court. This will determine the balance of this court, as a 4-3 right wing majority right now can be replaced with a 4-3 progressive majority._ **__If_ we win, we can and will stop voter suppression and state legislative shenanigans to steal the election for Donald Trump or Ron DeSantis. _**_If we lose, they will have an opportunity to put away Wisconsin for a democracy-destroying Republican, even if they lack the votes. _**_It is truly scary what they can do if they control the court._** [**_Can you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can afford to Supreme Court Judge candidates Protasiewicz and Mitchell, as not only Wisconsin's governance but who wins the presidency in 2024 is at stake._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7bc88920-3e25-4758-b9e2-60ca6d024697/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **__With a right winger leaving the Supreme Court, we must elect a Democrat to the seat. __**_There is an open primary with two Democrats and two Republicans running. If we ensure both Democrats run first and second in February, we will guarantee one wins the April general election. At the very least, we must ensure both Republicans don't win February 18th, shutting us out of the general._

We absolutely CANNOT allow that to happen._ [**_Can you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can afford to Supreme Court Judge candidates Protasiewicz and Mitchell, as not only Wisconsin's governance but who wins the presidency in 2024 is at stake._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T195866ab-c04b-42d6-b029-b631f17e22af/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_Thank you for fighting for democracy in Wisconsin and America._** Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: Adam Schiff
subject: Taking a break from Kevin and the GOP circus
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=1555%2E5257348%2Eg03qiu ]Adam Schiff for Congress

Derek —

Taking a quick moment after a busy day to update you. And no, this email
isn’t about Kevin McCarthy, well not exactly.

This morning, I was sworn in to serve in the House for the next two years.
And I look forward to the work ahead — to fight for our democracy and for
an economy that works for everyone. To serve my constituents and my
country, and to move us forward.

And for the first time in four years, Republicans will control the House.
And they’re hell bent on reversing all the progress we made with Joe Biden
in the White House and Democrats in control of the House and Senate.

They want to set back progress on health care and women’s reproductive
rights. On fighting climate change and investing in green energy. On gun
safety. On protecting our democracy. On bringing down costs.

On all of it. And we can’t let that happen. We just can’t.

Already, Republicans are promising to kick me off the House Intelligence
Committee and find new and creative ways to retaliate against me for
holding them and Trump accountable.

They’re creating a witch hunt subcommittee in the Judiciary Committee,
meant to go after the DOJ and FBI, in a forlorn effort to discredit the
investigations of Trump’s misconduct. And also look into conspiracy
theories the right-wing has championed.

They’re poised to vote on bills — as soon as next week — to attack
abortion access, roll back even more women’s health care rights, help oil
companies pollute more, and enable billionaires to avoid paying taxes.

Seriously. Those are the new Republican Majority’s first orders of
business. It’s not surprising. But it shows their messed up priorities
nonetheless.

That’s why we need to start preparing right now. To fight back. To take
back the House. To protect the Senate. And to protect our democracy. From
Republicans who would seek to roll it all back and sow chaos.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=jan2023_abs_em.lYGpWb&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230107_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1004&akid=1555%2E5257348%2Eg03qiu ]Can you stand with Democrats, and chip in $10 to ensure that this
Republican House Majority is the shortest in history?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

| | | Friend,

We are kicking off 2023 and our campaign for supervisor strong!

Today, we just launched our new website to prepare for the campaign ahead, and I wanted you to be one of the first to know.

[Click ](https://foster2023.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e5ee1b2f1627d322150edb995&id=085250b48b&e=7f8b4f6b16)[here](https://foster2023.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e5ee1b2f1627d322150edb995&id=e5d58755aa&e=7f8b4f6b16) to read about my priorities for Desoto County, learn how to volunteer, stay connected, and donate to our campaign.

As state representative, I fought very hard for conservative and values and priorities. In fact, we made national headlines in 2019 because I stood up to the liberal left and the media who are trying to destroy this country.

And I'll continue that fight at the local level.

Your support makes a direct impact in our ability to secure a strong future for our children, grandchildren, and generations to come.

Thank you for being on the team.

We'll be in touch again soon!

body:
It’s been more than 100 years since the House has failed to elect a speaker on the first ballot. | |
---

There are only three days left before state Democrats face a competitive election in Virginia | | |

| | **SPECIAL ELECTION UPDATE: In three short days Democrats will face a competitive election for Virginia’s open state Senate seat. ** [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wllHyGNe2HDyIs5WdLo8tLZFkTvQ_D_sKMPxDAc898PPbPqjBXcmz8WBaDRMx2939aCTvL8QV7l9fvMEZT1iu4zCr96GuQFuDBwBCOVgh6I3Gf4AoWbIlfFfeMfHJpS-vR1y7GYBIwkDWnHFOZGP8Bpgj_RdCPSMh-nL5KVUT-tqADs4kLOih439c_rciMnjZbIEo2-hldVJzYCtUuK0O86RPszDxy2htgPOlH2YmJ5h-etaZV3JJiqw-Bv9X2Rm89IQrPvJY899maib4EnUQzWyzzV2zM4Bh3RXK9OjMW51JAa95eJn-8xoEW5FnynexjyUF8Rd7MioKrki5dd0G-Bn1xDQbFHM7fX6Edl3G_oFFahmxjuwNdoWX_7kP9siThdmOgPaSw-f37ChjOpwRTUua1m7NjLo65YmobedW4Sw/3sn/BVZ3OKp2R8u3cPuIUPAg2Q/h0/wl4M_pMVTjr9jfoECSJcTvE_GsjHlmBvHo-5-nHfFxE) Virginia is one of our top targets this year, so the outcome of this race (the first competitive special election this year!) could have ripple effects for state Democrats in 2023. **A win for state Democrats would widen our tight margin in the Virginia Senate, building our Democratic momentum.** Simply put: With the future of abortion access, public education, voting rights, and much more at risk; we must take advantage of this opportunity to gain ground for Democrats in Virginia. Our team is laser-focused on flipping this seat in three days, but we can't do it without you. [Will you chip in $7 right now to help elect state Democrats in Virginia and beyond? Special elections often come down to a handful of votes and often fly under the radar. We don’t just fund campaign staff and voter mobilization efforts in the weeks before Election Day in November – our work is year-round. **With just three days left before our next special election, we can’t afford to fall short.**
[Chipping in just $7 or anything you can will help us secure victories in special elections and across the country. Virginia is one of our top targets this year, so the outcome of this race (the first competitive special election this year!) could have ripple effects for state Democrats in 2023. A win for state Democrats would widen our tight margin in the Virginia Senate, building our Democratic momentum. Simply put: With the future of abortion access, public education, voting rights, and much more at risk; we must take advantage of this opportunity to gain ground for Democrats in Virginia. Our team is laser-focused on flipping this seat in three days, but we can't do it without you. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Special elections often come down to a handful of votes and often fly under the radar. With just three days left before our next special election, we can’t afford to fall short.
